en:
Ah, yeah, unfortunately, we’re out of hands. I’m out of ingredients for the mushroom stews and pie. If you be so generous as to help me, I need 10 mushrooms and 10 forest berries. You can find them in the nearest village. As a reward, I’ll give you something valuable with which you can cook own tasty dishes.
			Take quest:
th:
啊，遗憾的是，我已经没有炖蘑菇和派的材料了。请您帮我找来10个蘑菇和10个森林浆果。你可以在最近的村庄里找到它们。作为奖励，我将给你一些有价值的东西，你可以用它来做自己的美味佳肴。
			接受任务:

th: 清理该地区所有的强盗营地，以解锁新的科技，并邀请更多的人来到你的城镇。

en: Secret spice, used by north shamans to invoke the spiritual world.
th: 秘密香料,被北方的萨满用来进入精神世界.

en: Secret spice, used by north shamans to invoke the spiritual world.
th: 秘密香料,被北方的萨满用来进入精神世界.

en: "I love this fishing village! It's like living in a fishbowl, only without the pesky goldfish.
th: 我喜欢这个渔村! 这就像生活在一个鱼缸里，只是没有讨厌的金鱼。

en: "I swear, if one more person asks me where the mine is, I'm going to start directing them to the old abandoned one just for kicks.
th: 我发誓，如果再有一个人问我矿场在哪里，我就会开始把他们引向废弃的旧矿场了。

en: "In this hunting village, we're like a pack of wolves. We may fight and bicker, but when it comes down to it, we always have each other's backs.
th: 在这个狩猎村，我们就像一群狼。我们可能会打架和争吵，但在关键时刻，我们总是相互支持。
"沃夫卡 "弗拉基米尔-格里亚兹诺夫

en: (CAN BE BUILT ONLY BY CLAIM OWNERS) Large structure allowing Nomads to pack their Giant Wall defenses in a single compartment. Can only be built on bases and packed together with Founder Walkers due to its weight and size.
th: (只能由所有者建造) 一种允许游民将他们的巨墙防御装在一个隔间里的大型建筑。由于其重量和尺寸，只能在基地上建造，并与基础类型的翼行者一起打包。

en: (CAN BE BUILT ONLY BY CLAIM OWNERS) Sturdy gate of a massive size that slides to the side when opened. Large enough to fit most of the walker types known to Nomads.
th: (只能由所有者建造) 尺寸巨大且坚固的门，打开后可滑向一侧。大到足以容纳游民们所知的大多数步行者类型。

en: (CAN BE BUILT ONLY BY CLAIM OWNERS) Sturdy walls of a massive size used by groups of nomads to defend their territory against walker attacks. Can be packed into a Giant Wall Packer.
th: (只能由所有者建造）坚固的大型墙体，被游民用来抵御翼行者的攻击。可以装入巨大的墙体包装器。

en: (For buildings of ALL tiers, not only T1)
th: (适用于所有级别的建筑，不仅仅是T1级)

en: - This is a tech tree entry

-Hey, I must admit, I need your help. I want to make a ceremonial solstice robe, my old ones were stolen by bandits. Unfortunately, I've so many responsibilities as a village elder and can't go hunt for myself. You can receive pelts by hunting and skinning rabbits, they naturally could be found in meadows.
th: 嘿,没办法,我需要你的帮助.我想要做一件至日仪式袍,因为我旧的那件被盗贼偷走了. 不巧的是身为村子的长老我有太多的事情要负责了.你可以从在草地的兔子上剥皮获得皮毛.

en: A Cap made of linen to put under a real helmet. Doesn't provide much protection, but better than nothing.
th: 用亚麻布制成的帽子，放在真正的头盔下面。虽然不能提供太多的保护，但总比没有好。

en: A baked dish which is usually made of a pastry dough casing that contains a filling of various sweet or savoury ingredients.
th: 一种烤制的菜肴，通常是用面团做外壳，里面装上各种甜味或咸味的馅料。

en: A buildable attachement that helps yank nomads onto a walker's deck for quick and easy boarding.
th: 一个可建造的附加物，可以让游民更快更简单的登上翼行者船舱。

en: A ceramic material made by heating substances
th: 通过加热物质制成的一种陶瓷材料

en: A change of pace will be good for me, I think.
th: 可能改变一下节奏对我来讲也是好事.

en: A cold welcome probably wasn’t what you were expecting, but can you blame us? We’re a small village where everyone knows one another, but none of us know you.
th: 你可能没想到我们会这么冷淡,但你要理解我们.我们这个小村子里大家都认识彼此,但是我们对你一无所知.

en: A colored material that is completely or nearly insoluble in water.
th: 完全或几乎不溶于水的有色物质。

en: A colored material that is completely or nearly insoluble in water.
th: 完全或几乎不溶于水的有色物质。

en: A common type of carbonate sedimentary rock.
th: 一种常见类型的碳酸盐沉积岩。

en: A dry coarse stem especially of a cereal grass.
th: 干燥的粗茎，特别是谷类草的粗茎。

en: A durable chest with adaquate inventory space. Items are protected unless the chest is severely damaged.
th: 一个耐用的宝箱，有足够的库存空间。除非宝箱被严重损坏，否则物品会受到保护。

en: A fisherman always sees another fisherman from afar, that's true. I discover it for myself in the youth, but it's too precious to give a way it's secrets yet. So I may give you a bag with bites. That's more then engough to get the Golden Trout. But for that I've a request for your, I need you to bring 5 of pelts, my wife needs them to create me new robe for Solstice. Are we deal?
th: 渔夫总能远远就能认出另一名渔夫.我在年轻的时候发现了它,但是现在还不是交出它秘密的时候.所以我可以给你鱼饵.足够你钓出金鳟的了.但是我需要你给我带来5份皮毛.我妻子需要用来制作至日庆典用的袍子. 干不干？

en: A hard fatty substance made from rendered animal fat.
th: 由动物脂肪制成的硬性脂肪物质。

en: A hard, crystalline mineral composed of silica.
th: 一种由二氧化硅组成的坚硬的结晶性矿物。

en: A high quality colored material that is completely or nearly insoluble in water.
th: 一种高质量的彩色材料，完全或几乎不溶于水。

en: A huge crafting station uses torque to automatically mine stone, iron and other minerals within a certain radius.
th: 一种需要矩力可以在一定半径内自动采石,铁矿还有其他矿物的巨大工作台。

en: A huge crafting station uses torque to turn logs into tons of wood. Extremely efficient.
th: 一种需要矩力可以将原木切割成大量木材巨大工作台。非常高效。

en: A larger personal home, providing workstations to craft thatch, rope and hammers, which is required to build your first village hall.
th: 一个较大的个人住宅，提供制作茅草、绳子和锤子的工作站，这些工作站的产物是你建造第一个村庄大厅时都是所需要的。

en: A larger personal home, providing workstations to craft thatch, rope and hammers, which is required to build your first village hall.
th: 一个较大的个人住宅，提供制作茅草、绳子和锤子的工作站，这些工作站的产物是你建造第一个村庄大厅时都是所需要的。

en: A layer of organic matter that accumulates on a lawn around the base of the grass plants
th: 草坪上积聚在草地植物基部周围的一层有机物。

en: A mechanical arm with a spinning saw blade attached to it harvests lumber from a distance. Requires torque while sawing.
th: 一个上面连接着一个旋转的锯片的机械臂，可以从远处收割木材。锯木时需要矩力。

en: A mechanical arm with a spinning saw blade attached to it harvests lumber from a distance. Requires torque while sawing.
th: 一个上面连接着一个旋转的锯片的机械臂，可以从远处收割木材。锯木时需要矩力。

en: A merchant's life isn't easy, but at least I'm not a peasant toiling in the fields all day.
th: 虽然当个商人也不容易,但是总比闲的乱晃的农民要好.

en: A merchant's life isn't easy, but at least I'm not a peasant toiling in the fields all day.
th: 虽然当个商人也不容易,但是总比闲的乱晃的农民要好.

en: A mixture of fragrant essential oils or aroma compounds, used to give an agreeable scent
th: 芳香精油或芳香化合物的混合物，用于产生令人愉悦的香味。

en: A natural protein fiber, some forms of which can be woven into textiles.
th: 一种天然的蛋白质纤维，其某些形式可以织成纺织品。

en: A pedal-powered walker most nomads build to begin their journey on. Has an additional seat in the back with a built-in ballista!
th: 一种大部分新手游民使用的踏板式翼行者。不仅有多的一个座位还有内置弩炮！

en: A pedal-powered walker that nomads build when they want to begin their journey. Has a small deck and can be upgraded by building wings.
th: 一种新手游民使用的踏板式翼行者。平台很小，可以装载机翼。

en: A pedal-powered walker used by nomads for short range transportation. Boasts a spacious inventory and can pack up to three individual structures.
th: 一种新手游民在短途旅行中使用的踏板式翼行者。空间很大，可以打包装载3种建筑。

en: A piece of mineral crystal which, in cut and polished form, is used to make jewelry or other adornments
th: 一块矿物晶体，以切割和抛光的形式，用于制作珠宝或其他装饰品。

en: A placeable that creates a mini-claim area in moderate radius. Additional resouces will go into this placeable instead of Proxy Walker.
th: 一个可以在中等范围内创建一个可小范围占领的道具。额外的资源将进入这个道具，而不是代理翼行者中。

en: A plant with a growth habit of trailing or scandent stems, lianas or runners.
th: 具有拖曳或攀缘茎的生长习性的植物，藤本植物或匐茎。

en: A requirement for every Nomad's base. Prevents a base decaying over time with sufficient resources inside. Requires each resource a base is made of to properly maintain it.
th: 是每个游民基地的需求.防止一个基地在内部有足够的资源的情况下，随着时间的推移而消失。需要构成这个基地的材料来进行维护。

en: A rotating pod made to attach below walker decks. Houses a single tool, like a saw blade.
th: 在翼行者甲板下面的小型吊舱，可以装比如锯刀之类的工具。

en: A rotating pod made to attach below walker decks. Houses a single weapon.
th: 在翼行者甲板下面的小型吊舱，可以装一种武器

en: A seed, fruit, root, bark, or other plant substance primarily used for flavoring or coloring food.
th: 主要用于给食物调味或着色的种子、果实、根、树皮或其他植物物质。

en: A set of basic clothing made from simple cloth.
th: 一套用简单的布制作的基本服装。

en: A shared storage for your camp, to which your workers can deliver resources, food, and equipment. Whenever your settlers feel hungry, they are free to take some of the stored food.
th: 营地的共享仓库，你的工人可以把资源、食物和装备存在这里。每当你的定居者感到饥饿时，他们可以自动消耗里面的食物。

en: A shared storage for your camp, to which your workers can deliver resources, food, and equipment. Whenever your settlers feel hungry, they are free to take some of the stored food.
th: 营地的共享仓库，你的工人可以把资源、食物和装备存在这里。每当你的定居者感到饥饿时，他们可以自动消耗里面的食物。

en: A show of hospitality is an easy way to earn some favor. You’ve got a campfire going at your shack, right? Put it to use, cook up some mushrooms or meat.
th: 好客的表现是赢得好感的简单方法。你有一个篝火在你的小屋里，对吗？用它煮一些蘑菇或肉吧。

en: A silvery metal that characteristically has a faint yellow hue.
th: 一种银色的金属，其特点是具有微弱的黄色色调。

en: A small primitive source of heat for cooking basic foods. Require wood to maintain the fire.
th: 用于烹饪基本食物的小型原始热源。需要木材来维持火势。

en: A stackable, elevated platform that allows for easier access to high places. Useful in walker construction.
th: 一种可叠加的上升平台，可以让人更方便到高处。常在翼行者建造中使用。

en: A staple food prepared from a dough of flour and water
th: 由面粉和水制成的主食。

en: A sturdy vambrace with an addition of leather gloves underneath. Good protection for any soldier on a field.
th: 一个坚固的臂铠，下面还有一副皮手套。对战场上的任何士兵都有很好的保护作用。

en: A type of fabric in which the cut threads are evenly distributed, with a short dense pile, giving it a distinctive soft feel.
th: 一种织物，其切割线均匀分布，有短而密的绒毛，使其具有独特的柔软感觉。

en: A weak chest with a small amount of inventory space. Items are protected unless the chest is severely damaged.
th: 一个小容量的破宝箱。除非箱子坏了，否则里面的物品会安然无恙。

en: A wooden mallet perfect for erecting structures
th: 一个非常适合搭建建筑的木槌

en: ADecorate your surroundings with this undeniable pinnacle of rupu ingenuity and artistry.
th: 用这种无可否认的露普的独创性和艺术性的巅峰之作来装饰你的周围环境。

en: Above average strength, can be packed on walkers.
th: 有着比较高的力度，可以装载在翼行者上。

th: 有着比较高的力度，可以装载在翼行者上。

th: 有着比较高的力度，可以装载在翼行者上。

en: Actually, it's probably not the best idea to join me
th: 可能加入我不是一个好主意.

en: Actually, it's probably not the best idea to join me.
th: 其实可能加入我不是一个好主意.

en:
Add raw ingredients into the left container and select a recipe to craft. Hold SHIFT to craft multiple recipes.

Some items, like water, require you to equip a bottle before you can transport them. You can still drink it via RIGHT CLICK. 

More recipes can be unlocked in the Tech Tree.
th:
在左侧的容器中放入原材料后选择一份图纸来进行制作。按住 SHIFT 可以制作多份。
 
一些物品，比如水，需要你持有一个瓶子后才能取走。当然你还是可以按下鼠标右键来直接喝掉。

更多的图纸可以在科技树里解锁。

en: Add raw ingredients into the left container and select a recipe to craft. Press to craft multiple recipes. Some items, like water, require you to equip a bottle before you can transport them. You can still drink it via . More recipes can be unlocked in the Tech Tree.
th: 在左侧的容器中放入原材料后选择一份图纸来进行制作。按住 可以制作多份。 一些物品，比如水，需要你持有一个瓶子后才能取走。当然你还是可以按下来直接喝掉。 更多的图纸可以在科技树里解锁。

en: Add various raw ingredients into the left container and wait for them to be stomped into a different resource. Try adding more of the same ingredient if the stomping doesn't start or switch ingredients. Some items, like water, require you to equip a bottle before you can transport them. You can still drink it via .
th: 在左侧的容器中放入原材料后就可以让它们成为不同的资源了。 如果加工不能开始，请尝试增加更多的同种原材料，或者替换其中的原材料。 一些物品，比如水，需要你持有一个瓶子后才能取走。但是你还是可以按下 来直接喝掉。

en:
Add various raw ingredients into the left container and wait for them to be stomped into a different resource.

Try adding more of the same ingredient if the stomping doesn't start or switch ingredients.

Some items, like water, require you to equip a bottle before you can transport them. You can still drink it via RIGHT CLICK.
th:
在左侧的容器中放入原材料后就可以让它们成为不同的资源了。

如果加工不能开始，请尝试增加更多的同种原材料，或者替换其中的原材料。

一些物品，比如水，需要你持有一个瓶子后才能取走。但是你还是可以按下鼠标右键来直接喝掉。

en: Adding plate poleyn to rawhide chauses instantly makes them more usable on the battlefield, protecting your lower regions from attacks.
th: 在生皮链上添加板状物，可以立即使它们在战场上更有用武之地，保护你的下部区域免受攻击。

en: Adequate bed with a medium-sized water container that holds a few respawns.
th: 一种可以让人重生数次的普通床，有着中型的水容器。

en: Advanced Ballista shoots projectiles at very high speed, with a very low turn rate and reload speed.
th: 高级的弩炮可以射出非常高的速度。上弹和转头的速度非常低。

en: Advanced crafting station manufactures fabrics more efficiently.
th: 高级的工作台可以更高效的生产布料。

en: Advanced crafting station smelts raw ore into refined metal.
th: 高级工作台可以将原矿冶炼成精炼金属。

en: Advanced crafting station unlocks new available recipes and cuts wood more efficiently.
th: 可以解锁更多图纸以及更高效砍木的工作台。

en: Advanced pickaxe made of iron. Allows to mine more efficiently.
th: 铁制的高级手镐。能更有效地采矿。

en: Advanced pickaxe made of iron. Allows to mine more efficiently.
th: 铁制的高级手镐。能更有效地采矿。

en: After betrayal in our ranks, Leoric shatter down little forces that remain to withstand his invasion. We lost and Leoric's forces ravaged this lands, they destroy all bell towers and brought ruins to our settlement, cause it's leader was from it. Now we live as poor outlanders on No Man's land, without authority to protect us from bandits. No hope, no future.
th: 在我们队伍里出现背叛者后,李奥瑞克击碎了最后一部分反抗他的势力. 我们输了,李奥瑞克的军队蹂躏了这片土地. 他们摧毁了所有的钟塔,毁了我们的定居点,就因为它的领袖来自这里. 现在我们作为可怜的外乡人生活在无人区，没有人保护我们免受强盗的侵害。没有希望，没有未来。

en: Again, thank you so much! You can tell Ketyl that I’ll be adding my report and sending it off to our partner in the capital. Maybe we’ll work together again, stranger. Take this as an investment in our continued relationship.
th: 再次非常感谢您! 你可以告诉基德，我会把我的报告加上去，然后寄给我们在首都的合作伙伴。也许我们会再次合作，陌生人。把这当作是对我们继续合作关系的投资吧。

en: Ah, I remember him. It's not often that I see another angler around here. You look like you know your way around a fishing rod, but let me tell you, I'm the best fisherman in these parts. I've been fishing for over 50 years, and I've caught more fish than I can count. My hobby to run away from elder tasks, yes.
th: 啊，我记得他。来这里钓鱼的人可不多。虽然你看起来挺会钓鱼的，但我可是这附近最厉害的钓鱼者。我钓鱼已经有50多年了，钓上来的鱼多得数不清。我的爱好是逃避长老发给我的任务。

en: Ah, a fellow traveler! Welcome to my humble shop. I'm a professional in crafting weapons and armor of the highest quality. Is there something specific you're looking for?
th: 啊，旅行者! 欢迎来到我这间简陋的商店。我是一个专业制作最高质量的武器和盔甲的人。你需要什么特别的东西吗？

en: Ah, it looks like the villagers aren’t as wary around you. You’ve made a good impression on them.
th: 啊,看起来村民们和你相处变得自然了许多.你一定给他们留下了好印象.

en: Ah, it looks like you’ve found someone!

Ah, the Solstice! It's a fascinating event that happens twice a year, once in the summer and once in the winter. The Solstice marks the longest day of the year in the summer and the shortest day of the year in the winter. It has been observed by humans for thousands of years and has played an important role in many cultures and religions. It's a reminder of the changing of the seasons and the power of the natural world. I'm obsessed with it.
th: 啊，至日！这是一个每年只发生两次的迷人日子！一次在夏季，一次在冬季。夏天的至日标志着一年中最长的一天，冬天的至日标志着一年中最短的一天。几千年来，人类一直在观察这个日子，并在许多文化和宗教中发挥了重要作用。它提醒人们季节的变化和自然世界的力量。我对它很着迷。

en: Ah, the smell of fresh herbs in the air always lifts my spirits. Welcome to my garden, adventurer
th: 啊，空气中新鲜草药的味道总是让我精神振奋。欢迎来到我的花园，冒险者

en: Ah, welcome back my friend! Still in one piece, I see. Did you manage to gather all of the ingredients I requested for Solstice Booze?
th: 啊，欢迎回来，我的朋友! 你看起来还不错啊, 没少个胳膊断个腿的。你收集到至日酒的原料了吗？

en: Ah, welcome back, my friend! Did you manage to gather the ingredients I requested for the Solstice Elixir?
th: 欢迎回来,朋友！你搞到至日灵药的材料了吗？

en: Ah, welcome back, my friend! So you manage to hunt those stags and bring their horns?
th: 欢迎回来,我的朋友！所以你搞到雄鹿角了吗？

en: Ahoy there, adventurer! Welcome to my humble abode in the wilds of the forest. I hope you're ready for a life of solitude, because let's be real, I'm the only one who's going to be talking to you out here. But hey, at least you won't have to worry about putting up with any pesky villagers.
th: 你好啊，冒险家！欢迎来到我在这片森林的陋室！我希望你已经准备好接受孤独的生活，因为说实话，我是唯一一个在这里和你说话的人。但是，至少你不必担心要忍受任何讨厌的村民。

The Guardians are the sole keepers of this machine, a technological relic of the old world which has sustained the Flotillans to this day. However, nomads developed a similar, yet more primitive version of this technology.

en: Before the Flotilla grew too large and switched to manpower, hundreds of buffalo walkers were used to tow the Flotilla on days there was no breeze. Named after an ancient beast, the Buffalo's wide frame, ample deck space, and good maneuverability make it suited for almost any task.

en: Before the nomadic Flotillans had become aware of the route they needed to take to circumnavigate the planet efficiently, many of them died in the process of locating safe passage. These crudely constructed wind-powered walkers were first devised as scouting vessels because of their cheap cost and the high likelihood that a Nomad would not return from these missions. Has ample deck space for two Nomads.

en: But one day everything fell, I don’t know the fate of your parents, but rumors spoke he may be alive, probably Crown uses his knowledge for some reason, who can tell… Gustaw probably knows more, cripple as he’s he helped troops with provision, hasn’t he told ya? Please, take this little coins I've, I'm old and they're no use for me. I wan't you to use them visely!
th: 但有一天一切都毁了，我不知道你父母的命运，但有传言说他可能还活着，可能是皇帝出于某种原因使用了他的知识，谁知道呢......古斯塔夫可能知道得更多，他是个瘸子，但他帮助部队提供食物，他没有告诉你吗？请收下我的这些硬币吧，我老了，它们对我没有用处。我希望你能好好利用它们!

en: But wait, wait, you must test hot BlackBerry Beer, which I made for your father long ago, conversations can’t go deeper without a good drink! Please, bring some berries from the bush nearby, be quick, the beverage is fast to make, but its taste depends on how fast you put berries in!
th: 等等，你必须尝尝这热黑莓啤酒，这是我很久以前为你父亲做的，聊天怎么能没有酒嘛! 请从附近的灌木丛中带些浆果来，要快，虽然酒的制作速度很快，但它的味道取决于你把浆果放进去的速度!

en: Court soldiers? Ha! The brigands have an agreement with the  bandits: as long as those thugs keep their tents outside of the village and pass some coin along whenever they feel like causing trouble, the soldiers don’t touch them. None of the villagers are willing to stand up to either party. I’d try to clear the bandit’s camp myself, but I’m not as strong as I used to be.
th: 宫廷士兵？哈! 他们那帮强盗与土匪们达成了一个协议：只要那些暴徒不进入村子，那么他们只需要贿赂下士兵们不会找他们麻烦。村民们都不愿意站出来反对任何一方。我想尝试自己去清除土匪的营地，但我已经没有以前那么强壮了。

7. Your personal data will be processed until expiry of the limitation period for claims arose from the cooperation agreement. After the processing is completed, the data will be destroyed.

8. You are entitled to request from the Controller access to your personal data, their rectification, erasure or restriction of their processing, as well as object to their processing, and with regards to data disclosed based on your voluntary consent, you are entitled to withdraw that consent at any time. Withdrawal shall not affect the lawfulness of processing carried out before the withdrawal.

9. You are also entitled to lodge a complaint with the Chief of the Personal Data Protection Office if you believe that the processing of your personal data contravenes legal regulations.

10. Provision of your personal data is voluntary; failure to provide this data will prevent you from testing our game.

11. The Controller will not make any decisions concerning you based solely on automated decision-making, including profiling.

With respect,

th: 基于帆制翼行者上设计成的翼行者，斯特莱托翼行者不仅快，灵活，有着更多的甲板空间，而且还更有力。是喜欢单独行动或者以小部队行动人的福音。

en: Do you remember the smell hot BlackBerry Beer, which I made for your father long ago, conversations can’t go deeper without a good drink! Please, bring some berries from the bush nearby, be quick, the beverage is fast to make, but its taste depends on how fast you put berries in!
th: 你还记得热腾腾的黑莓啤酒的味道吗? 这是我很久以前为你父亲做的，聊天怎么能没有酒嘛! 请从附近的灌木丛中带些浆果来，要快，虽然酒的制作速度很快，但它的味道取决于你把浆果放进去的速度!

en: Don't be afraid to try different techniques - sometimes the fish aren't biting on one type of bait, but they'll go crazy for something else. And finally, don't forget to have fun. Fishing is a great way to relax and connect with nature.
th: 要勇于尝试不同的技术--有时如果鱼不咬钩的话就换另外的鱼饵。最后，不要忘记享受钓鱼的乐趣。钓鱼是一种放松和与大自然联系的好方法。

en: Don't go out of the village after dark. It's very dangerous...My nephew disappeared  a month ago...
th: 天黑后不要走出村子。太危险了......我的侄子一个月前失踪了......

en: Don't still have money, poor soul?
Don’t rush into things. Are you sure you have enough fighters? Decent equipment? Running head on into a fight ill-prepared will prove nothing aside from the fact you’re foolish.
th: 别着急.你确定你人手充足了？装备好了?别没准备好就去打仗,否则你就是个傻子.

en: Enough deck space for both large weapons and the crew needed to operate them. The tusker walker is a juggernaut when it comes to hauling space, and is primarily used by rich traders that need to transport tons of valuable goods. Slow and hard to maneuver, it's often escorted by swift combat walkers. Owners of tusker walkers rarely fail to get a return on their investment.

th: 早上好,年轻的旅行者.你来这儿有什么事吗?你想抛个硬币吗?

en: Good quality textile cap that protects your head.
th: 质量还不错的帽子,可以为头部提供保护

en: Good quality textile pair of pants that protects your lower body.
th: 质量好的纺织品裤子，可以保护你的下半身。

en: Good quality textile pair of shoes that protects your feet.
th: 质量好的纺织品鞋，可以保护你的脚。

en: Good quality textile tunic that protects your upper body.
th: 优质的纺织品上衣，可以保护您的上半身。

en: Good work. If you keep striking down bandits, people throughout the Lowlands will start to take notice.
th: 干得好。继续这样干掉强盗, 整个低地的人们会开始注意到你。

en: Good, so bring 5 iron ores to mee. They could be found on the bank of the rivers.
th: 很好，那就带5块铁矿石给我吧。它们可以在河岸边找到。

en: Great to know an adventurer like you!
th: 很高兴能认识你这样一个冒险者!

en: Great! Please bring me mushrooms, herbs, thatch, and a simple cord!
th: 太好了! 请给我带来蘑菇、草药、茅草和一根简单的绳索!

en: Great! Please bring me roasted mushrooms, herbs, berries and boar tusk! Beware of the boars - they’re great and formidable fighters. To find them, look near the lake. They thrive there, spending their days in the mud.
th: 很好! 请给我带来烤蘑菇、草药、浆果和野猪牙! 你要小心野猪--它们战斗力可不俗。你可以在湖边找到它们, 它们在那里茁壮成长，在泥泞中度日。

en: Great, you saved me, now our village going to have the best festivity we ever had! It’s all thanks to you, so take my personal cooking pot as a reward, with it you can cook tasty dishes that will fill your stomach in a minute. Nothing is more refreshing in this world as tasty pie or strew!
th: 太好了，你救了我，咱们村子将迎来有史以来最好的节日！这都要归功于你。我这口锅就给你吧，你用它可以做美味的菜肴，让你在一分钟内填饱肚子。在这个世界上，没有什么比美味的馅饼或肉串更让人心旷神怡的了!

en: Greeting fellow, thanks for all your help! How are you today?
th: 感谢您的帮助！您今天怎么样？

en: Greeting! I'm not needed so soon be removed. But you still can hire me!
th: 你好！我因为不再被需要马上就要被解雇了.但是你还是可以雇佣我的!

en: Greeting! You know that knowledge is power, my friend. With it, you can accomplish great things and overcome any obstacle in your path. And yes, I'm selling books. Don't you want to check?
th: 你好啊! 你也听说过知识就是力量，我的朋友。有了它，你可以完成伟大的事情，克服你道路上的任何障碍。是的，我在卖书。你不瞧瞧吗？

en: Greetings my Fried, look at my groceries, hopefully you like them! Come next time, maybe I'll have something interesting to show you!
th: 你好啊，我的朋友. 来看看我这些杂货吧,说不定你会喜欢呢！下次再来,说不定会有你感兴趣的东西！

en: Greetings my friend. Look at my wares, hopefully you like them! Come next time, maybe I'll have something interesting to show you!
th: 你好啊，我的朋友. 来看看我这些商品吧,说不定你会喜欢呢！下次再来,说不定会有你感兴趣的东西！

en: Greetings to you! Sorry, but I haven’t got any tasks for you. See me again another time.
th: 你好啊，帅气的小伙子! 抱歉，现在没有任何任务给你。但谁知道呢--也许你从这些书中获得的智慧会引导你进行你自己的探索。一路顺风!

en: Greetings! We've a plan for big
th: 你好啊！我们在计划一个盛大的

en: Greetings! We've huge festivities. But we run out of meat=( Would you Help us?
th: 你好! 我们要举行一个大型庆典。但是我们的肉已经用完了=( 你能帮助我们吗？

en: Greetings, I'm glad to see new faces in our small village. Are you came from Haerndean? I remember their folk, we gather to celebrate the summer solstice. Hope you'll stay to the next one! I hope I may teach you something for free if you are willing to help me, I worked as a  foreman before, so my knowledge may be of use.
th: 你好，我很高兴在我们的小村庄里能看到新面孔。你是从海恩丁村来的吗？我记得他们的民俗，我们聚在一起庆祝夏至。希望你能留到下一次至日一起庆祝! 如果你愿意帮助我的话，我可以免费教你一些东西. 我以前当过工头，所以我的知识可能会有用。

en: Greetings, adventurer! I can present you with some top-quality gear, you've come to the right place. What can I craft for you today?
th: 你好啊，冒险者！来看看这些顶级的装备！你可来对地方了。需要我为你制作些什么吗？

en: Greetings, adventurer! I'm in need of a certain material for a special project, and I think you might be just the person to help me. Are you interested?
th: 你好啊，冒险者！我要做一个特别的东西需要某种材料！我想你可能正是帮助我的人。你有兴趣吗？

en: Greetings, adventurer! In my and my mother opinion, I am the finest craftsman in all the land, and I take great pride in my work. Is there something in particular that caught your eye?
th: 你好啊，冒险者！我是这块土地上最好的工匠, 我妈也这么说. 我对我的工作感到非常自豪。有什么特别的东西引起你的注意吗？

en: Greetings, adventurer. I am the leader of this village. We are in need of your assistance. If you have time I could explain you the situation. You seem like the right person to do that.
th: 你好啊，冒险家。我是这个村庄的领袖。我们需要你的帮助。如果你有时间，我可以向你解释情况。你似乎是做这件事的合适人选。

en: Greetings, curious one. Within these pages lie knowledge that will change your life forever. Come, let me show you the way.
th: 你好啊，好奇的人。在这些书页之中,有一些知识将永远改变你的人生。来吧，让我给你指路。

en: Greetings, friend! You've done a fine job in helping me. Your skills are impressive. Unfortunatelly I've no more in mind, come back later!
th: 你好,朋友！你的身手不错.不巧我现在没什么事需要麻烦你的了.之后再来吧！

en: Greetings, friend. In a world full of noise and distraction, there is nothing more valuable than a good book. Take a look what I have and discover the secrets within.
th: 朋友，你好。在这样一个混乱纷杂世界里，没有什么比一本好书更有价值的了。看看吧, 去探索里面的秘密。

en: Greetings, my friend. You look like a skilled angler. I have a special request for you. I've been fishing these waters for years, and I've caught just about every kind of fish there is. But there's one fish that has eluded me, and it's driving me crazy. I'm talking about the elusive 'Golden Trout.
th: 你好啊，我的朋友。你看起来就很会钓鱼。我有一个特别的请求。我在这附近钓鱼很多年了，几乎所有的鱼我都钓过。但有一种名叫"金鳟"的鱼，我一直没能钓到, 我真的要疯了.

en: Greetings, stranger! What can I interest you in today?
th: 你好啊,陌生人！你需要什么吗？

en: Greetings, stranger! What can I interest you in today?
th: 你好啊,陌生人！你需要什么吗？

en: Greetings, stranger! What can I interest you in today?
th: 你好啊,陌生人！你需要什么吗？

en: Greetings, stranger. I’ve got nothing for you today; come back later.
th: 你好陌生人.我今天没什么需要找你的；之后再来吧.

en: Greetings, stranger. My name is Alan, I’m a chef in this little village. We’ve festivities this fall, our Elders daughter is getting married. I’ve got little time to talk, so many dishes must be prepared and time is short. I forgot, what did you want?
th: 你好，陌生人。我叫艾伦，是这个小村庄的一名厨师。今年秋天我们有庆祝活动，我们的长老女儿要结婚了。我没有多少时间说话，必须准备很多菜，时间很紧。我忘了，你想要什么？

en: Greetings, stranger. These are dangerous times to travel alone. Say, have we met before?
th: 你好啊，陌生人。现在可不是自己旅行的好时候。我们以前见过吗？

en: Greetings, traveler! Welcome to my cozy little hermitage in the heart of the forest. I hope you're not expecting much in the way of company, because I'm pretty much it. But don't worry, I'm a pretty good listener. Just try not to talk too fast, I'm still getting used to human interaction after all these years.
th: 你好，旅行者! 欢迎来到我在森林中心的舒适的小隐居地。你也别指望有什么人了，就只有我而已。但别担心，我是个很好的倾听者。只是尽量不要说得太快，这么多年了，我还在适应人与人之间的交流。

en: Greetings, traveler! Welcome to my cozy little hermitage in the heart of the forest. I hope you're not expecting much in the way of company, because I'm pretty much it. But don't worry, I'm a pretty good listener. Just try not to talk too fast, I'm still getting used to human interaction after all these years.
th: 你好，旅行者! 欢迎来到我在森林中心的舒适的小隐居地。你也别指望有什么人了，就只有我而已。但别担心，我是个很好的倾听者。只是尽量不要说得太快，这么多年了，我还在适应人与人之间的交流。

en: Greetings, traveler. I’ve got a request for you, if you’re willing to listen to this old toolmaker.
th: 旅行者你好！能听我这个老工匠一个请求吗?

en: Greetings, traveler. The books in my store are essential tools for personal growth, enlightenment, and self-discovery. Browse at your leisure.
th: 你好啊，旅行者。我店里的书都是关于个人成长、启蒙和自我发现的良作。请您随意浏览。

en: Grow your own trees from seeds overnight with the help of some Nibiran fertilizer.
th: 使用尼比兰肥料，能够让你的树木种子在一夜之间长大成树。

en: Grow your own trees from seeds overnight with the help of some Nibiran fertilizer.
th: 使用尼比兰肥料，能够让你的树木种子在一夜之间长大成树。

en: Guard post to protect your settlement.
th: 保护你的定居点的岗哨。

en: Hang a rock below below a platform and manually release it over the heads of your enemies.
th: 在平台下方悬挂一块石头，然后手动释放砸中敌人头部。

en: Harnesses wind to generate torque automatically. A torque belt is required to transfer the torque between devices.
th: 借助风力自动产生矩力。需要矩力带来进行设备之间的矩力传输

en: Harvests plants in a 200m area around it using Workforce. Best to place near lush areas.
th: 使用劳动力在周围200米范围内收割植物。最好放在茂盛的地区附近。

en: Harvests plants in a 200m area around it using Workforce. Best to place near lush areas.
th: 使用劳动力在周围200米范围内收割植物。最好放在茂盛的地区附近。

en: Harvests plants in a 200m area around it using Workforce. Best to place near lush areas.
th: 使用劳动力在周围200米范围内收割植物。最好放在茂盛的地区附近。

en: Harvests plants in the area around it using Workforce. Best to place near lush areas.
th: 使用劳动力收获周围地区的植物。最好放在郁郁葱葱的地区附近。

en: Harvests resources in small area around it using 1 worker. Best to place near lush areas.
th: 使用1名工人在周围的小区域收获资源。最好放在郁郁葱葱的地区附近。

en: Harvests resources in small area around it using 1 worker. Best to place near lush areas.
th: 使用1名工人在周围的小区域收获资源。最好放在郁郁葱葱的地区附近。

en: Harvests trees in a 150m area around it using Workforce. Best to place near dense forests.
th: 使用劳动力收割周围150米范围内的树木。最好放在密林附近。

en: Harvests trees in a 150m area around it using Workforce. Best to place near dense forests.
th: 使用劳动力收割周围150米范围内的树木。最好放在密林附近。

en: Harvests trees in a 150m area around it using Workforce. Best to place near dense forests.
th: 使用劳动力收割周围150米范围内的树木。最好放在密林附近。

en: Have thee come to pick an old man's brain?
th: 你是来找我这个老家伙来出主意的吗？

en: Have you come across the small bandit camp outside the village? Those ruffians love to give us a hard time. Whenever we try to stand up for ourselves, they just laugh and beat someone senseless.
th: 你在村子外面遇到那一小群强盗了吗？那帮流氓就喜欢找我们麻烦.我们每次试着反抗都会被嘲笑,然后把我们中的一些人打的不省人事.

en: Have you come to cause trouble or stir up dissent?
th: 你是来制造麻烦或挑起异议的吗？

en: Have you found a willing volunteer?
Have you gotten acquainted with a few of Haenrdean’s residents?
th: 你去见过几个海恩丁的居民了吗？

en: Have you seen the Elder yet?

Haven't I've been told you about my son in law, Jack. He's young, strong and eager to change this world. Don't you want talk to him, you seems same. You can find him near the forest on the eastern part of our settlement.
th: 我不是跟你说过我女婿杰克吗. 他年轻又强壮,总想着要改变这个世界.你不想去和他聊聊吗?毕竟你俩这么相似.你可以在我们定居点东部的森林附近找到他。

en: Havent you met your aunt alrady?
th: 你不是已经见过你的姑姑了吗？

en: Having both better efficiency and sturdyness than the Skirmish type, these well-rounded wings are often used by adventurers and raiders who can afford their cost and maintenance.
th: 比突击型的效率和坚固性都要好，这种全面的机翼经常被能负担得起成本和维护的冒险者和侵略者使用。

en: He's good, healthy and prosperous! Here’s his letter.
th: 他挺好的,既健康又富裕！这是他的信.

en: He, enjoyed it too.  Don’t you remember the day Kinslayer Leoric slay his brother to become a king?
th: 他，也很享受。 你不记得弑君者利奥里奇杀死他的兄弟成为国王的那一天吗？

en: Heavily protected with strong walls all around, Domus Walkers are often used to safely transport large numbers of nomads. While slow and difficult to handle, they can withstand massive damages, ensuring structural integrity during battles and defending everything inside.
th: 多莫斯翼行者因其四周有着坚固的墙作保护，经常被用来安全运送大量的游民。虽然速度慢且难以操控，但它们可以承受巨大的冲击，在战斗中确保结构的完整性，并保卫内部的一切。

en: Heavy helmet with a full face visor to withstand hits from any weapon imaginable.
th: 重型头盔的全脸面罩可以抵御任何可以想象的武器的打击。

en: Heavy helmet with additional protection and comfort provided by the padding.
th: 重型头盔，由衬垫提供额外的保护和舒适。

en: Heavy steel gountlets providing exceptional protection to hands in combat.
th: 沉重的钢制护手在战斗中为手部提供特殊保护。

en: Hello my child, how are you there?
th: 你好啊,我的孩子.你还好吗？

en: Hello my fried, nice to see you
th: 你好啊朋友,很高兴见到你

en: Hello stranger! Tell me, do you celebrate the Solstice?
th: 你好啊，陌生人！你庆祝至日吗？

en:
Hello there! 
I'm the Haling Cove Elder, and I'm glad you've decided to visit our farming village. Is there anything in particular you're looking for, or do you just want to see what we have to offer?
th:
你好! 
我是哈灵湾的长老，我很高兴你来我们的农业村。你有什么特别要找的东西吗，或者你只是想看看我们能提供的东西？

en: Hello there! How may I assist you with my herbal knowledge?"
th: 您好！我想请问您在草药学方面有什么需要帮助的吗？"

en: Hello there! I'm the Horndean Elder, and I'm glad you've decided to visit our fishing village. Is there anything in particular you're looking for, or do you just want to see what we have to offer?
th: 你好! 我是霍恩丁的长老，我很高兴你来我们的渔业村。你有什么特别要找的东西吗，或者你只是想看看我们能提供的东西？

en: Hello there, brave adventurer! Welcome to my little corner of the woods. I hope you're not expecting much in the way of luxury, because let's be real, this is pretty much a one-man operation. But hey, at least you'll have plenty of time to hone your foraging skills. Just be careful not to eat any of the glowing mushrooms, trust me on that one.
th: 你好啊，勇敢的冒险者! 欢迎来到这片森林里属于我的小角落。你可别指望这地方有多豪华,就只有我一个人忙活而已。但是，至少你会有足够的时间来磨练你的觅食技巧。别吃任何发光的蘑菇，相信我.

en: Hello there, brave adventurer! Welcome to my little corner of the woods. I hope you're not expecting much in the way of luxury, because let's be real, this is pretty much a one-man operation. But hey, at least you'll have plenty of time to hone your foraging skills. Just be careful not to eat any of the glowing mushrooms, trust me on that one.
th: 你好啊，勇敢的冒险者! 欢迎来到这片森林里属于我的小角落。你可别指望这地方有多豪华,就只有我一个人忙活而已。但是，至少你会有足够的时间来磨练你的觅食技巧。别吃任何发光的蘑菇，相信我.

en: Hello there, my friend! I hope you're enjoying the beauty and bounty of nature today.
th: 你好啊,我的朋友！希望你能享受大自然的美丽和丰饶。

en: Hello there, seeker of knowledge. You've come to the right place. The books in that I have are not just ink and paper - they're keys to unlock your greatest potential.
th: 你好，知识的探求者。你来对地方了。我所拥有的书不只是墨水和纸张--它们是开启你最大潜力的钥匙。

en: Hello there, what brings you here?
th: 你好啊,什么风把你吹来了？

en: Hello there, what deal brought you here?
th: 你好啊,什么风把你吹来了？

en: Hello there, young adventurer. You may not know it yet, but the greatest weapon you can wield is a book. Don't you wanna look at what I have?
th: 你好啊,年轻的冒险者.你可能还不知道,但是最强大的武器便是书籍.你不想来看看我有些什么吗？

en: Hello there. Like one wise man said: "Knowledge is like a weapon that can be used to defend oneself. The more you have, the more capable you become of defending yourself against anything that may come your way.". By the way, I've some books that may interest you!
th: 你好。正如一位智者所说 "知识就是能捍卫自己的武器。你越博学便越有能力保护自己，在任何情况下都能临危不乱。"顺便说一下，我这里有一些书, 有没有什么兴趣啊？

en: Hello traveler! What do you know about melting iron?Our elder demanded 4 iron swords.  If you willing to bring me iron ore, I would gladly show you how to create a sword and we'll make one!
th: 旅行者你好！你知道熔铁吗？我们的长老要4把铁剑。 如果你愿意给我带来铁矿石，我很乐意手把手教你怎么铸剑！

en: Hello, stranger! I have a small favor to ask of you, if you're willing to lend me your time.
th: 你好啊,陌生人！我想请你帮个小忙,如果你有时间的话.

en: Hello, stranger. I still don’t trust you enough to offer you any business. Come back another time.
th: 你好，陌生人。我还没信任你到向你提供业务。下次再来吧。

en: Hello, stranger. I still don’t trust you enough to offer you any business. Come back another time.
th: 你好，陌生人。我还没信任你到向你提供业务。下次再来吧。
帮助村民并获取100点信任.

en: Here’s the flax you asked for.

Here’s the thing. I have the design for the cover in mind, but I need a specific material to create them: flax.  Unfortunately, I’ve got none on hand at the moment. Would you be willing to venture out into the nearby fields to gather some for me? You’ll be rewarded for your efforts, of course. I’d do it myself, but there are revisions to make and I’m on a tight schedule.
th: 问题是这样的. 我已经想好了封面的设计，但我需要一种特定的材料来制作它们：亚麻。 不幸的是，我现在手头没有。你是否愿意冒险到附近的田地里为我收集一些？当然，你的努力会得到回报的。我也想自己去收集,但是我需要进行一些改动根本没时间.

en: Hey! Thanks for your help. Here's what I promised.
th: 谢谢你的帮助.这是说好的.

en: Hey! Thanks for your help. Here's what I promised.
th: 谢谢你的帮助.这是说好的.

你好呀!!!
我能加入你吗?

en: Hey, I want some meat for festivities for coins of course. Do we've a deal?
th: 我想用钱换些肉在庆典上用.怎么样？

en: Hey, I'm in dire need for new clothes, you know, soon we're going to have solstice festiveties, this year... But I can't find any pelts to make fine new robes for me and my family, would you be able to help? For a good coin of course...
th: 嘿,我真的需要一套新衣服. 马上就要到至日庆典了.但是我根本弄不到皮毛给我和家人做新袍子.你能帮帮我吗?我给你钱...

en: Hey, are you bring what I want?
th: 你拿来我想要的东西了吗？

en: Hey, did you manage to find rabbits already?
Hey, hey! Now that those brutes are gone, I feel much more at ease!
th: 嘿！那帮畜生走了后我感觉安心多了！

en: Hey, hey, rockstar! Because of you killed those brutes I feel so good today!
th: 你好啊，大名人！就因为你干掉了那些混账,我今天都感觉神清气爽的！

en: Hey, hey, rockstar! Because of you killed those brutes I feel so good today!
th: 你好啊，大名人！就因为你干掉了那些混账,我今天都感觉神清气爽的！

th: 你好啊，大名人！就因为你干掉了那些混账,我今天都感觉神清气爽的！

th: 你好啊，大名人！就因为你干掉了那些混账,我今天都感觉神清气爽的！

en: Hey, how is it going with those red iron rocks along the river?
th: 嘿，河边的那些红铁岩怎么样了？

en: Hey, my cows are in need of straw. If you manage to get one, I'll grant you with meat. Do we've a deal?
th: 嘿，我的牛需要一些茅草。我可以拿肉和你换。行不？

en: Hey, our folk is in great need of healing solves. If you manage to get one, I'll grant you some bandages. Do we've a deal?
th: 嘿，我们急需一些疗伤药. 你如果有的话我拿绷带和你交换. 行不？

en: Hey, we've a festiveties, and are in need of stew. If you manage to get one, I'll grant you some coin. Do we've a deal?
th: 你好,我们要举办一个庆典但是没有炖菜了.我愿意拿钱和你换.换不？
隐藏/显示 任务记录

en: High boots with strong protection and fitted for horseriding.
th: 具有很强的保护性，适合骑马的高靴。

en: Hit trees with tools other than Axes
th: 用斧子以外的工具攻击树

en: Hope one day we could have some business together, you look like a man of deal. But for now I don't know who you are, so come back when you'll have something for me.
th: 希望有一天我们能做生意，你看起来挺可靠的。但目前我还不够了解你，所以等你有东西给我的时候再来吧。

en: Hope to see you again soon!
th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

en: Hope to see you again soon!
th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

en: Hope to see you again soon!
th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

en: Hope to see you again soon!
th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

en: Hope to see you again soon!
th: 希望很快能与你再见面！

en: Hope we could work together in the future, but now I've nothing to propose. But remember, my friend, a good book is like a portal to another world.
th: 希望我们能以后继续合作,现在我也没事情让你干了. 但请记住，我的朋友，一本好书就像一个通往另一个世界的门户。

en: How are preparations going? Take care of yourself and remember: if all else fails, retreating is not shameful.
th: 准备的怎么样了？保护好自己并记住:如果事情不对,撤退不是可耻的.

en: How do I know you're trustworthy?
How interesting! Where would my help come in?
th: 真有趣！哪里需要我的帮助？

en: How is it going my friend?
How is it going? Did you find the Padstow Elder?
th: 怎么样？你找到帕德斯托的长老了吗？

en: How is it going? Did you find the herbalist?
th: 怎么样？你找到草药师了吗？

en: How is it going? Did you foget the back road?
th: 怎么样？你忘记后路了吗？

en: How is it going? Did you manage to hunt the stag?
th: 怎么样？捕获到雄鹿了吗？

en: How is it going? Remember to keep an eye out for danger in the fields. Bandits, wolves, and boars like to roam through them just as much as we do.
th: 怎么样?在外面要时刻警惕周围.强盗,狼群,野猪到处都是.

en: How is it going? Remember, beware of boar!
th: 怎么样？要记住小心野猪！

en: How is it going? Remember, do not forage mushrooms you don't recognize. There’s some you can eat... but only once in your lifetime...
th: 怎么样？要记住,不要摘你不认识的蘑菇. 有些蘑菇你吃一次就会要了你的命...

en: How is it going? Send fisherman my best regards.
th: 怎么样？帮我向那些渔夫带个好.

en: How is your day? I did all I planned, so there's nothing new.
th: 你今天过得怎么样？我要做的事情都已经完成了，没有什么可干的了。

en: How much of each do you need?
Huh, no no,  that must be another person you're talking about.
th: 哈,不是,你说的肯定是其他人.

en: Huh, thanks for your help! I think I can rely on you. I want to rebuild my hall and but I need some resources. I need two simple cords, one thatch and one soft log. In return, I'll give you something usefull! What do you say, we've a deal?
th: 谢谢你的帮助! 我想我可以依靠你。我想重建我的大厅，但我需要一些资源。我需要两根简单的绳子，一根茅草和一根软木。作为回报，我将给你一些有用的东西! 你觉得怎么样？

en: Hunting tool and also simple ranged weapon.
th: 狩猎工具，也是简单的远程武器。

en: Hunts animals inhabiting the land. Periodically harvests raw meat, pelts and hides.
th: 猎杀居住在土地上的动物。定期收获生肉、皮毛和兽皮。

en: Hunts animals inhabiting the land. Periodically harvests raw meat, pelts and hides.
th: 猎杀居住在土地上的动物。定期收获生肉、皮毛和兽皮。
我同意最终用户许可协议

en: I be so glad thou returned. It means thou art not dead!
th: 你能活着回来真是太好了！

en: I believe you've a great future!
I believe you've a great future!
I believe you've a great future!
I believe you've a great future!
I believe you've a great future!
I believe you've got a great future ahead of you!
I can try to take care of them.
I can't believe those boars destroyed our crops again. They're becoming a real terror in these parts.
th: 我不能相信那些野猪又摧毁了我们的农作物。它们在成为这些地方的噩梦。

en: I can't believe those wolves attacked our livestock again. They're becoming a real terror in these parts
th: 我不能相信那些狼又袭击了我们的牲畜。它们在成为这些地方的噩梦。

en: I can't believe todays rumor about some handsome person enter our God forsaken settlement. Deep inside I hoped it was you! Don't you mind if I give you one request before we could sit down and I tell you all I know?
th: 今天竟然有人说有一个帅哥来我们这个破定居点了。我就知道会是你! 在我告诉你一切之前你不介意帮我个忙吧？

en: I can't tell you too much, but everything started 15 years ago when someone killed the young heir of the realm. His sister, our current Queen, claimed that a child from our region was responsible for the death. As you can imagine, the King was furious. He started looking for this child, but couldn't find them.
th: 我不能告诉你太多，但一切都始于15年前，有人杀死了王国的年轻继承人。他的妹妹，也就是我们现在的王后，声称是我们地区的一个孩子造成的死亡。你可以想象，国王非常愤怒。他开始寻找所说的这个孩子，但没找到。

en: I can’t imagine the pain he felt. What happened next?
th: 我难以想象他受到的痛苦.之后发生什么了？

en: I could use some help with taking wooden planks to Blackridgepool. They need them to fix one of their windmills. What do you think?
th: 我需要一些帮助，把木板送到黑脊池村。他们要修他们的一个风车。

en: I did. I’m going to build him a shelter of his own so we don’t have to try and fit in my shack.
th: 我做了。我要为他建造一个属于他自己的住所，这样我们就不用两个人挤一个小屋了。

en: I didn’t realize how much of a difference a meal could make.
th: 我没想过一顿饭能带来这么大的变化.
我可不相信运气这东西！

en: I don't even know you and you’re asking for my help? You haven't done much to earn it yet.
th: 我都不认识你,你还来让我帮你?先取得我信任再说吧.

en: I don't have the time for that.
I don't have the time for that.
I don't know what's worse: the constant darkness underground or the never-ending daylight up here.
th: 我不知道哪种情况更糟糕：是地下的持续黑暗，还是这里永无止境的日光。

en: I don't know who you are, and frankly, I don't really think I want to right now. I don't easily trust strangers.
th: 我不认识你,而且我也不想认识你.我可不相信陌生人.

en: I don't mean to offend you, but you don't strike me as the trustworthy type, given no one knows you. I think it's best if we keep our distance for the time being.
th: 我这么说不是针对你,但是你看起来不像是一个让人相信的人,尤其是在没人认识你的情况下.我觉得我们俩还是保持些距离比较好.

en: I don't trust you. What are you hiding?
th: 我不相信你。你在隐瞒什么？

en: I don’t think I can help you right now. Maybe in the future.
th: 现在不能帮你. 之后再说吧.

en: I have a lot to learn about the Lowlands and need some guidance.
th: 我需要了解一些关于低地的事,需要一些这方面的帮助.

en: I have a lot to learn about the Lowlands and need some guidance.
th: 我需要了解一些关于低地的事,需要一些这方面的帮助.

en: I have a proposition for you. Soon, we’ll be having a big Solstice party, and I want to make some money from it. Unfortunately, my companion is at the Capital and won’t be able to make it. Would you be my stand-in partner?
th: 我有个事情交给你. 我们马上就要庆祝至日了, 而我想趁机赚点钱. 不巧的是我的同伴还在首都不能来. 你要不要来帮忙?

en: I have a proposition for you: a quick delivery run to Padstow.
th: 我有件事儿找你: 送一份快递到帕德斯托.

en: I have nothing to offer you yet, stranger. That’ll probably change, if you show you’re worthy of trust.
th: 我现在没什么给你的,陌生人.你如果能证明你是值得信任的话事情可能就不一样了.

en: I have some business to take care of. As for the situation here, I’ve only heard whispers of how bad things have gotten.
th: 我有其他事要做.这里的糟糕情况我有些许耳闻.

en: I have some wooden planks for you from Padstow’s Merchant.
th: 我从帕德斯托的商人那边拿到一些木板给你.

en: I heard that  forests nearby are  places of shadows and secrets. Some say it's haunted by the ghosts of those who have died there.
th: 我听说附近的森林里的阴影藏有着不少秘密。有人说这里有死在那里的人的鬼魂在作祟。

en: I heard that pack of wolves has been attacking hikers on the trail. They're not afraid of anything. Maybe you can help us?
th: 我听说那群狼在山路上袭击了登山的人。它们什么都不怕。能帮帮我们吗？

en: I heard the Elder has been asking if there is anyone who could help him out with some things. You look like you could use some help yourself.
th: 我听说长老一直在问有没有人可以帮助他处理一些事情。你看起来也需要一些帮助。

en: I heard the new guy tried to strike it rich by mining for gold. He came back with a handful of clay and stone.
th: 我听说那个新来的家伙想通过挖金子发财。但他带着一把粘土和石头回来了。

en: I hereby confirm that I have read this document and I give my consent to the processing of my personal data.
th: 我在此确认，我已经阅读了本文件，并同意处理我的个人数据。

en: I hope one day we may live prosperous life as before!
th: 我希望有一天我们可以像以前一样过上富裕的生活！

en: I hope one day we may live prosperous life as before!
th: 我希望有一天我们可以像以前一样过上富裕的生活！

en: I hope one day we may live prosperous life as before!
th: 我希望有一天我们可以像以前一样过上富裕的生活！

en: I hope your camp is big enough for one more.
th: 希望你的营地能多容纳一个人.

en: I knew that you would manage to save us. Thank you!
th: 我就知道你会有办法救我们的.太感谢了！

en: I may not be the biggest or the strongest hunter in this village, but I can outsmart any animal out there. Just ask the rabbits.
th: 我可能不是这个村子里最高或最强壮的猎人，但我至少比外面的任何动物更聪明。你去问问那些兔子。

en: I need stag horns, would you help?
th: 我需要熊鹿角,你能帮我吗？

en: I need to check the recipe. Help yourself to a bowl of soup while I get my supplies in order.
th: 我需要看看那个配方.你先喝碗汤,我去准备下物资.

en: I never intended on being a vigilante, you know.
th: 我从来没有想过要成为一名义警。

en: I never thought I'd miss the sound of pickaxes until I retired from mining. Now, every time I hear someone chipping away at a clay rock, I get nostalgic.
th: 在我不当矿工之前，我从未想过我会怀念镐头的声音。现在，每当我听到有人在凿开粘土岩石时，我就会怀念。

en: I never thought I'd say this, but I miss the smell of clay. At least it was something familiar in this godforsaken village.
th: 我从未想过我会怀念起粘土的味道。至少在这个被上帝抛弃的村庄里，它是一种我熟悉的东西。

en: I remember the arrow and Augustus, was down, then everything went blank, my father face...
th: 我记得那支箭射死了奥古斯都，然后一切都变成了空白，我父亲的面孔...

en: I remember the day I caught a crap so big that it nearly snapped my line. It was a fierce battle, but I managed to outsmart the fish and bring it in. That was a proud moment for me.
th: 我记得有一天我钓到了一条大鱼，差点儿把我的鱼线都弄断了。经过一场激烈的角逐后我终于把它钓上来了。那就是我人生的高光.

en: I remember the time I caught a giant sturgeon in the river near mountains. It was so big, it nearly pulled me into the water. But after an hour-long fight, I finally reeled it in. It was the catch of a lifetime!
th: 我记得有一次我在山区附近的河里抓到一条巨大的鲟鱼。它是如此之大，几乎把我拉入水中。但经过一个小时的战斗，我终于把它钓了上来。那是我一生中最重要的一次捕获！

en: I saw a boar taking down a full-grown deer the other day. They're getting bolder and more dangerous.
th: 前几天我看到一只野猪干掉了一只成年的鹿。它们越来越大胆，越来越危险。

en: I see you're new here. Is there something you need help with?
th: 你是新来的吧.你需要什么帮助吗？

en: I shall search for him further. Good bye.
th: 我继续再找找. 再见.

en: I swear I’m not an enemy, just a weary traveler looking for a place to settle down. I’d be happy to help this village wherever possible.
th: 我真的没有敌意，就是一个疲惫的旅行者,想要找一个安稳的地方而已。我愿意尽我所能帮助这个村.

en: I thought I'll join with you?
I thought I'll join with you?
I tried to strike up a conversation with one of the clay ores yesterday. It didn't go well.
th: 我昨天试图与其中一个粘土矿进行对话。结果并不顺利。

en: I understand, come back when you have more time!
th: 我理解,你有时间再过来吧！

en: I understand, come back when you’re available
th: 我理解, 你有空的时候再来吧

en: I understand, come back when you’re available
th: 我理解, 你有空的时候再来吧

en: I understand, come when you'll have time!
th: 我明白了，等你有时间再来吧!

en: I understand, young one. You have your own journey to attend to. I'll try to find someone else who can help. Thank you for your time.
th: 我理解，年轻人。你有属于你自己的旅程。我去看看能不能找到其他人来帮忙。谢谢你的时间。

en: I understand, young one. You have your own journey to attend to. I'll try to find someone else who can help. Thank you for your time.
th: 我理解，年轻人。你有属于你自己的旅程。我去看看能不能找到其他人来帮忙。谢谢你的时间。

en: I understand. Hopefully next time you'll be able to help me!
th: 我理解.希望下次你能有时间帮我！

en: I used to admire boars from afar, but now I fear them. They're becoming a real problem.
th: 我曾经欣赏过远方的野猪，但现在我担心它们。他们成为一个真正的问题。

en: I used to think that life in a fishing village was dull, but I was wrong. Every day brings new adventures and new stories to tell.
th: 我曾经认为渔村的生活很枯燥，但我错了。每天都有新的冒险和新的故事可讲。

en: I want to protect my family, so I decided to armor my sons with simple short swords, would you help?
th: 我想要保护我的家人，所以我决定给我的儿子们配上简易短剑. 你能帮忙吗？

en: I want to protect my family, so I decided to armor my sons with spiked clubs, would you help?
th: 我想保护我的家人，所以我决定为我的儿子们准备几根带刺的木棒防身，你能帮忙吗？

en: I was terrified, but we succeeded.
th: 虽然很吓人但是我们成功了.

en: I'll find the money in no monet!
I'll help you find more iron.

I'm a cripple you now and helpend army with provision, she served as a medic. Ohh, I forget that I must meet traders from Padstow, better they don't see you. Don't you wan't to see your aunt, Helga? In the chidhood she nursed you, don't you remember?
th: 我现在是个瘸子，帮助军队提供补给，她当过医生。哦，对了，我必须去见帕德斯托的商人，他们最好不要见你。你不想看看你的姨妈吗，海尔格？小时候她照顾过你，你不记得了吗？

en: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you to do right now. But don't worry, I'm sure something will come up soon enough.
th: 现在可能没有什么你能干的活儿了。不过别担心，应该很快就会有了。

th: 现在可能没有什么你能干的活儿了。不过别担心，应该很快就会有了。

th: 现在可能没有什么你能干的活儿了。不过别担心，应该很快就会有了。

th: 现在可能没有什么你能干的活儿了。不过别担心，应该很快就会有了。

en: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you to do right now. Why don't you take some time to rest and relax, and maybe you'll have better luck next time.
th: 现在没你什么事。去休息和放松吧，也许下次就有你的活儿了。

en: I'm afraid I don't have anything for you to do right now. Why don't you take some time to rest and relax, and maybe you'll have better luck next time.
th: 现在没你什么事。去休息和放松吧，也许下次就有你的活儿了。

th: 现在没你什么事。去休息和放松吧，也许下次就有你的活儿了。

en: I'm afraid I have nowhere to stay.
I'm just glad I could be of assistance.
I'm looking for somewhere to stay, preferably in the Lowlands.
th: 我想找地方住，最好是在低地。

en: I'm pleased to have an apprentice like you! Now take this sword as my gift!
th: 我很高兴有一个像你这样的徒弟! 这把剑就送你了！

en: I'm sorry, I don't have time for that right now.
I'm sorry, but I don't have any quests for you at the moment.
th: 抱歉，目前没有任何任务.

en: I'm sorry, but I don't have any quests for you at the moment.
th: 抱歉，目前没有任何任务.

en: I'm sorry, but I don't have any quests for you at the moment.
th: 抱歉，目前没有任何任务.

en: I'm sorry, but I don't have any quests for you at the moment.
th: 抱歉，目前没有任何任务.

en: I'm sorry, but I don't have any work for you at the moment.
th: 抱歉，目前没有任何工作.

en: I'm sorry, but I just can't bring myself to trust you. You’re a stranger, and something about you doesn't feel right.
th: 抱歉,我不能就这么相信你.你是一个陌生人,让人感觉不是很舒服.

en: I'm sure I can manage that.
I've been mining for so long, I've started to see veins in everything. My wife says I need to take a break, but how can I when there's still gold left to be found?
th: 我挖了这么久的矿，导致现在看哪都像是矿脉了。我妻子说我需要休息一下，但我怎么能在还有金子可挖的时候休息呢？

en: I've heard rumors of people disappearing in the  forest near our village. I wouldn't go near it if I were you.
th: 我听说有人在我们村子附近的森林里失踪的传闻。我不建议你接近它。

en: I've heard talk that some hermit put up a crooked hut on the outskirts of the village. That must be you, I reckon?
th: 我听说有些逸民在村子的外围搭起了一座歪歪扭扭的小屋。我想，那一定是你吧？

en: I;m in dire need to arm my fellows, would you help?
th: 我急需武装好我的人,你能帮忙吗?

en: If it comes to that, I think I’d be up for the challenge.
th: 如果事情真要到那一步的话,我应该会准备好的.

en: If they didn't find this child then did they blame anyone?
th: 他们如果没有找到这个孩子的话,那么他们怪罪其他谁了吗？

en: If you keep this up, people might be inclined to follow you into your future endeavors. This may have been a small bandit camp, but with the right resources and recruits… hmmm. It would be risky, but you could start something great.
th: 如果你能继续这样下去,那么会有越来越多的人加入你的事业. 这虽然是一个小型强盗营,但是有了合适的资源和新兵的话...嗯.虽然有些风险,但是可能会有丰厚的回报.

en: If you want to hunt with us, you better be prepared to get your hands dirty. And your feet, and your face, and pretty much every other part of your body.
th: 如果你想和我们一起打猎，你最好做好弄脏你双手的准备。还有你的脚，你的脸，以及你身体的几乎所有其他部分。

en: If you want to settle down or do something useful, you should find an Elder of our village. I'm sure he will give you some direction and might even teach you something... perhaps you could help each other. Good luck. I hope for your success.
th: 如果你想定居下来或做一些有意义的事情，你应该找到我们村的长老。我相信他会给你一些指导，甚至可能教你一些东西......也许你们可以互相帮助。祝你好运。我希望你能成功。

en: If you're looking for a great hunt, you should definitely come to our village. We have some of the best hunting grounds in the land.
th: 如果你想好好享受狩猎的话，你一定要来我们村。我们拥有这片土地上最好的狩猎场。

en: If you’re interested in living here, then get to know the villagers. Might be best to stay clear of the bandits and the Court's soldiers for now, though. They cause trouble for everyone, especially strangers.
th: 如果你想住在这里的话就去认识一下村民吧。不过，现在最好是远离强盗和宫廷的士兵。他们会给人找麻烦，尤其是陌生人。

en: If you’re successful, you’ll fully have my trust. The rest of the village will also be very appreciative. You’d be smart to bring someone with you — your current volunteer isn’t much of a fighter. There are villagers that are more experienced with a weapon and would gladly join.
th: 事成之后我就会完全相信你了.村里的其他人也会非常感激. 你最好还是带上人跟你去 --你现在的那些人可能不怎么会打仗.有一些村民会使用武器,他们可能会很愿意加入你.

en: If you’re willing to help, I’ll provide you with some food and a place to sleep.
th: 如果你愿意帮忙，我可以为你提供一些食物和睡觉的地方。

en: If you’re willing to help, I’ll provide you with some food and a place to sleep.
th: 如果你愿意帮忙，我可以为你提供一些食物和睡觉的地方。

en: Improved Ballista shoots the same projectiles at a higher speed, with a somewhat lower turn rate and reload speed.
th: 加强弩炮能够以更快的发射速度发射炮弹，但是其转动率和弹药加载速度略低。

en: In our village, hunting is a serious business. Unless we're talking about hunting unicorns. Then it's just ridiculous.
th: 在我们村，打猎是一件严肃的事情。除非我们谈论的是猎杀独角兽。那就太可笑了。

en: In our village, hunting is a way of life. We've been honing our skills for generations and we're proud of our traditions.
th: 在我们村里，打猎是一种生活方式。我们世世代代都在磨练我们的技能，我们为我们的传统感到自豪。

en: In our village, we don't just hunt for food. We also hunt for sport. Like when we chase chickens around the village square for fun.
th: 在我们的村子里，我们不仅仅是为了食物而打猎。我们平时也狩猎作为游戏。比如我们在村里的广场上追着鸡玩。

en: Increase your reputation level in this region
th: 提升你在该地区的声望等级
对被狩猎过的动物的伤害增加

en: Increases Town Capacity by 6 Population by allowing villagers to live in your town. Requires food supply to keep villagers alive.
th: 通过允许村民居住在你的城镇，增加城镇容量6个人口。需要食物和水的供应来维持村民的生命。

en: Increases Town Capacity by 8 Population by allowing villagers to live in your town. Requires food and water supply to keep villagers alive.
th: 通过允许村民居住在你的城镇，增加城镇容量8个人口。需要食物和水的供应来维持村民的生命。

en: Increases the maximum number of mercs you can command at a time to 10
th: 将你一次可以指挥的最大佣兵数量增加到10人

en: Increases the maximum number of mercs you can command at a time to 15
th: 将你一次可以指挥的最大佣兵数量增加到15人

en: Increases the maximum number of mercs you can command at a time to 25
th: 将你一次可以指挥的最大佣兵数量增加到25人

en: Increases the maximum number of mercs you can command at a time to 35
th: 将你一次可以指挥的最大佣兵数量增加到35人

en: Increases the maximum number of mercs you can command at a time to 5
th: 将你一次可以指挥的最大佣兵数量增加到5人

en: Increases town storage capacity by 20 slots. Losing a Granary or access to it by losing a Town Tower will destroy the resources it was storing!
th: 增加城镇存储容量20个位置。一旦失去粮仓,或者因失去城楼而无法进入粮仓，里面所储存的资源也会消失。

en: Increases town storage capacity by 20 slots. Losing a Granary or access to it by losing a Town Tower will destroy the resources it was storing!
th: 增加城镇存储容量20个位置。一旦失去粮仓,或者因失去城楼而无法进入粮仓，里面所储存的资源也会消失。

en: Indeed it is. Maybe someday they’ll tire of the scraps we have to offer and will move on elsewhere.
th: 的确是这样。也许有一天，他们会看不上我们能提供的而转去其他地方。

en: Indeed. Not the most comfortable, but it beats sleeping on the road.
th: 的确.虽然不是特别舒服,但是总比躺在路边强.

en: Innkeep will cook basic meals. You can request a specific meal for additional Workforce.
th: 旅店老板会做基本的饭菜。你可以要求提供特定的膳食，以获得额外的劳动力。

en: Innkeep will cook basic meals. You can request a specific meal for additional Workforce.
th: 旅店老板会做基本的饭菜。你可以要求提供特定的膳食，以获得额外的劳动力。

en: Innkeep will cook basic meals. You can request a specific meal for additional Workforce.
th: 旅店老板会做基本的饭菜。你可以要求提供特定的膳食，以获得额外的劳动力。

en: Innkeep will cook basic meals. You can request a specific meal for additional Workforce.
th: 旅店老板会做基本的饭菜。你可以要求提供特定的膳食，以获得额外的劳动力。

en: Innkeep will cook basic meals. You can request a specific meal for additional Workforce.
th: 旅店老板会做基本的饭菜。你可以要求提供特定的膳食，以获得额外的劳动力。

en: Innkeep will cook basic meals. You can request a specific meal for additional Workforce.
th: 旅店老板会做基本的饭菜。你可以要求提供特定的膳食，以获得额外的劳动力。

en: Is that you? How long it was? Can't remember.My god, you've his face, still can't believe we lost that day.
th: 是你吗？已经过去多久了？我都不记得了.我的天啊,你和他真的好像,还是不敢相信我们那天输了.

en: Is there anyone in Lageland that doesn’t celebrate the longest day of the year in summer and shortest day of the year in winter?
th: 在拉格朗，人人都会庆祝夏季最长的一天以及冬季最短的一天.

en: Is there anything I could help you with?
Is there anything I could help you with?
Is this a short longblade, or a long shortblade?
th: 这是一把稍微短一些的长剑还是一把长一些的短剑？

en: It appears there are many full stomachs in your village today.
th: 看起来你们村今天基本都吃饱了.

en: It sounds really interesting. I think I haven't had a chance to celebrate it yet.
th: 听起来真有趣.我还没机会庆祝过它呢.

en: It was a better place, decades ago. Back when my grandfather was young. People were happier; had plenty to eat and enough to share with others who were not as fortunate. Now, we’re the region left to suffer the most throughout all of this. If we could leave, we would.
th: 几十年前，那是一个幸福的地方。在我祖父年轻的时候。人们更快乐；食物也充足到大家愿意与穷人分享。现在，我们是余下的地区中受苦最深的之一。我们根本逃离不了这里.

en: It's a good day for fishin' ain't it?
th: 不错的钓鱼天气不是吗？

en: It's a tough life here in the village, but we're a tight-knit community. Forgive us if we’re not very warm to a strange face.
th: 村里的生活虽然很艰难，但我们是一个紧密的整体。请原谅我们对陌生面孔不是很热情。

en: It's a wonderful reminder of the changing of the seasons and the power of the natural world. I'm obsessed with it. And since the Solstice is fast approaching, I’m making an elixir from mushrooms and herbs. This potion is known for its healing properties, and is especially useful for curing ailments of the respiratory system. It also has some…special properties that change how you see the world for a period of time. Many will pay me a visit in the coming days to pick one up. In fact, I have so much to prepare that I can’t leave my pot; the boiling process must be closely monitored. Though, I’m running low on a few ingredients. Say, could you help me?
th: 它昭示着季节的变化, 也展示了大自然的力量。我对它很着迷。由于至日即将来临，我正在用蘑菇和草药制作一种灵药。这种药水以其治疗特性而闻名，对治疗呼吸系统的疾病特别有用。它还具有一些......特殊的特性，能在一段时间内改变你对世界的看法。在接下来几天，许多人会为此来拜访我。我有很多东西要准备，远离不了这口锅；沸腾的过程必须被密切关注。不过，我的一些原料已经不多了。你能帮帮我吗？

en: It's streamlined shape is built for speed, making it a favorite among pirates. It's elevated deck doesn't sport much space for large weapons, but it's height allows for easy boarding of other walkers. Dedicated rear-facing spots for Gun Pods make it easy to fire projectiles at pursuers.
th: 流线型的设计所带来的极速体验，成为海盗们的最爱。虽然高立的空间无法容纳大型的武器，但是它的高度却适宜船员迅速登上其他的翼行者。尾部有专门的空间留给机炮，便于朝追击的敌人发射抛射物。

en: It's streamlined shape is built for speed, making it a favorite among pirates. It's elevated deck doesn't sport much space for large weapons, but it's height allows for easy boarding of other walkers. Dedicated rear-facing spots for Gun Pods make it easy to fire projectiles at pursuers.
th: 流线型的设计所带来的极速体验，成为海盗们的最爱。虽然高立的空间无法容纳大型的武器，但是它的高度却适宜船员迅速登上其他的翼行者。尾部有专门的空间留给机炮，便于朝追击的敌人发射抛射物。

en: Items you can directly use and wear
th: 可以直接穿上或者能直接使用的道具

en: It’s an honor to know you!
It’s hard trying to grow roots in a new place. Are you able to help me?
th: 万事开头难.你能帮帮我吗？

en: It’s hard trying to grow roots in a new place. Are you able to help me?
th: 万事开头难.你能帮帮我吗？

en: It’s not often that a stranger comes here. Do you need assistance?
th: 陌生人这儿可不常见.你需要什么帮助吗？

en: I’ll be happy to help you.
I’ll be sure to keep that in mind.
I’ll be sure to stay aware of my surroundings.
th: 我会注意对周围保持警惕的.

en: I’ll do whatever is asked of me if it will earn your trust.
th: 为了能得到你的信任,我愿意做任何事.

en: I’ll investigate and talk with people that could be willing to help.
th: 我去和村民谈谈,调查一下顺便看看有没有人帮忙.

en: I’ll make sure to read it carefully. See you later!
I’ll make sure we have everything we need.
th: 我会确保准备好一切所需的东西.

en: I’ll see what I can do.
th: 我看看我能做些什么吧.

en: I’m busy at the moment, but maybe next time.
th: 我现在很忙,下次再说吧.
我很高兴听到这个消息!
我马上就要去帕德斯托了.

en: I’m not looking for extra work.
I’m not sure I should help you right now.
I’m trying to get settled here and could use some help.
th: 我正想着在这里定居呢, 有人帮忙的话那就太好了.

en: I’m trying to get settled here and could use some help.
th: 我正想着在这里定居呢, 有人帮忙的话那就太好了.

en: I’m working on gathering equipment for me and a fighter to use, including some provisions. I’ll keep retreating in mind and come back to you when everything is over.
th: 我在收集我和一个战士使用的装备以及供给。我先撤退，等一切都结束了再来找你。

en: I’ve got this booze called “Solstice Delirium”. It’s a special concoction of Solstice elixir and a secret spice. Take care to not drink more than two if you want any memory of the day.
th: 我有一种叫 "至日狂乱 "的酒。这是一种特殊的至日灵药和一种秘密香料的混合物。如果你不想在这样的一天断片的话, 注意不要喝超过两杯。

en: I’ve had an increase in tool orders these days, and need a surplus of wood and stone to keep up with demand. Could you collect those materials for me so I can focus on finishing what I’m working on?
th: 这几天制作工具的订单增加了,所以需要更多的木材与石头.你能帮忙吗?我走不开.

th: 熟练铁匠将为你制作简单的武器、装备和材料。

en: Mesmerizing to watch as they catch the wind, these intricate wings boast more power and efficiency than standard wings. Their horizontal, low profile design make them smaller targets for incoming projectiles, and at the same time allow nomads to shoot over them.
th: 乘风而起的翼部如同一道靓丽的景色。这些翼部架构复杂，但与标准的翼部相比，却能够带来更多的动力和效率。这些翼部的水平低调设计得以让翼部不易成为来袭的抛射物所命中的目标，与此同时，也能让游民趴在翼部上面进行射击。

th: 你现在准备好面对这个世界了!拿去吧！我会教你如何制作你第一个房子的设计图.

en: Of course! I'll be on my way.
Of course! I'll be on my way.
Of course, I will bring it to you in no time.
th: 当然,我会尽快把它带过来的.

en: Of course, I will bring those to you in no time.
th: 当然,我会尽快把它们带过来的.

en: Of course, what can I do for you?
th: 当然,有什么能帮到你的吗？

en: Offer help to the people of Haerndean to earn their trust.
th: 帮助海恩丁村民以获得信任.

en: Oh, I have plenty. For example, I know how to read the water - I can tell where the fish are hiding just by looking at the ripples on the surface. And I know how to use different baits and lures to attract different types of fish. And I'm patient - I can sit for hours, waiting for the perfect moment to strike. But the most important thing is that I respect the fish. I don't just see them as a means to an end - I appreciate their beauty and their role in the ecosystem.
th: 哦，我有很多诀窍。比如，我知道如何观察水面--我可以通过观察水面上的波纹就知道鱼藏在哪里。我还知道如何使用不同的鱼饵和诱饵来吸引不同类型的鱼。而且我很有耐心--我可以坐上几个小时，等待完美的时机。但最重要的是，我尊重鱼。我不只是把它们看作是达到目的的手段--我欣赏它们的美和它们在生态系统中的作用。

en: Oh, am I glad to see you! We're in need of these planks to finish the repairs.
th: 你真是来得太及时了！我们急需这些木板修东西呢.

en: Oh, right. I'll be back soon.
Oh, right. I'll be back soon.
Oh, that’ll be appreciated. He was relying on the kindness of others to keep a roof over his head, so you’ll be giving him great comfort.
th: 那就太谢谢了.他一直都靠着其他人活着,所以你帮了他大忙了.

en: Oh, you bring it all to me. Yes, take the bag with bites but the bites themsleves is not the main issue in capturing fish like that.
th: 哦交给我就好.把那袋鱼饵拿走吧.但是仅仅有鱼饵是钓不上那样的鱼的.

en: Oh, you brut, don't joke with me, I played with you as a child and I know those eyes, you can't forget. By the way, whole village is already talking about you came back!
th: 哦，你这小子，别跟我开玩笑了，我小时候和你一起玩，你那双眼睛谁都忘不了。顺便说一句，整个村子都在谈论你回来了！

en: Oh, you're a filthy one. Been rolling in the mud with the goats? Check with the Elder and perhaps he can help you out.
th: 你怎么浑身这么脏啊。和山羊一起在泥地里打滚了吗？去问问长老，也许他能帮你解决。

en: Ohh I see that you grow up faster than expected, people are so I'll have some proposition for you. I k
th: 你成长的比我预想的要快，我有些事情找你.

en: Ohh you returned, how is Helga?
th: 哦你回来了啊, 海尔格怎么样了？

en: Ohh, I uderstand, please come visit me when you finish!
th: 哦，我明白了，等你完成后请来拜访我吧!

en: Ohh, it is that time of year, isn’t it? Did he give you the secret spice?
th: 又到每年的那一天了啊？他给你那秘密香料了吗？

en: Ohh, lets see your corrupted sould!,
th: 让我来看看你腐朽的灵魂！

en: Ohh, nice to see you back!
Ohh, nice to see you! Did the merchant Ketyl Hamnet send you? We made great money last fall and he promised to send me a full report!
th: 很高兴见到你！是那个叫基德哈姆尼特的商人叫你来的吗？我们去年秋天赚了不少钱,他答应说要给我一份完整的报告!

en: Ohh, there they're, just put them in, proper temperature and density! Can you smell it? Yes! Take it! How it tastes?
th: 啊,在这里啊. 把它们放进去就可以了,注意密度,然后加热到合适的温度！你闻到了吗？没错！服用下去! 味道怎么样？

en: Ohh, you've got the booze! Great work, my friend. Here’s a reward for your help.
th: 哦你拿到酒了啊！做得好,我的朋友. 这是你应得的奖励.

en: One of the oldest walker designs, the caravelas provided mobile homes that an entire family could live on while chasing after the temperate climate. A large cargo hold affords tons of cargo space, and a wide open deck provides enough room for nomads to stretch their legs and build freely. The heavy weight of the caravela makes it less maneuverable.
th: 斯美特林的翼行者设计，是最远古之一。他们设计的翼行者是一座移动的房子，既能够整个家庭的成员都居住在里面，也能够朝着 温暖气候的地方移动。大型的底部货舱可以提供大量的货舱空间，宽广的甲板空间则为游民提供了伸展手脚和自由建造的场所。不过斯美特林设计出来的翼行者重量极大，操作性偏低。

en: Our village is forever grateful for how thou hast helped us. If it is true thither I am needeth, just asketh. I will be an old man, and I've learned a lot during my time on this Earth. There are many villages in this valley that could useth a brave sir liketh yourself..  Prithee travel south to Padstow.  Mine cousin is the elder there, say to him I sent thee and he shall welcome thee with open arms
th: 我们村永远感谢你对我们的帮助。如果你需要我的帮助请尽管开口。我已经是个老人了，但已经学到了很多东西。这个山谷里有很多村庄都需要像你这样勇敢的人。 请向南走到帕德斯托。 我的表哥是那里的长者，对他说我派你来的，他将张开双臂欢迎你。

en:
Place flammable materials (for example wood) in the center slot to light the campfire. 

Add raw ingredients into the left container and select a recipe to craft. Hold SHIFT to craft multiple recipes. 

Some items, like water, require you to equip a bottle before you can transport them. You can still drink it via RIGHT CLICK. 

More recipes can be unlocked in the Tech Tree.
th:
放入可燃物（比如木头）在中间槽可以点燃营火

添加原材料到左侧容器内并点击中间的按钮便可以开始进行制作。按住 SHIFT 可以制作多份。
 
一些物品，比如水，需要你持有一个瓶子后才能取走。当然你还是可以按下鼠标右键来直接喝掉。

更多的图纸可以在科技树里解锁。

th: 那么，你有来自海恩丁商人的完整报告吗?

th: 所以你把那个长老的秘密挖出来了？

th: 那么是什么阻止了你去寻找它呢？

en: Soaps are surfactants usually used for washing, bathing, and other types of housekeeping
th: 肥皂是一种表面活性剂，通常用于洗涤、洗澡和其他类型的家务。

en: Some people say that life in a fishing village is tough, but they're missing the point. It may be hard work, but it's also incredibly rewarding.
th: 有些人说，渔村的生活很艰难，但他们体会不到这艰辛中的满足感。

en: Some people think fishing is boring, but they've obviously never tried it. Trust me, there's nothing like the thrill of feeling that tug on your line.
th: 有些人认为钓鱼很无聊，但他们显然没有尝试过。相信我，没有什么比感受到鱼线被拉动更有快感的了。

en: Some people think that farming is boring, but they've obviously never tried it. Trust me, there's never a dull moment on the farm.
th: 有些人认为耕作很无聊，但他们显然没有尝试过。相信我，农场里永远不会有无聊的时刻。

en: Some people think that hunting is cruel, but they don't understand. We're not just killing animals, we're sustaining our way of life.
th: 有些人认为打猎很残忍，但他们不理解。我们不仅仅是在狩猎动物，我们是在维持我们的生活方式。

en: Some villages are more cautious around strangers, but we’re not like that.
th: 有些村庄在陌生人面前比较谨慎，但我们可不是。

en: Sometimes life creates surprising paths for us. You’re doing a good thing for a place you have no ties to, and that’s admirable.
th: 生活有时候是妙不可言的.你明明是个外来人还帮了这么大的忙,真是太让人敬佩了.

en: Sorry, I don't have any task for you now. Safe travels, don't forget to stop by and add some of my books to your collection next time you're near.
th: 抱歉，我现在没有任何任务给你。一路顺风，下次你再来别忘了买些我的书。

en: Sorry, I'm not looking for any trouble.
Sorry, It's very interesting but I need to go.
th: 抱歉,虽然很有趣但是我还有事.

en: Sorry, I’m busy. Go find the village Elder, he should be able to help you.
th: 对不起，我很忙。去找村里的长老，他应该能帮助你。

en: Stags can be found in the forested areas nearby. They're relatively common, so you shouldn't have too much trouble finding one. Just be careful, they can be quite skittish and may run away if they detect your presence. Once you have the horns, bring them back to me and I'll reward you, not only with coins but with my knowledge too.
th: 在附近的森林地区可以找到雄鹿。它们比较常见，所以你应该不会有太大的问题。只是要小心，它们可能很胆小，如果发现你的存在可能会逃跑。一旦你拿到角，把它们带回来给我，我会给你奖励，不仅是硬币，还有我的知识。

en: Thank thee, traveler, this shall help many people.  Art  thou hither  to help us? This climature is a dangerous one, full of bandits, thieves, and under attack from neighboring warlords.  Thou won’t  crave  to keep alone long. Take this coin and find some help. There are hermits all throughout these woods.
th: 谢谢你，旅行者，这将帮助许多人。 你是来帮助我们的吗？这个地方很危险，到处都是强盗和小偷，还受到邻国军阀的攻击。 你不会渴望一个人呆很久的。拿着这枚硬币去找人帮忙吧。这片树林里到处都有逸民.

Thank you to the over 3,000 people that helped beta test Last Oasis ahead of our Early Access launch. Getting a game ready to release into EA is no small feat, and we wouldn’t have been able to do it without your critique and dedication.

Thank you to our Discord Moderation team, both current and past, for all their support and hard work:
th:
感谢超过3000人在我们的Early Access发布之前帮助测试了《最后的绿洲》。让一个游戏准备好发布到EA不是一件小事，如果没有你们的评点和奉献，我们就无法做到这一点。

th: 谢谢你,请给我带来7份肉.

en: Thank you, thank you. You saved my life!
th: 谢谢,太谢谢了.你救了我的命!

en: Thank you, thank you. You saved us!
th: 谢谢,太谢谢了.你救了我们的命!

en: Thank you, thank you. You saved us!
th: 谢谢,太谢谢了.你救了我们的命!

en: Thank you. I'll keep that in mind.
Thank you. It was my pleasure to help.
th: 谢谢你。我很高兴能提供帮助。

en: Thank you. Your words are very kind. Good bye.
Thanks for your great help, come to see me later, now I've no tasks to offer.
th: 谢谢你帮大忙了,过一阵子再来找我吧,我现在没有任务给你了.

en: Thanks so bring me please Thatch, softlog, pelt and simple cord.
th: 谢谢你, 请帮我带来茅草,软木头以及简易绳子.

en: Thanks! Hopefully I’ll be seeing more of you soon!

th: 谢谢,我很快就会来见你的.

en: That large camp of bandits has been stationed at an outpost down the main road for months, robbing merchants and sending raiding parties to local villages. Clearing out that camp will reduce the violence on the road and make the area safer for everyone. It would be best to find a few others for assistance. You should all be well equipped and prepared for a fight.
th: 那一大帮强盗已经在大路上的一个前哨驻扎了几个月，到处抢劫商人与附近村庄。清理掉他们所在的营地会让这个地方更安全。最好能找到其他人帮你并装备好进行战斗。
这听起来没有必要那么残忍。

en: That's a lot to ask. I don't have the time right now, but I'll keep it in mind.
th: 这有些难办,我现在没时间.但是我会记住的.

en: That's a shame. I hope you reconsider.
th: 这很令人失望，我希望你能重新考虑一下。

en: That's disappointing, but I understand. I hope you'll reconsider.
th: 虽然这很令人失望，但我理解。我希望你能重新考虑一下。

en: That's really admirable. Fisherman said that you may have a special bite for catching Golden Trout. Is that right?
th: 这真是令人钦佩. 有渔民说你有捕捉金鳟鱼的特殊鱼饵。是真的吗？

en: That's the worst part of the story. The King, with all his pain, ordered the death of every child matching the description of the one they were looking for. Before everything started, a fine hunter and his allies led the rebellion with a large group of villagers. Soon, bells were heard across the Lowlands.
th: 这是故事中最糟糕的部分。国王不得不下令杀死每一个符合他们描述的孩子。在屠杀发生之前，一名优秀的猎人和他的盟友与一大群村民一起开始了叛乱。很快，整个低地响起了钟声。

en: That’s quite a bit to process.
The Court's soldiers? Why are they here?
th: 宫廷士兵？他们在这里干嘛？

en: The Elder must be somewhere in the village. Don't let the soldiers spot us talking.
th: 长老一定在村子里的某个地方。不要让士兵发现我们的谈话。

en: The Padstow merchant Cyrus Hewe sent me to you. He asked me to bring back a batch of Solstice booze.
th: 帕德斯托商人赛勒斯-休让我来找你。他让我给他带回去一批至日酒。

en: The best way to see at night
th: 晚上看东西的最佳方式

en: The brigands, as we typically call them, are here at Lord Aothram’s orders. He’s the one that oversees the Lowlands, and likes to flex his control by having his brutes constantly patrol villages. They make our lives difficult, especially when the time to collect taxes for the Crown comes around.
th: 我们通常称他们为 "强盗"，他们是听从奥特朗勋爵的命令来的。他是监管低地的人，喜欢通过让他的畜生不断巡逻村庄来彰显他的控制。这帮强盗使我们的生活变得艰难，特别是当为王室收税的时候。

en: The canine teeth, can be 2.5 inches long and are used for puncturing and gripping their prey. Traders probably be interested in them
th: 犬齿，可以有2.5英寸长，用于刺穿和抓取它们的猎物。商人可能会收购.

en: The canine teeth, can be 2.5 inches long and are used for puncturing and gripping their prey. Traders probably be interested in them
th: 犬齿，可以有2.5英寸长，用于刺穿和抓取它们的猎物。商人可能会收购.

en: The control mechanism required to drive more complex walkers.
th: 操纵更复杂的翼行者所需要的控制结构。

en: The dried, flowering part of the hop plant
th: 酒花植物的干燥、开花部分

en: The fibers of this ancient plant have been used to make cloth, rope and some hermit buidings.
th: 这种古老植物的纤维被用来做布、绳子和一些逸民建筑。

en: The iron can be found in the nearby river. It looks like stone, but has red colour. Be aware of hostile animals and robbers that might be wandering around.
th: 铁可以在附近的河流中找到。它看起来像石头，但颜色是红色的。要注意可能在周围徘徊的凶猛动物和强盗。

en: The more you know, the more confident you become. And with confidence comes the power to make better decisions and take calculated risks. I can help you with that for a fair price, take a look at my book collection.
th: 你知道的越多便会越有信心,这样才会做出更正确的决定与承担精心细算后的风险.我这里的书价格不错,来瞧瞧我的收藏吧.

en: The object is too close to lithium deposit.
The only thing better than a good harvest is a good harvest with friends. And in this village, we've got plenty of both.
th: 唯一比美好的采集更美好的事情是与朋友一起采集。而在这个村子里，我们有很多这样的朋友。

en: The only thing better than a good hunt is a good hunt with friends. And in this village, we've got plenty of both.
th: 唯一比美好的狩猎更美好的事情是与朋友一起狩猎。而在这个村子里，我们有很多这样的朋友。

en: The original wings Nomads designed for their walkers ages ago.
th: 游民在很久以前为他们的翼行者设计的原始翅膀。

en: The proxy walker is designed to establish a protectorate over an oasis by deploying into an unmovable claim, provided that its owner possesses an official proxy license from the Flotilla. Can only be deployed while an oasis is unclaimed or contested and only becomes the claimant after no other deployed proxy walkers are left standing.
th: 代理翼行者被设计成用来占领一块绿洲的。当然，它需要有官方的代理证才能生效。因此它只能用在没有被占领或者在被争夺的绿洲上。只有一台代理翼行者可以占领一块绿洲。

en: The secret spice was originally found in the Northern part of our kingdom. My old friend Herald buys me a case every year. All I know is that it’s used by the shamans of the North to invoke the spiritual world. Take this pouch and deliver it to our Herbalist, Aleks Amonite. He’s the one that brews the booze.
th: 这种秘密香料最初是在我们王国的北部地区发现的。我的老朋友赫拉德每年都会给我买一箱。我听说它被北方的巫师用于进入精神世界。拿着这个袋子，把它交给我们的草药师，阿莱克斯-阿莫尼特。他是酿酒的人。

en: The standard merchant's vessel built for outrunning pirates and getting the goods where they need to go. There's no room for weapons, so this walker is usually accompanied by at least one battle-capable walker on its transport runs.
th: 这艘标准翼行者是专门为通商的商人制造的，移动速度比海盗翼行者快，能够确保商人的货物安全抵达目的地。由于商用翼行者不具备存放武器的空间，所以前往目的地的路途中通常会有另外一架武装翼行者提供保护。

en: The standard merchant's vessel built for outrunning pirates and getting the goods where they need to go. There's not much room for weapons, so this walker is usually accompanied by at least one battle-capable walker on its transport runs.
th: 这艘标准翼行者是专门为通商的商人制造的，移动速度比海盗翼行者快，能够确保商人的货物安全抵达目的地。由于商用翼行者不具备存放武器的空间，所以前往目的地的路途中通常会有另外一架武装翼行者提供保护。

en: The wolves are getting out of control. We need to do something before someone gets hurt.
th: 狼群正在失去控制。我们需要在有人受伤之前做些什么。

en: Then how can I help you? I don’t have much time till another patrol comes by. They don't like it when people from the village are talking to strangers.
th: 我该怎么帮你？巡逻的就要来了. 他们不喜欢陌生人与村民说话.

en: There is nothing more delightful than a scent of freshly baked bread in the morning.
th: 没有什么比清晨新鲜出炉的面包的香味更令人心旷神怡的了。

en: There is nothing more delightful than a scent of freshly baked bread in the morning.
th: 没有什么比清晨新鲜出炉的面包的香味更令人心旷神怡的了。

en: There is nothing more delightful than a scent of freshly baked bread in the morning.
th: 没有什么比清晨新鲜出炉的面包的香味更令人心旷神怡的了。

en: There is nothing more delightful than a scent of freshly baked bread in the morning.
th: 没有什么比清晨新鲜出炉的面包的香味更令人心旷神怡的了。

en: There was a rebellion some years back. After, the late King stationed soldiers in every town and village.
th: 前些年有一场叛乱。之后，先王在每个城镇和村庄都派驻了士兵。

en: There was a time when we would have been excited to see a new face. But that was a long, long time ago that most of us either can’t remember or didn’t exist for. A lot has changed since then.
th: 以前我们也是热情好客的.但是那是很久很久之前了,我们那时还很小,甚至有些人还未出生.时境变迁啊.

en: There’s still so much of the Lowlands for me to see. I’ll travel around and learn more about Karvenia. Maybe I’ll meet others willing to help me.
th: 在低地我还有很多地方没有探索过呢.我会到处看看然后了解更多有关卡文尼亚的知识.或许还能认识几个愿意帮我的人.

en: These are tough times we live in, but a bit of coin can still buy you some comfort.
th: 虽然我们生活的很苦，但一点钱还是可以为你买到一些安慰。

en: These are tough times we live in, but a bit of coin can still buy you some comfort.
th: 虽然我们生活的很苦，但一点钱还是可以为你买到一些安慰。

en: These are tough times we live in, but a bit of coin can still buy you some comfort.
th: 虽然我们生活的很苦，但一点钱还是可以为你买到一些安慰。

en: These bandits look stronger than others. Should be careful, but the reward might cost the risk.
th: 这些土匪看起来比其他的强。要小心,但是奖励足够丰厚。

en: These towering wings harness the power of the wind to push the walker forward. They are not discreet and generally make good target practice for enemies.
th: 这些高耸的翼部借助风力来推动翼行者前进，不过隐蔽性差，极其容易成为敌人的目标。

en: These versatile legs can step over fissures, climb rocky mountains, and ford fast flowing rivers. While not very protected, they're light and cheap to construct.
th: 这些功能多样的腿部可以立足于裂缝之上、攀爬上崎岖的山峰、淌过急速的河流。虽然这些部件的保护措施有限，但是重量轻，制造的耗费少。
