en: They say the first rule of mining is to never start a cave-in. The second rule is to never talk about the first rule.
th: 他们说，采矿的第一条规则是永远不要从洞窟内部开始。第二条规则是永远不要谈论第一条规则。

en: They won’t be a nuisance for much longer.
th: 他们不会胡作非为太久了.

en: Thick Combat Boots with Woolen Lining
th: 羊毛衬里的厚实战斗靴

en:
This Ancient Fabricator restores Fragments to valuable Knowledge Tablets and can produce advanced materials like Reinforced Planks.

Fill the center slot with Torque until it's full.

Add Fragments into the left container and click the button in the middle to start crafting. 100 Fragments and 400 Torque is guaranteed to produce 1 Tablet. Using less of either is a gamble. 

The crafting takes a long time and can't be stopped, so prepare to defend yourself in case enemies approach.

This station can only be used once - larger Fabricators allow crafting higher quantities of tablets simultaneously.
th:
这个远古制作台可以将数块碎片还原成价值连城的知识石板。并能生产出强化木板等高级材料。

用矩力将中间的槽填满。

将碎片放入左侧的容器中并点击中间的按钮开始制作。100块碎片和400矩力可以保证制作出1块石板。放少了任何一样都是一场赌博。

制作需要很长时间而且不能中断，请小心敌人趁机而入。这个工作台只能使用一次--更大的制作台可以同时制作更多的石板。"

en:
This Ancient Fabricator restores Fragments to valuable Knowledge Tablets. 

Fill the center slot with Torque until it's full.

Add Fragments into the left container and click the button in the middle to start crafting. 100 Fragments and 1000 Torque is guaranteed to produce 1 Tablet. Using less of either is a gamble. 

The crafting takes a long time and can't be stopped, so prepare to defend yourself in case enemies approach.
th:
这个远古制作台可以将数块碎片还原成价值连城的知识石板。

用矩力将中间的槽填满。

将碎片放入左侧的容器中并点击中间的按钮开始制作。100块碎片和1000矩力可以保证制作出1块石板。放少了任何一样都是一场赌博。

制作需要很长时间而且不能中断，请小心敌人趁机而入。

en: This book contains valuable knowledge. Can be used to extend skills of you or your settlers
th: 本书包含有价值的知识。可以用来扩展您或您的定居者的技能

en: This character has a broken arm - his fighting and production capabilities are significantly reduced
th: 这个角色的胳膊断了--他的战斗力和生产能力都大大降低了

en: This character has a broken leg - his speed and mobility are significantly reduced!
th: 该角色腿断了--他的速度和行动力都大大降低了!

en: This character has a head injury - confusion and pain significantly reduce his fighting and production capabilities!
th: 这个角色的头部受伤了--头晕和疼痛大大降低了他的战斗力和生产能力!

en: This character has a punctured lung - he struggles to catch his breath and is mobility is significantly reduced.
th: 这个角色的肺部被刺穿--喘气困难，行动能力明显下降。

en: This character has an arrow in the eye - his fighting and production capabilities are significantly reduced!
th: 这个角色眼睛中箭了--他的战斗力和生产能力都大大降低!

en: This character has broken ribs - his mobility is significant impacted and he struggles to take deep breaths!
th: 这个角色的肋骨断了--他的行动能力受到很大的影响，深呼吸也很困难！

en: This character has but a flesh wound.
Those bandits could have some valuable items hidden...
th: 这些土匪可能会隐藏一些有价值的物品...

en: Those bandits could have some valuable items hidden...
th: 这些土匪可能会隐藏一些有价值的物品...

en: Those bandits could have some valuable items hidden...
th: 这些土匪可能会隐藏一些有价值的物品...

en: Those damn bandits are a thorn in our side. If only they were the worst group you could cross paths with throughout the Lowlands.
th: 那些该死的土匪是我们的眼中钉。如果他们是你在整个低地能遇到的最糟糕的一帮家伙就好了。

en: Through the process of boiling the leather, the boots become much stronger and sturdier in battle.
th: 通过煮制皮革的过程，靴子在战斗中变得更加结实和坚固。

en: Tied down rupu that throws specially made rupu rocks at intruders. Precise and deadly when the target is close, but very wasteful at longer distances, making it a perfect defense inside a base.
th: 被绑住的露普，可以向入侵者投掷特制的露普石块。当目标接近时，投掷会变得精确而致命，但在较远的距离上非常浪费，这使其成为基地内的完美防御。

en: To invite people to your town you have to provide housing first.
th: 想要邀请人们到你的城镇，你必须首先提供住房。
特波甘翼行者重型机翼
特波甘翼行者大型机翼
特波甘翼行者中型机翼
特波甘翼行者小型机翼

en: Trading is going good, hope you'll be a part of my team one day. Remember, a good book can be a lifeline, a comfort, and a source of hope in difficult times.
th: 交易正在有条不紊的进行，希望有一天你能成为我团队的一员。请记住，一本好书可能会拯救你，是安慰，是困难时期的希望之源。

en: Train your villagers as levies by providing Workforce and equipment, then hire them as mercenaries.
th: 通过提供劳动力和设备，将你的村民训练成征兵，然后雇用他们作为佣兵。

en: Train your villagers as levies by providing Workforce and equipment, then hire them as mercenaries.
th: 通过提供劳动力和设备，将你的村民训练成征兵，然后雇用他们作为佣兵。

en: Triggers a small explosion when a nomad steps on the tripwire.
th: 游民踩到陷阱上的时候会触发小型爆炸。

en: Trousers with additional protection provided for the knees with a strong boiled leather.
th: 带有用坚固的煮沸皮革为膝盖提供额外保护的裤子。

en: Turns animal skins and pelts into useful materials. You can request a specific product for additional Workforce.
th: 将动物的皮和毛皮变成有用的材料。或者你可以通过消耗更多的劳动力来专一生产一种特定的材料。

泰莫特乌斯'朱西'-塔尔纳夫斯基

en: Uncomfortable bed that's good for occasional respawn.
th: 虽然这床不舒服,但是偶尔重生用还是不错的

en: Unfortunately, I can't help you today. Maybe next time.
th: 不巧的是我今天没法帮你.下次吧.

en: Unload a volley of high-precision darts that are deadly against lightly armored targets. Ineffective against walkers and structures.
th: 发射出一圈精准的齐射飞镖，给轻甲单位造成致命伤害。对于翼行者和建筑效果十分有限。

en: Unlocks mining stone and simple metals.
th: 解锁开采石头和简单金属。

en: Up for a pint of white beer?
Upscaled wings that are better at generating force for walker movement.
th: 更高级的翼部可以给翼行者移动产生更大的助力。

en: Use Workforce to man the tower and supply arrows to shoot at enemies nearby.
th: 使用劳动力来管理塔楼，并提供箭矢来射杀附近的敌人。

en: Use them to acquire technology from village elders or call in other aid from your supporters.
th: 可以用它们从村里的长老那里获得科技，或从你的支持者那里调用其他援助。

en: Used as currency in trade all over the country.
th: 在全国各地的贸易中作为货币使用。

en: Used as currency in trade all over the country.
th: 在全国各地的贸易中作为货币使用。

en: Used for building town structures. Can be used as weapon but inefficiently.
th: 用来建造城镇的建筑.也可以用来当做不怎么好用的武器使用.

en: Used for decorative purposes. Ties any room together.
th: 装饰用.可以将任何空间连起来

en: Used in crafting of equipment and other useful things.
th: 用于制作装备和其他有用的东西。

en: Used in crafting of equipment and other useful things.
th: 用于制作装备和其他有用的东西。

en: Used in many recipes. Can be produced from wood fibres.
th: 在许多图纸中使用。可以用木质纤维中生产出来。

en: Used in many recipes. Can be produced from wood fibres.
th: 在许多图纸中使用。可以用木质纤维中生产出来。

en: Using a technology discovered during an expedition to a city in the sky, the Raptor Sky Walker is the first of its kind created by Nomads. Allows to soar in the sky like a leaf on the wind using torque for flapping its wings.
th: 猛龙天翼行者使用的是在对天空中的城市进行考察时发现的技术，是游民创造的第一个同类产品。可以让它像风中的树叶一样在天空中翱翔，使用矩力来拍打机翼。

en: Using repeater ammo to shoot,  this feat of engineering was created on the Flotilla and can be packed into Walker Packing Compartments. Protects nomads wearing them and allows to carry and operate heavy weapons and tools.
th: 使用连发枪进行射击，这一工程壮举是在弗洛特利亚创造的，可以装入翼行者包装箱。穿着它们的游民不仅会给他们带来保护，而且会让他们携带和操作重型武器和工具。

en: Vambrace made primarily of boiled leather and reinforced with steel pieces.
th: 臂铠主要由煮熟的皮革制成，并用钢片加固。

en: Various diffent tools of best quality, which provides an opportunity to produce high quality gear.
th: 各种最高品质的工具，可以让你制作出最高品质的装备。

en: Various styles of flags that display a nomad's clan colors and clan insignia.
th: 不同风格的旗帜展示出游民部落的部落颜色和部落标记

en: Various styles of flags that display a nomad's clan colors and clan insignia.
th: 不同风格的旗帜展示出游民部落的部落颜色和部落标记

en: Very strong and heavy, damageable only with high tier ammo. Can only be packed on Founder Walker types (Balang or Silur Walker).
th: 非常坚韧和沉重，只有用高阶弹药才能破坏。无法支撑自身重量，需要基础翼行者核心或其他材料制成的地基。

en: Very strong and heavy, damageable only with high tier ammo. Can only be packed on Founder Walker types (Balang or Silur Walker).
th: 非常坚韧和沉重，只有用高阶弹药才能破坏。无法支撑自身重量，需要基础翼行者核心或其他材料制成的地基。

en: Very strong and heavy, damageable only with high tier ammo. Can only be packed on Founder Walker types (Balang or Silur Walker).
th: 非常坚韧和沉重，只有用高阶弹药才能破坏。无法支撑自身重量，需要基础翼行者核心或其他材料制成的地基。

en: Very strong and heavy, damageable only with high tier ammo. Can only be packed on Founder Walker types (Balang or Silur Walker).
th: 非常坚韧和沉重，只有用高阶弹药才能破坏。无法支撑自身重量，需要基础翼行者核心或其他材料制成的地基。

en: Villagers consumes food and water over time to survive. When your town has sufficient food and water, your population will grow.
th: 村民为了生存会长期消耗食物和水。当你的城镇有足够的食物和水，你的人口就会增长。

en: We have an urgent problem. Some boars have been terrorizing the village, and we need someone to take care of them as soon as possible. Are you willing to help? You look like someone, who can handle this.
th: 我们有个紧急问题. 一群野猪正在肆意破坏村子,我们需要尽快解决它们.你愿意帮帮我们吗?你看起来就很可靠.

en: We may be a small fishing village, but we've got big personalities. And big fish, too!
th: 我们可能是一个小渔村，但我们有很强的个性。也有大鱼!

en: We may not have the most advanced technology in our village, but we make up for it with our impressive collection of boomerangs and blow darts.
th: 我们村可能没有最先进的技术，但我们有出色的回旋镖和吹箭。

en: We once put faith in one man's words and now we are suffering the consequences. Plenty have offered help only to take advantage of us in the end.
th: 我们曾经盲目相信了一个人，现在我们付出了代价。很多人帮助我们就是为了利用我们。

en: We wouldst be forever gaged to thee if thou could dispatch those bandits in yonder woods. Besides all the coin we can findeth, we shall be forever in thy service. Make sure you make your man a proper soldier and give him weapon!
th: 如果你能把那边树林里的强盗赶走，我们将永远为你服务, 除了我们能找到的钱。一定要让你的人成为一个合格的士兵，并给他武器!

en: We're in desperate want of some assistance gathering food. We just don't hath enough able bodies hither and our people art starving. If 't be true thee can provideth us with some warmeth meals, we can provideth thee some wage. [B]uild a shelter and a campfire to keep safe and warm out there
th: 我们急需一些人来帮忙收集食物。我们这里劳力不足所以都在挨饿。如果你真的能为我们提供一些温暖的食物，我们可以为你提供一些工资。搭建一个庇护所和篝火，以保持安全和温暖。

en: We've no business with that matter.
Weak structure that cannot be packed on walkers.
th: 这一种脆弱的建筑无法装到翼行者上面。

en: Weak structure that cannot be packed on walkers.
th: 这一种脆弱的建筑无法装到翼行者上面。

en: Weak structure that cannot be packed on walkers.
th: 这一种脆弱的建筑无法装到翼行者上面。

en: Weak structure that cannot be packed on walkers.
th: 这一种脆弱的建筑无法装到翼行者上面。

en: Weaver crafts all sorts of textiles and useful tools.
th: 纺织工制作各种纺织品和有用的工具。

en: Weaver crafts all sorts of textiles and useful tools.
th: 纺织工制作各种纺织品和有用的工具。

en: Welcome to my bookstore, traveler. Here, you'll find the most precious treasures of all - knowledge and wisdom, bound between the pages of these books. Take a look what I've.
th: 欢迎来到我的书店，旅行者。在这里，你会发现最珍贵的宝藏--知识和智慧，就装订在这些书页之间。来看看吧.

en: Welcome to our village. It's not much, but it's home. Just don't go wandering too far out or you might find trouble.
th: 欢迎来到我们村.虽然没有什么,但是胜在像家一样温馨.别跑的太远,否则会有麻烦的.

en: Welcome, adventurer! I'm neighborhood hermit, and this is my little corner of the forest. Just be warned, I'm not much of a cook, so if you're expecting a gourmet meal, you might want to bring your own provisions. But hey, at least you won't have to worry about any awkward small talk at the dinner table.
th: 欢迎你，冒险家! 我是附近的逸民，这个森林的小角落是我活动的地方。我不太会做饭，如果你想吃大餐的话，可以自己带些食物。至少你不必担心在餐桌上的任何尴尬的闲谈。

en: Welcome, adventurer! I'm neighborhood hermit, and this is my little corner of the forest. Just be warned, I'm not much of a cook, so if you're expecting a gourmet meal, you might want to bring your own provisions. But hey, at least you won't have to worry about any awkward small talk at the dinner table.
th: 欢迎你，冒险家! 我是附近的逸民，这个森林的小角落是我活动的地方。我不太会做饭，如果你想吃大餐的话，可以自己带些食物。至少你不必担心在餐桌上的任何尴尬的闲谈。

en: Welcome, adventurer! What brings you to my humble herbal shop?
th: 欢迎，冒险家! 什么风把你吹到我这简陋的草药店来了？

en: Welcome, brave traveler! I'm the resident hermit of these woods, and I'm glad you've stumbled upon my humble abode. Just a warning, I'm not much of a host, so don't expect any fancy meals or beverages.
th: 欢迎你的到来，勇敢的旅行者! 我是这片森林里的逸民，很开心你能碰巧来到我这简陋的地方。但是要先告诉你我这里可没有什么花哨的饭菜或饮料。

en: Welcome, brave traveler! I'm the resident hermit of these woods, and I'm glad you've stumbled upon my humble abode. Just a warning, I'm not much of a host, so don't expect any fancy meals or beverages.
th: 欢迎你的到来，勇敢的旅行者! 我是这片森林里的逸民，很开心你能碰巧来到我这简陋的地方。但是要先告诉你我这里可没有什么花哨的饭菜或饮料。

en: Welcome, good friend! My shop is open for business, and I guarantee you won't be disappointed with what I have to offer!
th: 朋友,欢迎！你绝对不会对我的货失望的！

en: Well get a move on will ya?
Well met, friend! I'm sorry to disappoint you, but I’ve got nothing to ask of you for now. Stop by for a chat again soon!
th: 你好啊,大英雄！抱歉让你失望了,我这里没有任务给你. 但是我希望这些书能丰富你的生活.再见！

en:
Well traveler... You should know, it's not safe for you to be here.
You better hurry if you've come for knowledge. Patrols may pass any moment.
th:
旅行者...你应该知道这里对你不安全.
如果你是为了知识而来的话就动作快点. 巡逻的人随时回来.

en: Well, did you manage to track down boars at the forest already?
th: 那你找到森林里的野猪了吗？

en: Well, it's not just one thing. It's a combination of things - experience, skill, knowledge of the area, and a bit of luck, of course. But I have a few tricks up my sleeve that I've picked up over the years.
th: 不只是只有一点而已。它是多种因素的结合--经验、技能、对该地区的了解，当然还有一点运气。但我有一些多年来掌握的诀窍。

en: Well, shit. Looks like I’ve run out of a few ingredients. Can you help me collect them?
th: 糟糕,好像我们有些原料不够了.你能帮个忙收集一些吗？

en: Well, that's just it. No one knows exactly where it can be found. Some say it only appears in the clearest mountain streams, while others believe it only comes out at night. But I do know one thing for sure - it's one of the rarest and most valuable fish in these parts.
th: 就这些。没有人知道到底在哪里可以找到它。有人说它只出现在最清澈的山涧里，而其他人则认为它只在晚上出来。但我确实知道一件事--它是这些地方最稀有和最有价值的鱼之一。

en: Well, this upcoming Solstice will be the perfect chance to do so! I think I might need a little assistance, though. You see, I’m making an elixir from mushrooms and herbs. This potion is known for its healing properties, and is especially useful for curing ailments of the respiratory system. It also has some…special properties that change how you view the world for a period of time. Many will pay me a visit in the coming days to pick one up. In fact, I have so much to prepare that I can’t leave my pot; the boiling process must be closely monitored. Though, I’m running low on a few ingredients. Say, could you help me?
th: 这次的至日是个好机会! 不过我可能需要一点帮助。我正在用蘑菇和草药制作一种灵药。这种药水以其治疗特性而闻名，对治疗呼吸系统的疾病特别有用。它还具有一些......特殊的特性，能在一段时间内改变你对世界的看法。在接下来几天，许多人会为此来拜访我。我有很多东西要准备，远离不了这口锅；沸腾的过程必须被密切关注。不过，我的一些原料已经不多了。你能帮帮我吗？

en: Well-made leather shoes with wraps underneath for additional comforty and protection.
th: 制作精良的皮鞋，下面有鞋带，以增加舒适性和保护性。

en: Well... Do you have any other questions for me?
th: 呃...你有什么其他问题吗？

en: Well… you didn't offer me a place to stay for the night, so I had to do something.
th: 呃....你没有给我提供过夜的地方，所以我必须做点什么。

en: What a lovely day to go fishing!
What a nice day! Don't you speak with village Elder?
th: 天气多好啊! 你不和村里的长老说话吗？

en: What books do you have available today?
What books do you have available today?
What can I do for you?
What can I do for you?
What do you have in stock today?
What is it, stranger? What business do you have with us?
th: 怎么了,陌生人？你找我们有什么事吗？

en: What items do you have available for purchase today?
What makes you think you're welcome here?
th: 你凭什么认为这里欢迎你？

en: What patrols are you speaking of? Is there trouble in the village?
th: 你在说什么巡逻队？村子里有麻烦吗？

en: What's your name, and why are you here? If you're not here to cause trouble, then you shouldn't have any problem answering me. But if I get even a whiff of something suspicious, you'll regret it.
th: 你叫什么,你来这里做什么？如果你不是来找麻烦的话这些问题应该难不住你. 但是如果我对你感到一丝的怀疑,你会后悔的.

en: When placed on a walker, weapons will use the ammo from the chest to reload. Placing in a base will only allow to store ammo.
th: 当放置在翼行者上时，武器将使用宝箱里的弹药来上膛。当放在基地里时，只会储存弹药。

en: While made of a high grade steel, the open face of the Bascinet has some weaknesses compared to more protective helmets.
th: 虽然是由优质钢制成，但与更具保护性的头盔相比，敞面战盔的开放性是它的弱点。

en: While made of raw hide, these boots are fitted to be worn higher, protecting a little more of the wearer's leg.
th: 虽然是由生皮制成，但这双靴子可以穿得更高，可以保护佩戴者的腿部更多一点。

en: While providing additional protection with a heavy coif, the helmet has to be opened to withstand the weight.
th: 虽然厚重的衬帽能提供额外的保护，但是头盔必须变得有开放性来承受头盔的总重量。

en: While providing some protection to the wearer's hands, its main advantage is the sturdy vambrace.
th: 虽然为佩戴者的手提供了一些保护，但其主要优势是坚固的臂铠。

en: Who are you, and what's your business in this town? Don't try to evade my questions, or it'll go badly for you. We've got enough troublemakers around here already.
th: 你是谁？你来这里做什么？别想着躲避我的问题,否则你的下场会很惨.我们这附近已经有够多麻烦的家伙了.

en: Who gave you permission to enter this town?
th: 谁允许你进入这个镇子的？

en: Who rebelled and why? What exactly happened?
th: 谁反叛了，为什么？究竟发生了什么？

en: Who says no to food? Make sure you have enough food supply. Wouldn’t be fair to give something out to one person and not the rest.
th: 有谁能一直什么都不吃呢？要注意时刻有充足的食物储备,给予食物时要一视同仁.

en: Why do they call it 'diamond mining' when most of what we dig up is just worthless clay?
th: 为什么他们称之为 "钻石开采"，而我们挖出的大部分东西只是毫无价值的粘土？

en: Why don’t the Court soldiers in this village take care of it?
th: 这村里的王宫士兵怎么不处理这个问题？

en: Why, can't you find those berries?:)  As a child you always come back from the forest with bunch of them in the pockets! Go now!
th: 啊?你找不到那些果子吗?:) 作为一个孩子，你该去森林里采集一堆果子回来! 现在就去吧!

en: Wide pants made of linen that can fit any peasant around. Not very useful in battle.
th: 亚麻布制成的宽大裤子，可以适合任何农民。在战斗中不是很有用。

en: Wild herb growing in forests. Used in various foods and potions.
th: 生长在森林中的野生草本植物。在各种食物和药水中使用。

en: Wings powered by torque that flap like those of flying creatures.
th: 以矩力为动力的机翼，可以像飞行生物那样扇动。

en: With parts carved out of solid obsidian, the machine can safely hold lava to use it in various productions.
th: 该机的部件由实心黑曜石雕刻而成，可以安全地容纳熔岩，将其用于各种制作。

en: With the hide slightly boiled, these shoes provide a little more protection when hit.
th: 由于皮子略微煮过，这种鞋在被攻击时能提供更多的保护。

en: Wood from dicot tree, which are usually found in broad-leaved temperate and tropical forests.
th: 双子叶树的木材，通常在温带和热带阔叶林中发现。

en:
Wood: 45
Stone: 30
Iron Bar: 2
Leather: 2

Use Time: 30 minutes

Once captured, a castle needs to be maintained for it not to fall back to the enemy. Every 30 minutes, the castle will consume the resources listed, so make sure to have a steady supply of them. If there aren't enough resources, the castle will start decaying and eventually get captured back by the enemy.
th:
木材: 45
石头: 30
铁条: 2
皮革：2

使用时间：30分钟

城堡一旦被占领，就需要维持它不被敌人夺走。每30分钟，城堡会消耗列出的资源，所以要确保有稳定的资源供应。如果没有足够的资源，城堡将开始倒计时，最终被敌人夺回。

en: Wooden parts of the best quality used in building.
th: 建筑中使用的质量最好的木制部件。

en: Wow, that's impressive. What makes you such a great fisherman?
th: 哇，太厉害了吧。你成为这么厉害的渔夫有什么诀窍吗？

en: Yeaaaa, let's go find some mushrooms to roast.
th: 走,咱们去搞点蘑菇烧着吃.

en: Yeaaaa, lets go eat some mushrooms

Yeaaaa, lets go eat some mushrooms
Yeaaaa, lets go eat some mushrooms
Yeaaaa, lets go eat some mushrooms
Yeah, hope I'll manage to take them down.
Yeah, it was a big journey! And I've the secret booze!
th: 是的,那是一个很长的旅程！而且我还有秘密的酒！

en: Yes, I can find some time to bring you a few ingredients.
th: 嗯, 我可以抽空给你带些原料.

en: Yes, I could join you, but I need some help first: {0}
th: 是的，我可以加入你们，但我首先需要一些帮助: {0}

en: Yes, I'm interested in new things.
th: 是的,我对新事物很感兴趣.

en: Yes, it's me, can't cover anything from you, Helga!
th: 没错，是我，什么都瞒不住你，海尔格!

en: Yes, it's me. My, my, how old you become. What had happened to our settlement?
th: 没错,就是我. 不可思议, 你看看你都变成什么样儿了. .我们的定居点发生了什么？

en: Yes, it's me. You not changed at all!
Yes. Would it be alright if I stay in the village?
th: 是的.我可以在村子里呆一阵子吗？

en: You are missing inputs to craft
You are missing inputs to craft
You are missing inputs to craft
You are sorely mistaken. I am but a traveler looking for help.
th: 你大错特错了。我只是一个寻求帮助的旅行者。

en: You can claim to be a trustworthy person all you want, but it’s something we need to see first hand.
th: 你口说无凭,想要得到我们的信任的话需要我们亲眼看到.

en: You did a great deed for our village. I'm in your debt.
th: 你帮了村子大忙了, 我欠你个人情.

en: You did well for our village, I'm in your debt
th: 你帮了村子大忙了, 我欠你个人情.

en: You did well for our village, I'm in your debt
th: 你帮了村子大忙了, 我欠你个人情.

th: 你帮了村子大忙了, 我欠你个人情.

en: You did well for our village, I'm in your debt
th: 你帮了村子大忙了, 我欠你个人情.

en: You did well for our village, I'm in your debt
th: 你帮了村子大忙了, 我欠你个人情.

en: You do, because Leoric said you were guilty. But no matter the fact, who it was, the war for freedom and wealth begins, your father made a deal with Bill the Butcher and Daniel Shepherd, two notorious persons well known in our lands. I helped with medical aid to the wounded, and battles went one after another.
th: 你是的,因为李奥瑞克说你是有罪的。但不管事实如何，到底因谁而起，为了自由和财富的战争开始了，你父亲与屠夫比尔和丹尼尔-谢泼德做了交易，这两个臭名昭著的人在我们的土地上很有名。我帮助对伤员进行医疗救助，战斗接连不断。

en: You don't have enough coins for travel
th: 你没有足够的金币来旅行

en: You don't need to worry about me. Did something happen here? What's that about patrols?
th: 你不需要担心我.这里发生了什么吗？怎么巡逻的这么严？

en: You established the Foundation of a Resistance
You have saved us, hero. The village thanks you. As a reward for your bravery and skill, please accept these coins and hide.
th: 你拯救了我们，英雄。村民们感谢你。作为对你的勇敢的奖励，请接受这些金币和皮吧。

en: You mentioned that you want to earn our trust. I suggest you talk with other villagers. I’ve always been fond of conversation, and many here share the same sentiment. After that it's easy, you offer to help them and they’ll help you in return.
th: 你说你想赢得我们的信任。我建议你与其他村民交谈。我们都非常健谈。之后就很简单了，大家互帮互助.

en: You played today, cometo today and lose, come next day
th: 你今天玩了，今天来了，输了，第二天再来。

en: You saved us, we'll be grateful you for eternity!
th: 你救了我们,我们会永远铭记于心的！

en: You see, I'm a skilled craftsman and I'm working on a set of unique armor that requires some very specific components. Specifically, I need a set of stag horns to create the helmet. Would you be willing to gather some for me?
th: 你看，我是一个熟练的工匠，正在制作一套独特的盔甲，需要一些非常特殊的部件。具体来说，我需要一对雄鹿角来制作头盔。你愿意为我收集一些吗？

en: You seems a man of deal, come to see me later. But don't forget knowledge is a great power!
th: 你看起来挺可靠的,之后再来见我吧. 别忘记知识就是力量！

en: You should keep in mind that times are harsh in the Lowlands. Drought and bad soil wreaks havoc on our crops. The Crown is taking the rest for themselves. Throughout the kingdom, people are starving. It will be hard to find a safe place to live here.
th: 你要记住，在低地的生活是严酷的。干旱和恶劣的土壤对我们的农作物造成了严重的破坏。皇帝把剩下的产物据为己有。在整个王国里，人们都在挨饿。要想在这里找到一个安全的地方居住是很难的。

en: You too, have a good day!
th: 你也是, 祝你有个愉快的一天!

en: You too, have a good day!
th: 你也是, 祝你有个愉快的一天!

en: You too, have a good day!
th: 你也是, 祝你有个愉快的一天!

en: You want to settle here, of all places? Are you mad? We’re plagued by bandits and poor harvests more than any other region, don’t you know that?
th: 你想在这儿定居？你疯了吗？哪儿不好啊！我们这儿可到处是强盗而且收成也不好，你知道不知道啊？

en:
You're asking too many questions, stranger. Maybe you should ask someone else about it. I told you enough.
I don't want to make soldiers angry. Don't stay too long in the village.
th:
你的问题太多了，陌生人. 或许你应该去问问其他人,我告诉你够多了.
我可不想被士兵找麻烦. 还是不要在村里呆太久比较好.

en: You're new around here, huh? Watch your back, stranger. Those bandits don't take kindly to outsiders.
th: 你新来的吧，哈？你要小心一点,陌生人. 那帮强盗对外来者可不友好.

en: You're new to town, and I don't know anything about you. It's hard for me to trust someone I don't know.
th: 你新来的而且我也不认识你.我对陌生人很难信任.

en: You're not from around here, are you? What brings you to this town?
th: 以前没见过你啊？你来这里有什么事？
您的抵抗力获得了支持！

en: Your supporters provided you with {0} Insurgency Points.
th: 你的支持者为你提供了{0} 叛乱点数。

en: You’re a new face. What brings you to our village?
th: 以前没见过你啊.你来我们村有什么事吗？

en: bring some stuff to the other guy

th: 为他鼓舞人心的风力仿生兽

en: ohh, great, great. At long last I would catch that great fish! You made my dream come true!
th: 哦，太好了，太好了。我终于可以抓到那条大鱼了! 你让我的梦想成真了!

en: shut up and get it done
New day started - villages are waking up, trading orders are refreshed and new quests might be available
th: 新的一天开始了 - 村民们开始醒来. 订单和任务刷新了.

en: Combat role: Melee. Will prefer to use a melee weapon.
th: 战斗角色：近战。将倾向于使用近战武器。

en: Combat role: Ranged. Will prefer to use a ranged weapon.
th: 战斗角色：远程。将倾向于使用远程武器。

en: Combat role: any. Will prefer to use a weapon most skilled with.
th: 战斗角色：任意。将倾向于使用最熟练的武器。

en: Conquer {0} region to unlock (Press {1} to open the Map Screen)
th: 征服{0}区域要解锁（按{1}打开地图屏幕）

en: Try mushrooms, meat, fish or berries
th: 试试蘑菇,肉,鱼或者浆果

en: A character with this name already exists.
Are you ready to start the game?

Last Oasis is currently in Game Preview state. The game will be continuously updated with new features, content, improvements, and fixes based on the feedback from our community.

We're working hard to make it the best Survival MMO experience and we appreciate all your help and support with suggestions and bug reports. Special thanks to all of our beta testers who made this Game Preview happen.

Please note that in the current state some platform features might not work correctly and some game features might not work correctly and might crash. We are actively working on fixing all discovered issues.
th:
《最后的绿洲 》目前正处于游戏预览状态。游戏将根据我们社区的反馈持续更新新的功能、内容、改进和修复。

我们正在努力使它成为最好的生存MMO体验，我们感谢您对建议和错误报告的所有帮助和支持。特别感谢我们所有的beta测试者，他们使这个游戏预览得以实现。

请注意，在目前的状态下，一些平台功能可能无法正常工作，一些游戏功能可能无法正常工作并可能崩溃。我们正在积极努力修复所有发现的问题。

en: Your controller has been disconnected! Please press on a connected controller to continue.
th: 您的手柄已断开连接! 请连接的手柄并按继续。

th: 这瓶气体当游民吸入后使他们狂暴。增加游民使用近战武器的伤害，但也增加收到的伤害。

en: A crude fabric woven from strands of natural fiber.
th: 由天然纤维股织成的粗布。

en: A greasy leftover from a once noble creature.
th: 一个曾经高贵的生物留下的油渍物。

en: A harder, more sought after wood used for specialty constructions.
th: 一种更硬、更受欢迎的木材，用于特殊建筑。

en: A heavy armor issued to Flotillan servicemen whose responsibilities range from reconnaissance, expiditionary planting, and trade station operation and disassemblement.
th: 给经常去侦查，远征，用控制工作台，拆卸的弗洛特利亚军人用的重甲.

en: A heavy armor issued to Flotillan servicemen whose responsibilities range from reconnaissance, expiditionary planting, and trade station operation and disassemblement.
th: 给经常去侦查，远征，用控制工作台，拆卸的弗洛特利亚军人用的重甲.

en: A heavy armor issued to Flotillan servicemen whose responsibilities range from reconnaissance, expiditionary planting, and trade station operation and disassemblement.
th: 给经常去侦查，远征，用控制工作台，拆卸的弗洛特利亚军人用的重甲.

en: A hot-burning liquid, used in furnaces.
th: 一种高温燃烧的液体，用于熔炉中。

en: A huge water bag worn on the back with two separate compartments.
th: 有着双隔层的大型水袋

en: A large bottle with two seperate containers that can each hold a different type of liquid.
th: 一种有着双隔层的大型水袋，可以装两种不同的液体。

en: A large container made of obsidian with nibiran coating. Withstands very high temperatures.
th: 一个由黑曜石制成的大型容器，上面有尼比兰涂层。能承受很高的温度。

en: A little added protection, with a little more smell. Still very light and maneuverable.
th: 虽然味道更重但是有着更强的保护性。还是非常轻巧灵便。

en: A little extra inventory space to carry the bare necessities.
th: 有一点额外的库存空间，可以携带最基本的生活用品。

en: A malodorous perfume that makes every other living creature want to run away. Reduces rupu aggressiveness toward Nomad.
th: 恶臭的香水，让其他生物都想逃跑。减少露普对游民的攻击性。

en: A mixture of ingredients with dashes of wood splinters kept in secret by the nomadic outlaws. Used in production of Hellfire Bolts to make fire burn at extremely high temperatures, allowing to damage even the strongest materials.
th: 由游民中的亡命之徒所制作出的秘密成分与木屑的混合物。用于生产地狱火，使火在极高的温度下燃烧，甚至可以破坏最坚固的材料。

en: A nearly unbreakable, highly efficient mining tool.
th: 一个几乎牢不可破、高效的采矿工具。

en: A permit to build one proxy walker to claim an oasis.
th: 一张用来建造代理翼行者的许可证，可用它来占领一处绿洲。

en: A portable net with a release mechanism that allows to throw it by hand.
th: 一种带有释放装置的便携式网，可以用手投掷。

en: A secret weaving technique creates surprisingly strong armor with no loss in meanueverability.
th: 一种秘密的编制方式，可以在带来更多防御的基础上不降低灵活性。

en: A secret weaving technique creates surprisingly strong armor with no loss in meanueverability.
th: 一种秘密的编制方式，可以在带来更多防御的基础上不降低灵活性。

en: A secret weaving technique creates surprisingly strong armor with no loss in meanueverability.
th: 一种秘密的编制方式，可以在带来更多防御的基础上不降低灵活性。

en: A shattered fragment - some simple information can still be extracted, but without some restoration work it's hard to learn about complex topics from it.
th: 一块碎片。虽然可以直接从中获取一些简单的信息，但如果想要深入探究，还得先花些工夫修复它。

en: A simple device designed to launch small projectiles.
th: 一种被设计成在发射小型弹药的简单装置。

en: A small bottle with two seperate containers that can each hold a different type of liquid.
th: 一种有着双隔层的小型水袋，可以装不同的液体。

en: A small injection that may cause balance loss and serious injury from falling off walkers. Grants Nomad double damage after a successful block.
th: 一支可能会造成游民平衡感丧失和从翼行者上摔下来的注射药剂。可以让游民在成功格挡后给予双倍伤害。

en: A strange, slightly translucent stone without a single scratch on the surface or other traces of deterioration. It seems to have endured many burnouts quite unscathed.
th: 一块奇怪的、略带半透明的石头，表面没有一丝划痕，也没有其他退化的痕迹。它似乎经历了许多次的烧毁而毫发无损。

en: A strong cord used for crafting and construction
th: 一种用于制作和建筑的强力绳

en: A swirling mixture that makes a Nomad burst into song and dance. Negates all falling damage taken by Nomad.
th: 一种可以使游民载歌载舞的漩涡状的混合物。可以让游民无视所有的下落伤害。

en: A tightly woven cloth that is hard to cut and nearly waterproof. The Flotillan standard.
th: 一块紧密编织的布，防割防水，典型的弗洛特利亚标准。

en: A type of very light wood with a porous structure and air trapped between the layers of the fiber.
th: 一种非常轻的木材，具有多孔结构，空气被夹在纤维层之间。

en: A weapon that is deeply symbolic of nomadic culture, straddling the line between barbarism and innovation.
th: 一把在游民文化中有着深度代表性的武器，是野人和文明的分割线。

en: A weapon that is deeply symbolic of nomadic culture, straddling the line between barbarism and innovation.
th: 一把在游民文化中有着深度代表性的武器，是野人和文明的分割线。

en: A yellow mineral that typically forms in sulfur lakes.
th: 在硫湖中经常能找到的黄色矿物。

en: Adorning the backs of Swampwood tribe's most adept warriors, this bladed quarterstaff doubles as a paddle while canoeing the misty shores of the South Sea.
th: 是象征着沼泽木部落最强大的战士的背后装饰。这种带有锯齿的短杖还可以用来在南海里的迷雾海滩当作桨使用。

en: After it was made in secrecy for one of the wealthiest weapon collectors on the Flotilla, the schemes for this quarterstaff appeared on the market. The few who wield it have seldom lost in combat.
th: 自从它被秘密的做给一名弗洛特利亚上最富有的富豪收藏家之一，这把短杖的图纸出现在了市场上。少数几个有幸能挥舞它的人几乎未尝败绩。

en: All water that is transported to the Flotilla is cleansed in an ancient water purifying machine. The Guardians are the sole keepers of this machine, a technological relic of the old world which has sustained the Flotillans to this day.
th: 所有运输到弗洛特利亚的水资源都被一个远古的净水器过滤净化了。守护者们是唯一守护着这个净水器的势力。由远古的科技制作出来的它们守护着弗洛特利亚人到至今。

en: Ammo for Rupu Sling. Rupus refuse to throw anything else.
th: 露普弹弓的弹药。露普生物不会用除此之外的弹药。

en: Ammo for auto-turret traps. High precision and speed make them deadly against lightly armored targets. Ineffective against walkers and structures.
th: 自动炮台陷阱的弹药。高度的精准和速度让它们可以对轻甲敌人造成毁灭打击。对翼行者和建筑无效。

en: Ammo for ballista. An iron tip easily penetrates armor and makes holes in bodies that can't be patched.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。铁制箭头可以轻松穿透护甲并对身体造成无法愈合的伤害。

en: Ammo for ballista. Bone tips are notorious for splintering and ricocheting inside the body.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。有着骨制尖弹头的弹药可以轻松粉碎人体。

en: Ammo for ballista. Burns quicker while dealing the same damage to the target as a Hellfire Bolt due to its structural properties. Much more difficult to destroy.
th: 一种弩炮的弹药。由于其结构特性，燃烧速度会更快，同时对目标造成的伤害与地狱火相同。更难摧毁

en: Ammo for ballista. Ceramic tips guarantee their sharpness and strength.
th: 一种弩炮的弹药。陶瓷枪尖保证了其锋利度和强度。

en: Ammo for ballista. Designed to burn down wooden structures over multiple minutes.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。可以在几分钟内烧毁木制建筑物。

en: Ammo for ballista. Designed to burn down wooden structures over time. A heavy bolt with a crushing bone head, designed to splinter walkers and light wooden structures.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。可以烧毁木制建筑物。这是一种带有骨制箭头的重型弩矢，用以破坏翼行者和轻型木制建筑。

en: Ammo for ballista. During an eclipse, these bolts will light up the sky and make enemies glow from the inside out.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。在日食时这些弩矢可以点亮黑夜，让敌人"从内到外”的闪耀。

en: Ammo for ballista. Easily penetrates and latches into wood. A strong tether holds it in place.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。可以很轻松地穿透并勾在木头上。绑有一根强韧的绳索。

en: Ammo for ballista. Effective against lightly armored nomads.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。对轻甲敌人非常有效。

en: Ammo for ballista. Tether to any target and reel in until the harpoon is destroyed or the tether snaps.
th: 一种弩炮弹药，可以勾住任何目标并将其拉近，直到矛叉损坏或绳索断开。

en: Ammo for ballista. Tether to any target and reel in until the harpoon is destroyed or the tether snaps.
th: 一种弩炮弹药，可以勾住任何目标并将其拉近，直到矛叉损坏或绳索断开。

en: Ammo for ballista. Tether to any target and reel in until the harpoon is destroyed or the tether snaps.
th: 一种弩炮弹药，可以勾住任何目标并将其拉近，直到矛叉损坏或绳索断开。

en: Ammo for ballista. The fishing titanium head refuses to come unhooked. A durable tether is hard to snap.
th: 一种弩炮弹药。钛合金钩爪一旦抓住目标便不会松开，其强韧的绳索也很难崩断。

en: Ammo for catapult. Big boulder with iron scraps tied to it for extra weight. Designed to shred wood to pieces and severely damage more sturdy materials.
th: 一种投石机弹药。巨石表面缠绕着铁片，使其具有更大的重量。不仅可以摧毁木头，还能对更坚固的材料造成严重破坏。

en: Ammo for catapult. This massive boulder obliterates bodies and smashes wood to bits.
th: 一种投石机弹药。这块巨石可以将任何敌人或木头碾碎成渣。

en: Ammo for net thrower. Entangles small structures, mannable weapons, walker legs and wings.
th: 一种射网器的弹药。可以网住小型建筑、载人武器以及翼行者的腿部和机翼。

en: Ammo for scattershot gun. A mixed bag of blunt and sharp debris that spread out when fired.
th: 散弹枪的弹药。由钝物和尖锐物混合制成。

en: Ammo for scattershot gun. Blows apart wooden constructions while also dealing some damage to sturdier materials.
th: 一种霰弹枪的弹药。可以摧毁木制建筑并对更坚固的材料造成轻微破坏。

en: Ammo for sling or catapult. Covers nomads in green goo that heals them for short duration.
th: 一种用在弹弓或投石机上的弹药。用绿色黏液覆盖游民，使他们在短时间内得到治疗。

en: Ammo for sling or catapult. Explodes on impact, releasing a toxic cloud. The poison acts extremely quickly and does consistent damage.
th: 一种用在弹弓或投石机上的弹药。撞击后爆炸，释放出有毒气体。毒性立刻发作，并会造成持续伤害。

en: Ammo for sling or catapult. Primitive explosive detonates on impact, releasing lava and setting fire to its surroundings.
th: 一种用在弹弓或投石机上的弹药。在撞击时引爆，释放出熔岩，并将周围环境点燃。

en: Ammo for sling or catapult. Releases a short duration sulfur cloud on impact that deals health as well as corrosive durability damage.
th: 一种用在弹弓或投石机上的弹药。撞击时释放硫磺云，短时间内造成生命值伤害以及对耐久度进行腐蚀.

en: Ammo for sling or catapult. Releases thick smoke cloud in area. Does not deal any damage.
th: 一种用在弹弓或投石机上的弹药。在区域内释放厚厚的烟云。不造成任何伤害。

en: Ammo for sling or catapult. Spawns dozens of tiny explosions covering a large surface area. Very effective at disrupting walkers and nomads on the ground.
th: 一种用在弹弓或投石机上的弹药。会产生几十个微小的爆炸，覆盖很大的表面区域。对地面上的翼行者和游民的行动会带来非常大的影响。

en: Ammo for slingshot. Deals higher damage the more tension there is on release.
th: 用于弹弓，拉得越紧伤害越高。

en: An abundant marsh plant favoured by nomads for its medicinal properties.
th: 一种深受游民喜爱且随处可见的草药。

en: Appearing in the sands roamed by the Old Ones - giant worms of the desert, this substance has strange properties affecting both living creatures and mechanical constructions in ways that affect the energy inside them.
th: 这种物质出现在沙漠中的巨型蠕虫所游荡的沙地上，它具有奇怪的特性，以影响生物和机械结构的方式影响它们内部的能量。

en: Being almost as hot as lava itself, it's often used in combat and crafting.
th: 几乎和熔岩本身的温度一样高，经常被用于战斗和制作。

en: Bonespike weapons are favoured in the Flotillan arena for their brutality.
th: 因粗暴而在弗洛特利亚竞技场闻名的骨刺武器。

en: Bonespike weapons are favoured in the Flotillan arena for their brutality.
th: 因粗暴而在弗洛特利亚竞技场闻名的骨刺武器。

en: Bought from Trading Stations for Flots.
th: 可从贸易站用金币买到。

en: Burns hotter in a furnace than normal wood.
th: 在炉子中的燃烧温度比普通木头高很多。

en: Can be picked up as pebbles or mined from rocks.
th: 可以以小石头的形式捡到，或从岩石中开采出来。

en: Carried by Rupu living in camps.
th: 由营地中的露普所持有。

en: Carry large volumes of liquid. Essential for water traders.
th: 可以装下大量液体，是水商的必备品。

en: Carved images of animals can be felt on this tablet.
th: 在这块石板上可以触摸到动物的雕刻图案。

en: Carved images of animals can be felt on this tablet.
th: 在这块石板上可以触摸到动物的雕刻图案。

en: Carved images of celestial bodies can be felt on this tablet.
th: 在这块石板上可以触摸到星体的雕刻图案。

en: Carved images of earthly elements can be felt on this tablet.
th: 在这块石板上可以触摸到地球上的元素雕刻图案。

en: Ceramic items are difficult to make and usually seen as a mark of quality craftsmanship.
th: 陶制品的制作难度颇高，所以常常被视为巧匠的标志。

en: Collected from creatures. Requires an axe for larger ones.
th: 来源于各种生物。大型生物需要斧头采集。

en: Corn is seeded by expeditionary planters on the fringe of the Ice Lands.
th: 玉米是由那些远征者在冰原边缘种植的。

en: Crafted in Ancient Fabricators found in the most difficult Oases.
th: 在最危险的绿洲中发现的远古制作台中制作

en: Crafted in Character Crafting. Stores torque.
th: 在角色制作页面中制作。可以储藏矩力。

en: Creature remains can be found in various oases, dead worms, and some rupus.
th: 一种可以在各个绿洲中，死去的蠕虫，以及某些露普上获取的生物遗骸。

en: Crisp and delicious. No worms guaranteed.
th: 脆甜且多汁，绿色无公害。

en: Currency of the Flotilla. Can be withdrawn and deposited at any Trading Station.
th: 弗洛特利亚所用的货币。可在任何交易站提取和存入。

en: Damaged items will repair themselves passively while inside a walker's inventory. Stacking this module increases the rate at which items are repaired.
th: 受损的物品会在翼行者的物品栏中自动修复。添加该模块会加快修复速度。

en: Decreases the time it takes to pack bases and structures.
th: 减少了打包基地和建筑的时间。

en: Designed to store a lot of fiber and organic materials, including sediments, like sand.
th: 可以储存大量纤维和有机材料，或是诸如沙子的无机物。

en: Doesn't benefit from torque, but more efficient than other grappling hooks when travelling without a torque belt.
th: 不受矩力影响，但当不使用矩力带时，比其他抓钩好用得多。

en: Drops from Palms when they're cut down.
th: 棕榈树被砍伐时掉落的。

en: Embedded spikebones easily tear through unprotected flesh.
th: 表面的骨刺可以轻易地将肉体撕碎。

en: Embedded spikebones easily tear through unprotected flesh.
th: 表面的骨刺可以轻易地将肉体撕碎。

en: Enables nomads to transport torque between various devices. The belt also significantly increases the effectiveness of grappling hooks.
th: 可以让游民在各种机械之间传递矩力。这种腰带也能大幅增加抓钩的效用。

en: Enables walker sprinting, powers advanced machines, and enables faster grappling.
th: 可以让翼行者跑起来，启动高级的机械还有可以让抓钩更快。

en: Even the most obstinate nomad has fun chopping food with this extremely efficient tool.
th: 连最笨拙的游民也可以用这把工具来轻松的切开食物。

en: Excavated from red sands near worm sightings.
th: 发掘于虫子踪迹附近的红沙。

en: Excreted by live worms or found fossilized on some trees.
th: 从蠕虫体内排泄出，或者在一些树上以化石的形态而被找到。

en: Expensive but crucial upgrades to your walker. Craft them early to increase the efficiency of your walker.
th: 对你的翼行者来讲是昂贵但又必要的升级。初期制作出来可以让你的翼行者更有效率。

en: Extracted with Soil Excavator from mud puddles in hard oases.
th: 在某些土质坚硬的绿洲上，使用挖土机挖掘泥坑获得。

en: Extremely strong material used in high quality productions.
th: 强度极高的材料，用于高品质的产品。

en: Faint images are etched on the translucent surface.
th: 半透明的表面上刻着一些模糊的图案。

en: Flexible bones make excellent tools and armor.
th: 一种富有弹性的骨头，特别适合用来制作工具和护甲。。

en: Flotillan scholars claim that the Wyndan tribe has roots as a prominent civilization that existed long before the apocalypse.
th: 弗洛特利亚学者认为韦丹部落比天启还要早很久就有文明的根源了。

en: Flotillan scholars claim that the Wyndan tribe has roots as a prominent civilization that existed long before the apocalypse.
th: 弗洛特利亚学者认为韦丹部落比天启还要早很久就有文明的根源了。

en: Forget everything you know about yourself. Resets stats of your character and returns all points.
th: 忘记你对自己的一切了解。重置你的角色属性并返回所有点数。

en: Found as driftwood on the ground or by chopping trees.
th: 在地面上以漂浮木找到，或者可以砍树得到

en: Found in abandoned walker remains and other valuable points of interest on the map
th: 在废弃的翼行者遗骸上和地图上其他重要地方发现的。

en: Found in creatures that have scales or hard plates.
th: 可从有鳞片或者厚甲壳的生物上获得。
发现于干涸的盐水湖中。

en: Found in fields of Corn and other meadows.
th: 发现于玉米地或者其他草地上。

en: Found in forests, bird nests, and some creatures.
th: 发现于森林中、鸟巢或者某些生物身上。

en: Found in rocks glowing during eclipses.
th: 可从日食时发光的石头中获取。

en: Found on totems inside Rupu Camps
th: 从露普营地中的图腾中获得。

en: Found on trees growing in grasslands and other green areas.
th: 发现于各个绿洲的树上。

en: Garments made from this oily fur are favoured for voyages into the Ice Lands.
th: 用这种油性毛皮制作的服装在进入冰原地区的航行中受到青睐。

en: Gears increase the maneuverability of your Walker. Faster acceleration and turn rates help you traverse the world more efficiently.
th: 齿轮可以增加你翼行者的灵活性。更快的加速度和扭转率可以让你更高效的穿梭在世界之中。

en: Generated by Windmills or Walker Wings.
th: 从风车或者翼行者机翼中产生。

en: Gets a Nomad places others can't reach. Slower reeling speed may be disadvantegous while fighting.
th: 可以去到一般人无法抵达的地方。收绳速度较慢，不适合在战斗中使用。
提供更多的道具栏空间。

en: Grapple to any object, reel in and swing. An essential tool for any Nomad who wants to live long enough to see the next oasis.
th: 可以勾在任何物体上摆荡。它是想要活着抵达下一片绿洲的游民的必备工具。

en: Grapple to any object, reel in and swing. An essential tool for any nomad who wants to live long enough to see the next oasis.
th: 可以勾在任何物体上摆荡。它是想要活着抵达下一片绿洲的游民的必备工具。

en: Grows in crevices of gigantic rock formations.
th: 生长在巨大的岩层的缝隙中。
生长于炙热的火山区域。

en: Grows in warm lakes and puddles.
th: 生长于温暖的湖泊和水坑中。

en: Grows inside a mutated Thornberry Cactus in wet areas.
th: 在潮湿地区内变异的刺梅仙人掌内部生长

en: Grows inside a notoriously dangerous, bulbous plant. The thornberry has mystical properties and is said to have appeared with the arrival of Nibiru.
th: 刺梅果生长于一种极度危险的球根植物体内。它的来历神秘，据传和尼比卢的驾临有关。

en: Grows near water sources and forests.
th: 生长在水源附近和森林里。

en: Grows on green flatlands and hills.
th: 生长于绿色平原和山丘上。

en: Grows on large mutated cactus trees.
th: 生长于大型变异仙人掌树上。

en: Grows on top of Rupu camps and huts.
th: 在露普营地和房屋顶端生长。
从杀死的露普生物身上获得

en: Heavier than its counterpart, but the intelligence required to wield it is still low.
th: 比它的同类更重，但仍然不需要费多少脑力就能使用。

en: Historically believed to be the remains of nomads who were burnt by the Sun, it's been recently discovered to be useful in various productions of fuels, bombs, and other items.
th: 历史上被认为是被太阳烧毁的游民遗迹，最近发现它在各种燃料、炸弹等产品的制作中都很有用。

en: Holds a lot more fiber than its predecessor.
th: 比老款能装下更多的纤维。

en: In the dry southern valleys, the fossils of old sea creatures litter the ground, turning the hills white.
th: 在南方的干涸山谷中，远古海洋生物的化石散落地表，将整片山区变成白色。

en: Increases HP of the hull. The higher the HP, the more costly it is for enemies to break in. Often, enemy nomads leave the hull of a walker untouched, allowing you to recover the Walker after a loss.
th: 增加机体的生命值。生命值越高,敌人想破坏所付出的代价越高。因此很多情况下没有敌人会去破坏机体本身,你可以借此机会将机体收回。

en: Incredibly durable flask resistant to highest temperatures.
th: 非常耐用的烧瓶，可耐高温。

en: Infused battery allowing to store significant amounts of torque at a cost of extreme weight.
th: 灌注式电池可以以极高的重量为代价储存大量的矩力。

en: Iron ingot coated with scraped off green mineral of unkown origin.
th: 铁锭上涂有刮下的不明来源的绿色矿物。

en: It is said the axe earned its reputation after the tribe that invented them reportedly dug through a mountainside to escape the scorching sun.
th: 这把斧子声名显赫。据传，造出这把斧子的部落，用它凿穿山脉，逃离了灼热的太阳。

en: It is said the axe earned its reputation after the tribe who invented them reportedly dug through a mountainside to escape the scorching sun.
th: 这把斧子声名显赫。据传，造出这把斧子的部落，用它凿穿山脉，逃离了灼热的太阳。

en: It's a wonder this little bottle can even stay glued together.
th: 这个粘起来的瓶子竟然还能装水，真是个奇迹。

en: Its extremely hard carapace evolved to shield it from extreme weather.
th: 它的外壳异常坚硬，可以保护它免受极端天气的影响。

en: Layers of tough hides are sewn together into a heavy armor worn by the most seasoned nomadic fighters.
th: 一层层的牢固兽皮缝到了重型护甲上，为那些经验最丰富的游民战士提供保护。

en: Layers of tough hides are sewn together into a heavy armor worn by the most seasoned nomadic fighters.
th: 一层层的牢固兽皮缝到了重型护甲上，为那些经验最丰富的游民战士提供保护。

en: Layers of tough hides are sewn together into a heavy armor worn by the most seasoned nomadic fighters.
th: 一层层的牢固兽皮缝到了重型护甲上，为那些经验最丰富的游民战士提供保护。

en: Lightweight obsidian ball containing highly flammable mixture. Throw it at enemies to deal fire damage.
th: 轻型黑曜石球，内含高度易燃的混合物。将其扔向敌人造成火力伤害。

en: Long ago, the Wyndan tribe mediated a lasting peace between the plains people. Today, they serve the Guardians as peacekeepers and engineers.
th: 长久以前，韦丹部落从平原居民中斡旋，达成了长久的和平。而今，他们作为维和者和工程师侍奉着守护者。

en: Long cloak protecting nomads from harsh wind gusts full of sand.
th: 长披风可以帮助游民抵御强烈的沙风。
看起来很美味，吃起来很恶心。

en: Lowers the damage from all fire sources for the walker and all structures.
th: 降低所有火源对翼行者和所有建筑的伤害。

en: Make a meal out of it, or a bomb.
th: 用于做出美味的佳肴或者致命的炸弹。

en: Makes a Nomad want to race other Nomads. Allows Nomad to sprint without losing stamina.
th: 让游民想和其他游民竞赛。可以让游民在不损失体力的情况下进行冲刺。

en: Makes tethers attached to the walker easier to snap.
th: 使连接在翼行者上的锁链更容易卡住。

en: Metal is rare, even on the battlefield. Most nomads can't comprehend how sharp an iron blade is until they are cut with one.
th: 即使是在战场之上，金属也是极其稀有的。大部分的游民直到被铁刃所伤，才能理解这些铁刃的锋利之极。

en: Migrating flying creatures serve as one of the oldest compasses for lost nomads, like dark arrowheads sailing toward the next oasis.
th: 迁徙的飞行生物是失落的游民最古老的指南针之一，就像黑暗的箭头驶一样向下一个绿洲。
可以更高效地挖掘矿石。

en: Mine stone and other minerals with this crude tool.
th: 使用该原始工具挖掘石头和其他矿物质。

en: Mined from asteroids or in low quantities from rocks.
th: 来自于流星。也可从岩石中获取，但含量稀少。

en: Mined from obsidian rocks created by watering lava pools.
th: 从被岩浆浇洒的黑曜石中挖取而来。

en: Mined from rocks or as leftover from burning materials.
th: 采集岩石或从可燃物的余烬中获取。

en: Mined from sulfur rocks or collected from mutated mushroom gases.
th: 从硫磺石上挖取获得，或者可以从变异的蘑菇气体中获得

en: Molten rock flowed across the world's surface, and the metropolises were buried.
th: 熔岩流过世界的表面，大都市就此被掩埋。

en: Most tribes eschew iron armor, despite its protective value. History has proven that it is not pirates whom a nomad must fear most, but the sun.
th: 大部分部落都会选择不穿铁制的护甲，哪怕铁制护甲所带来的保护价值极高。这是因为以往历史已经证明了游民最怕的不是海盗，而是熊熊烈日。

en: Most tribes eschew iron armor, despite its protective value. History has proven that it is not pirates whom a nomad must fear most, but the sun.
th: 大部分部落都会选择不穿铁制的护甲，哪怕铁制护甲所带来的保护价值极高。这是因为以往历史已经证明了游民最怕的不是海盗，而是熊熊烈日。

en: Most tribes eschew iron armor, despite its protective value. History has proven that it is not pirates whom a nomad must fear most, but the sun.
th: 大部分部落都会选择不穿铁制的护甲，哪怕铁制护甲所带来的保护价值极高。这是因为以往历史已经证明了游民最怕的不是海盗，而是熊熊烈日。

en: Nearly all nomads are expert carpenters, and the hatchet is essential to their way of life.
th: 几乎所有的游民都是专家级木工。伐木斧就是他们生活的必需品。

en: Nibiran weapons come from unknown origins, and have not been seen in battle for some time.
th: 尼比兰武器的来源未知，也很久未曾出现在战场上了。

en: Nomads are accustomed to leaving their fate to the winds. While some Nomads have managed to stay airborn for long periods of time and can perform nimble landings, many drop like a leaf.
th: 游民习惯了看天吃饭，把命运交给风。虽然一些游民学会了在空中停留较长时间然后矫健着落的技巧，但是大部分的游民还是如同叶子般从空中掉落。

en: Nomads attacked by a swarm of insects have to fight back. Insects will break grappling hook tethers and deal moderate health damage.
th: 被虫群攻击的游民必须反击。昆虫会打断抓钩系绳，并造成一定的HP伤害

en: Nomads rely on earth wax to waterproof walker sails and make their wooden decks resistant to decay. Often found when mining rocks, it can also be extracted from some natural resources through pressure.
th: 游民们在翼行者帆上涂抹石蜡使其防水。它也可以让木制甲板变得更加耐用。经常可以在采集石头的时候找到它，当然压碎某些自然资源也可获得。

en: Nomads that respawn on a walker will recieve a beneficial status effect. Stacking this module increases the potency of this effect.
th: 在翼行者上重生的游民将获得一个增益效果。叠加这个模组会增加这个效果。

en: Nomads wielding hot bladestaffs made of processed lava have become legendary in some parts of the world for their unique combat techniques and strength.
th: 游民挥舞着由熔岩加工而成的高温剑杖，以其独特的战斗技巧和力量在世界一些地方成为传奇。

en: Often wielded by Rupu as a weapon.
th: 常常被露普拿来当武器。

en: Over the centuries, nomads have experimented with iron in the construction of their walkers and armor. However, in the race to outrun the sun, it was those who travelled lightest that survived longest.
th: 几个世纪以来，游民一直尝试将铁应用到翼行者的建造和护甲的铸造上。然而，在与太阳的赛跑的拉锯战中，那些轻装上阵的才是得以存活最久的人。

en: Pops heads like little grapes. The nibiran minerals used to forge this weapon radiate a faint greenish glow.
th: 如果一粒粒的葡萄冒出来。这种尼比兰矿物质散发出浅绿色的光辉，通常用于武器的铸造。

en: Produced in lumbermills using tree trunks.
th: 在伐木厂使用树干生产的。

en: Produced using a much more wasteful method of log processing than simple lumber, bent planks are significantly more sturdy and don't require any other materials.
th: 使用比简单木材更浪费的原木加工方法生产，弯曲的木板明显更结实，不需要任何其他材料。

en: Produces torque while the walker is moving. Hold SHIFT to consume torque on a walker, or use it to power advanced crafting stations.
th: 当翼行者移动时产生矩力。 按住 SHIFT 可以在翼行者上消耗矩力，或用它给高级工作台带来能源。

en: Protects the wearer against gases if worn correctly, but needs to be replaced regularly. Surprisingly easy to breath through.
th: 如果佩戴正确，可以保护佩戴者免受气体侵害，但需要定期更换。出乎意料的容易透气。
提供一般性的保护和灵活操纵性。
提供一般性的保护和灵活操纵性。
提供一般性的保护和灵活操纵性。

en: Pulsating with heat of a firestone, longblades have become a popular weapon among Nomad warriors who can afford their high price.
th: 脉动着火焰石的热力，长刀已经成为可以承受高昂的价格的游民战士中一种受欢迎的武器

en: Rapidly bonds after application. Discovered by a Flotillan cook who stewed powdered bones of an unknown creature into his soup broth. The nomads he served died of asphyxiation.
th: 涂抹之后可以迅速糅合起来。据说是由一位弗洛特利亚厨师发现的。他把某一未知生物的骨粉和汤底放到一起炖，结果炖出来的东西让客人吃下去以后，客人窒息而亡。

en: Rawbone weaponry doesn't take half a brain to make, but it will split your enemies in half.
th: 粗制骨头武器造起来一点也不费力，但是打在敌人身上可够力了。

en: Rawbone weaponry doesn't take half a brain to make, but it will split your enemies in half.
th: 粗制骨头武器造起来一点也不费力，但是打在敌人身上可够力了。

en: Reinforced by solidified lava, bluedgeons are often brought back to the Flotilla by the Nomads who dare to explore volcanic areas.
th: 由凝固的熔岩加固后，这些钝器经常被敢于探索火山地区的游民带回弗洛特利亚。

en: Relics like these now decorate the homes of wealthy Flotillan capitalists, or are given as commendations to nomads who have significantly furthered the Flotillan cause.
th: 像这样的遗物现如今是弗洛特利亚大陆上有钱资本家的家中装饰物,或是赠与对弗洛特利亚有着杰出贡献的游民.

en: Repair wings, legs, and any other structures by hammering them. Always cheaper to fix than to rebuild.
th: 用锤子敲打进行翼部、腿部和其他建筑设施的修复作业。尝试修复总比重建所消耗的材料少。

en: Requires high concentrations of volcanic ash to grow.
th: 需要高浓度火山灰才能生长。

en: Requires obsidian container to collect it.
th: 需要黑曜石容器来收集。

en: Restores a large amount of HP over a period of time. Not usable while in combat.
th: 在一段时间内回复大量的生命值。战斗中无法使用。

en: Restores a small amount of HP over a period of time. Not usable while in combat.
th: 在一段时间内回复少量生命值。战斗中无法使用。

en: Returns a good yield when used to harvest small plants.
th: 采集小型植被的时候产出大量的作物。

en: Returns a superior yield when used to harvest small plants.
th: 采集小型植被的时候产出巨量的作物。

en: Rupu Gel is highly flammable, and a sideproduct of a shamanic ritual. A rare ingredient used in crafting ammo and often traded in Trade Stations.
th: 露普胶是萨满仪式的副产品，高度易燃。是一种用来制作弹药的稀有材料。经常在贸易站中交易。

en: Said to induce hallucinations that can reveal ancient wisdom. Grants Nomad the ancient wisdom to build a Walker.
th: 据说可以诱发幻觉，揭示古老的智慧。授予游民打造出翼行者的古老智慧。

en: Sharpened using an ancient Nomadic technique, the blade of a Firestone Battleaxe just as easily cut heads as trees.
th: 用古老的游民技术磨制而成，用火石战斧的刀刃砍头就和砍树一样。

en: Shot with Ballista. Explodes on impact, slightly damaging and throwing back everyone in the affected area.
th: 用弩炮射击。撞击后爆炸，造成轻微伤害并将区域内所有人掷回。

en: Shot with Repeater and Exoskeleton. After being shot, starts slowly falling down vertically, exploding on impact with anything. Creates a wall of mines when shot repeatedly.
th: 用连发枪和外置骨骼射击。当中弹后，会开始缓慢垂直下落，与任何东西撞击后会爆炸。反复射击时，会产生一堵地雷墙。

en: Shot with Repeater and Exoskeleton. Explodes on impact, damaging everyone in the affected area.
th: 用连发枪和外置骨骼射击。命中后爆炸并在范围内造成一定伤害

en: Shot with Repeater and Exoskeleton. High precision and speed make them deadly against lightly armored targets. Ineffective against walkers and structures.
th: 用连发枪和外置骨骼射击。精确度高，速度快，对轻甲目标致命。对翼行者和建筑无效。

en: Skittering parasites make their nests between the gooey cracks. Harvesting chitin is dirty work.
th: 窜来窜去的小虫子们会在黏糊糊的缝隙之间安巢。采集甲壳可是一件脏活。

en: Snorting this will make a Nomad hyper focused. Grants Nomad more damage and faster reloading with board weapons.
th: 吸入这个会使游民特别专注。可以让游民造成更多的伤害和以及更快的上弹。

en: Sold by ammo merchants for Flots.
Some strange plants with psychoactive properties can be turned into mind enhancing vitamins.
th: 一种奇异的植物，因其具有刺激神经的功效，所以可被制成用于醒脑的维生素。

en: Spacious pouch with compartments for storing throwing nets.
th: 宽敞的小袋，有储存投掷网的隔间。

en: Stacking this module decreases damage dealt to legs on collision.
th: 添加该模块以减少翼行者腿部与其他物体碰撞时所受到的伤害。

en: Stacking this module decreases the crafting time of stations attached to a walker.
th: 添加该模块可使翼行者上的制造台的制造时间缩短。

en: Stacking this module decreases the wait time before respawning on a walker.
th: 添加该模块以减少从翼行者处重生需要花费的等待时间。

en: Stacking this module decreases the water cost of respawning on walker.
th: 添加该模块以减少从翼行者处重生的水源消耗量。

en: Stacking this module decreases the water cost of travelling.
th: 添加该模块以降低移动过程中的水源消耗量。

en: Stacking this module decreases the weight of a packed base.
th: 添加该模块以降低打包基地的重量。

en: Stacking this module increases the armor value of all structures attached to a walker.
th: 添加该模块以提高摆放在翼行者身上的建筑物的护甲值。

en: Stacking this module increases the capacity of a walker's Armor and Weapons container.
th: 添加该模块以提高翼行者的护甲和武器容器的容量。

en: Stacking this module increases the maximum weight limit of a walker.
th: 添加该模块以提高翼行者的最大负重量。

en: Stacking this module increases the rate at which sand is removed from a walker's gears after travelling.
th: 添加该模块以提高移除翼行者装备在旅途中混入的沙土的速度。

en: Stacking this module increases the storage capacity of a walker's Cargo container.
th: 添加该模块以提高翼行者货舱的储藏容量。

en: Stacking this module increases the torque battery's maximum capacity.
th: 添加该模块以提高矩力电池的最大容量。

en: Stacking this module reduces damage to a walker from all sources except those that can damage Reinforced armor.
th: 添加该模块以减少来自所有来源的对翼行者的伤害，除了那些可以对强化装甲造成伤害的。

en: Standing on a sandy surface automatically provides this resource for crafting.
th: 站在沙地上会自动提供这种材料可供制作。

en: Stomped from vines, leaves, and other resources.
th: 将藤蔓、叶子或其他资源压碎后获得。

en: Stores torque by winding up a mechanism with a rope inside.
th: 通过用里面的绳子储存矩力

en: Strong wooden plank reinforced using a forgotten technology at Ancient Crafting Sites.
th: 用古代工艺遗址中被遗忘的技术加固的坚固木板。

en: Superior reeling speed, but limited reach. Most effective in combat situations.
th: 收绳速度极快，但是长度有限。在战斗中最为有效。

en: Supossedly one of the only weapons devised by the Guardians themselves, who are rumored to be master engineers. The blades whistle in a pleasant way as they cut through the air.
th: 据说是守护者们自己设计的唯一武器之一，据说他们是工程大师。刀刃划过空气时，发出悦耳的啸声。

en: Surrounded by brigands who sought to take his life, Punparratju swung his wicked axe and severed five of their heads in a single stroke. Punparratju's offensive to recapture the land bridge was successful, and the Flotilla crossed the straight unimpeded.
th: 在被成群的强盗围住，命在旦夕的时候，彭帕拉图挥舞着他的斧头，一击就把强盗五颗脑袋砍下来。彭帕拉图积极进攻，成功地重新占领了大陆桥，得以让弗洛特利亚人自此穿越海峡畅通无阻。

en: The Rupu are skilled imitators, and can crudely reproduce human fighting techniques and constructions. They use wood shafts to prop up their mud huts, giving them a striking resemblance to the Nomads' walkers.
th: 露普是精湛的模仿者，能够在一定程度上模仿人类的战斗技巧和建造技艺。他们会使用木杆来架起他们的泥土小屋，这就和游民们所使用的翼行者十分类似。

en: The Swampwood tribe rarely make contact with the Flotillans or venture beyond their fleet, making the specialty armor they construct from redwood wood a sought after commodity.
th: 沼木部落几乎不与弗洛特利亚人接触，也不冒险越界到他们舰队范围之外的地方。所以，他们用红木制作出来的特制护甲成为了众人追捧的商品。

en: The Swampwood tribe rarely make contact with the Flotillans or venture beyond their fleet, making the specialty armor they construct from redwood wood a sought after commodity.
th: 沼木部落几乎不与弗洛特利亚人接触，也不冒险越界到他们舰队范围之外的地方。所以，他们用红木制作出来的特制护甲成为了众人追捧的商品。

en: The Swampwood tribe rarely make contact with the Flotillans or venture beyond their fleet, making the specialty armor they construct from redwood wood a sought after commodity.
th: 沼木部落几乎不与弗洛特利亚人接触，也不冒险越界到他们舰队范围之外的地方。所以，他们用红木制作出来的特制护甲成为了众人追捧的商品。

en: The Wyndan tribe is said to have pioneered the first walkers.
th: 据说韦丹部落是驾驶了第一架翼行者。

en: The Wyndan tribe is said to have pioneered the first walkers.
th: 据说韦丹部落是驾驶了第一架翼行者。

en: The blunt force behind the blade makes it cut much deeper than other swords.
th: 这把武器的锋刃所蕴藏的钝力，能让它造成的伤口比一般剑刃所造成的伤口还要深。

en: The cargo hold of your Walker is usually the safest spot for your valuables. Hostile nomads need to break into your hull to gain access, which is costly and takes a long time.
th: 你的翼行者货舱往往是你储藏宝物的最好的地方。有敌意的游民需要花很大的功夫才能打开缺口进入货舱。

en: The corpse of a single worm can provide enough meat to feed a large family for months; its hard scales can be used to craft armor; its silk makes the sturdiest sails, its sinew the strongest rope; and its blood, when imbibed, heightens the user’s olfactory senses to supernatural levels.
th: 一条蠕虫的尸体就足以为一个大家庭提供数个月的食粮。蠕虫坚硬的鳞甲可以用来制造护甲。蠕虫丝可以用来做最牢固的帆。蠕虫筋可以用来做最结实的绳索。至于蠕虫血，则能够把食用者的嗅觉能力提高到超能力的水平。

en: The fastest way to dispatch a rupu.
The first throwers were members of a rogue sect of cannabilistic warriors. Their numbers have waned, but they still periodically cause havoc for Flotillan supply caravans.
th: 投掷部落是食人族勇士族里面的叛变的一个分支部落。投掷部落的部民数量已经明显下降，但是他们仍然会时不时给弗洛特利亚的货运供给商队带去灾难性的打击。

en: The flexible bone plates are stitched into a scalemail that provides increased protection.
th: 灵活的骨片被缝制到鳞甲上，提供更大程度的保护。

en: The gear storage holds weapons and armors and is automatically equipped on respawn. Keep your gear storage stocked and sorted - you will need if hostile nomads engage you.
th: 装备仓库可以存放武器和盔甲，并在重生时自动装备。要注意保持你的装备仓库的库存和分类--尤其是当敌对的游民与你交战时非常有用。

en: The hoof-shaped handle is attributed to the wandering Herdsmen Tribe, who are now lost, but are fabled to have found The Place That Never Dies. The hoof is a good luck charm among Nomads who are forever at the whim of the path they follow.
th: 游荡的药民部落所使用的部落标志呈现马蹄把手状。药民部落而今已经不知所踪，但在传说里面，他们找到了永生之地。对于那些随时说走就走踏上旅途的游民而言，这个马蹄就是好运的象征。

en: The hoof-shaped handle is attributed to the wandering Herdsmen Tribe, who are now lost, but are fabled to have found The Place That Never Dies. The hoof is a good luck charm among Nomads who are forever at the whim of the path they follow.
th: 游荡的药民部落所使用的部落标志呈现马蹄把手状。药民部落而今已经不知所踪，但在传说里面，他们找到了永生之地。对于那些随时说走就走踏上旅途的游民而言，这个马蹄就是好运的象征。

en: The last resort for nomads dying of thirst. At least the taste won't kill you.
th: 这是那些口渴将死的游民最后的救命稻草。反正这东西吃下去死不了。

en: The leftovers of a shamanic ritual.
th: 萨满仪式结束之后的残留物。

en: The miraculously thin blade slips between the fibers of armor. Allegedly used by the Guardian's royal assassins.
th: 锋刃出人意料的薄，却能穿透护甲之间的纤维。这把武器相传为守卫者的皇家刺客所用。

en: The nomads travel where the land is always bright, but eclipses will cause periods of unexpected darkness.
th: 虽然游民所到之处皆在烈日之下，但是日食会带来短暂的黑暗时刻。

en: The raw skin of an animal.
th: 一块未经处理的动物皮。

en: The red tint is attributed to a ubiquitous variety of toxic algae.
th: 水中包含着的各类有毒水藻使其变成了红色。

en: The serrated blade is designed to inflict the utmost pain, without necessarily being lethal. The preferred weapon of many pirates.
th: 锯齿状的锋刃，能够带来最剧烈的疼痛感却不致人于死地。很多的海盗都偏好这一武器。

en: The wandering wisemen use a divining technique to locate the rare blood turnip root, which when cut open bleeds like a slaughtered animal. Many have tried without success to cultivate it.
th: 那些四处漫游的智者，会借助占卜之力来寻找稀有的血芜菁。当它们被切开时，如同被屠杀的生物般血流一地。很多人试图种植血芜菁却徒劳无功。

en: These refreshing eye drops deceive a Nomad into thinking his or her heatstroke is gone. Allows Nomad to carry more weight.
th: 这些提神的眼药水会欺骗游民，让他或她的中暑现象消失。可以让游民能够承担更多的重量。

en: These vines grow exclusively in rupu excrement, which the rupu use as a binding agent in the construction of their mud huts.
th: 这种藤蔓专门生长在在露普族排泄物上，被露普族用来捆绑固定他们的小泥屋。

en: They call nomads who specialize in using rawbone weaponry "boneheads," an ancient term meaning simpleton.
th: 那些擅长使用未加工的骨头做出来的武器的游民，被称为“骨头”。这个词在以前指的是笨蛋。

en: They call nomads who specialize in using rawbone weaponry "boneheads," an ancient term meaning simpleton.
th: 那些擅长使用未加工的骨头做出来的武器的游民，被称为“骨头”。这个词在以前指的是笨蛋。

en: They call nomads who specialize in using rawbone weaponry "boneheads," an ancient term meaning simpleton.
th: 那些擅长使用未加工的骨头做出来的武器的游民，被称为“骨头”。这个词在以前指的是笨蛋。

en: Thick feather-padded soles mitigate fall damage.
th: 鞋底垫着厚实的羽毛，可以降低坠落伤害。

en: Thick liquid used in heavy and complex constructions. Ignitable in combination with other materials.
th: 用于重型和复杂建筑的浓稠液体。与其他材料结合时可燃。

en: This hardy plant grows in the hottest of conditions.
th: 这种坚韧的植物生长于最炙热的环境中。

en: This inconspicuous rock glows brightly when the Moon and Sun align. The mineral has permeated the soil, water, plant life, and possibly more.
th: 这种不起眼的石头会在日月合璧之时闪闪发光。它已经渗透进土壤、水源、植物甚至其他东西之中。

en: This insulating suit traps excreted fluids and recycles them with state-of-the-art worm technology.
th: 该隔热服能够收集排泄出来的液体，并将液体通过顶级的蠕虫技术进行回收。

en: This unflattering weapon may just look like rocks tied to a stick, but it's deceptively powerful in the hands of a skilled nomadic warrior.
th: 这件毫不起眼的武器在旁人眼中不外乎是石头绑在木棍上，但是在那些游民勇士的手中却意料之外地具备强大的战斗力。

en: This versatile material is the focus of Flotillan engineering.
th: 这种功能多样的材料在弗洛特利亚工程学上有着举足轻重的位置。

en: Thrives in the heat generated by volcanic hotspots.
th: 依靠火山热点所产生的热量生长。

en: Tiny green mineral flecks dot the sand.
th: 混淆在沙土之中的小小绿色矿物斑点

en: Traditionally used in the past for public executions on the Flotilla, until a master craftsman discovered the schematics and manufactured a few more. A feared sword with a dark history.
th: 依照惯例，一般是用在弗洛特利亚的公开处刑场所当中。直到后来又一位大师级的工艺人发现了该武器的图纸，然后制造了几把出来。这是一把黑历史的恐惧之剑。

en: Until the discovery of lava processing, kopesh swords were made of noble metals as ceremonial weapons. Using new methods of production, they can now be seen on battlefields as well.
th: 在发现熔岩加工之前，科佩什剑作为礼仪武器是用贵金属制作的。使用新的生产方法，现在科佩什剑也可以在战场上看到。

en: Used in Tower Walker weapon. Essentially a harpoon with a bomb on its tip that has devastating damage, but low accuracy due to the shape.
th: 用于塔翼行者的武器。本质上是一个尖端带有炸弹的鱼叉，具有毁灭性的伤害，但由于外形的原因，精度较低。

en: Used to make everything from ropes, sails, to garments.
th: 可以用于制造诸如绳索、船帆和衣物等东西。

en: Walker legs will automatically harvest foliage when travelling at slow speed. Stacking this module increases the amount of foliage harvested.
th: 翼行者的机腿在慢速行驶时，会自动收割植物。叠加这个模组可以增加收获的植物数量。

en: Walker legs will automatically pick up dropped items when travelling at slow speed. Stacking this module increases the maximum speed at which items are picked up.
th: 翼行者在慢速移动的时候，其腿部可以自动拾取掉落的道具。添加该模块能够提高拾取道具时的最大行进速度。

en: Walker legs will chop wood when they impact with trees. Stacking this module increases the amount of wood.
th: 翼行者机腿与树木撞击时，会砍断木头。叠加这个模组会增加木材的数量。

en: Walker will generate torque. Stacking this module increases the amount of torque generated by a moving walker.
th: 翼行者会产生矩力。堆积这一模块能够增加移动中地翼行者所能产生地矩力量。

en: Water allows you to respawn and to travel to other oases. Try and keep your water storage filled - running out of water during combat means certain defeat.
th: 水可以让你重生并传送到其他绿洲内。尽量将你的水储量保持一个满的状态 - 在战斗中没水了基本上没救了。

en: While it doesn't hold much liquid, it's simple to make and can be crafted using almost any material.
th: 虽然无法存储大量液体，但是制作方便。使用常见材料均可制作。

en: While nomads no longer travel on foot to make their migration across the world, there exists a deep affection for the old ways. The tradition of converting walking staffs for battle has yet to die.
th: 虽然游民不再以步行的方式在世界范围内进行迁移，但是对于这种古老方式的执念还依然存在。步行拐杖化身为战斗武器的传统还未消亡。

en: While not being sharp like a similarly built bladestaff, the weight and sturdyness of hammerstaff tips allows to crack enemy skulls with ease and grace.
th: 虽然不像类似结构的剑杖那样锋利，但锤杖尖的重量和坚固性使其可以轻松优雅地敲碎敌人的头骨。

en: While shorter than the similarly built Swordstaff, Sawtooth is valued for its more devastating damage.
th: 虽然比相似的剑杖要短，锯齿剑有着更强大的破坏力。

en: While the excquisite craftsmanship of the bozdogan weapons draws attention of many, their weight distribution allows only the strongest warriors to wield it effectively.
th: 虽然钝锤的精致工艺吸引了许多人的注意，但其重量分布让只有最强壮的战士才能有效地挥舞它。

en: With its sharp edge and a balanced handle, a Firestone Axe is a choice of many Nomads seeking reliable and powerful weapons for their battles.
th: 凭借其锋利的刃口和平衡的手柄，火石斧头是许多游民在战斗中寻求可靠和强大武器的选择。

en: Worm silk exists in vastly different tensile strengths and purities, and must be graded by the Flotillan Merchant's Guild before it can be legally sold at markets. Aside from certain prohibited substances, it is one of the most desirable luxury goods.
th: 蠕虫丝的伸展性和纯度各异，必须警告过弗洛特利亚商会鉴定之后才能流入商贸市场作为买卖品。除了少数禁品之外，蠕虫丝绸可算得上是最被人们所渴求的奢侈品。

en: Worn by nomads who don't mind the smell. Extremely light and maneuverable.
th: 尽管这件衣服带有异味，那些流浪汉可一点都不在乎。因为它穿起来又轻便又灵活。

en: Worn by nomads who don't mind the smell. Extremely light and maneuverable.

en: All oases eventually get burnt by the Sun. When it happens, nomads and some walkers on that oasis migrate to the nearest oasis automatically.
th: 所有的绿洲最终都会被太阳所烧毁。游民和一些翼行者便会自动的向最近的绿洲迁徙。

en:
Debt is accumulated when you fail to pay taxes to your King.

Every time you don't pay taxes in full, you will be fined with a fee depending on how much you failed to pay.

Once you reach the maximum tax debt, the King will start siezing goods from your town's storage.
th:
当你没有向你的国王缴税时，债务就会累积起来。

每次你没有全额缴税，你都会被罚款，罚款金额取决于你未能支付的费用。

一旦你达到最大的税收债务，国王就会开始从你的城镇的仓库中掠夺货物。

en: Disassemble buildings and structures recovering a small part of resources.

在附近的村庄找到一个商人，为你的弓买一些箭。[简单的箭]
从这里往东南方向的路上似乎有一个。

en: Once bought, you can invest resources in Walker storage to increase levels of individual walkers. Levels define how many modules a walker can have.
th: 购买后,你可以消耗资源在翼行者储藏库上来增加翼行者的等级。等级决定了你可以加载多少个模块在翼行者上。

en:
Population represents how many villagers you have in your town to harvest and produce resources.

Hire NPCs in the world to grow your population, but missing food or water will make them leave your town.

Better food provides more nutrition and can feed more villagers longer. Water always provides the same value

Food requirement is calculated through the same food value used by your character to satisfy hunger.

Working population consumes more food than loiters, so don't waste it by keeping buildings idle while villagers work there.
th:
人口代表你的城镇有多少村民来收获和生产资源。

随着时间的推移，人口会消耗食物和水来生存。如果你的城镇有足够的食物和水，你的人口就会增长。否则，它将慢慢死亡。

更好的食物能提供更多的营养，能更长时间地养活更多的村民。水总是提供相同的价值

食物需求是通过你的角色用来满足饥饿的相同食物值来计算的。

劳动人口比闲散人口消耗更多的食物，所以当村民在那里工作时，不要让建筑闲置而浪费食物。

en: Set unique names for buildings and structures to make management easier.
th: 为建筑设置独特的名字可以使管理更容易。

en: Shows all trader orders at a trade station in the selected oasis.
th: 在选出的绿洲中的交易平台中显示出所有的交易订单

en: Shows walkers in the lobby of the selected oasis.
th: 在选出的绿洲的大厅中显示出翼行者

en:
The King requires every province of the kingdom to pay taxes or face the consequences.

As your mission to settle on this new land comes directly from the King, you've been granted a tax exemption until your territories grow to a large enough size.

Once your capital becomes a proper town at Tier 2, you will be expected to pay taxes as every Lord in the kingdom.

Taxes depend on the size of your population and get collected regularly, which all can be monitored from your Town Hall.
th:
国王要求王国的每个省都要交税，否则将面临严重的后果。

由于你们在这片新土地上定居的任务直接来自于国王，你们被授予了免税权，直到你们的领土发展到足够大的规模。

一旦你的首都成为二级城镇，你将被要求像王国中的每个领主一样交税。

税收取决于你的人口规模，并定期征收，这一切都可以从你的市政厅监控。

en:
Town Levies act as guards for your town, defending it against enemy forces and upholding the peace.

Villagers can be turned into levies in their individual overview screen.

Make sure to keep your population fed, otherwise Levies will start dying of hunger!

Levies can be recruited as personal troops or released to continue guarding the town.

They will follow you and act as your personal army, but will continue to consume the town's food and water.
th:
镇上的征兵作为你的城镇的卫兵，保卫它免受敌军的攻击并维护和平。

征兵可以在兵营中接受训练，并被算作工作人口。

请确保你的人口有足够的食物，否则征兵会开始饿死。

征兵可以被招募为个人部队，并被释放以继续守卫城镇。

他们会跟随你，作为你的个人军队，但会继续消耗城镇的食物和水。
