Build a Stone Wall on the Core
Buy resources at the Trading Station
th: 从交易平台中购买材料

en: Chew the cactus when you cannot find water. The taste is not so sweet, more like a bum rag!
th: 找不到水的时候就嚼仙人掌。味道没有那么甜，更像一块馊抹布!
攀爬边缘 - 在半空中按住/点击
攀爬边缘 - 在半空中按住/点击

en: Craft a Beat Stick in the Crafting Menu
th: 在制作菜单制作一个木棍。

en: Craft a Cargo Hold inside your Walker
th: 在你的翼行者内制作一个货舱。

en: Craft a Vision Powder in the Campfire
th: 在营火中制作视野粉尘

en: Craft a Water Storage inside your Walker
th: 在你的翼行者内制作一个储水仓

en: Craft and Equip Fiber Arm Wraps
Craft and Equip Fiber Shirt and Trousers
Craft and Equip a Fiber Headwrap
Craft and Equip a Makeshift Bottle
th: 制作并装备一个粗制滥造的瓶子

en: Craft and Equip a Repaired Grappling Hook
th: 制作并装备一个修复后抓钩

en: Craft and Use a Primitive Bandage
Deposit Flots [Currency] at the Trading Station
Drive your Walker far into the desert to discover other oases
th: 驾驶你的翼行者远赴沙漠，发现其他绿洲

en: Eat Cactus Flesh from the Inventory
th: 吃你背包里的仙人掌果肉。

en: Every nomad need to know how to climb over the obstacles. If you will ever need to get on top of a walker, or even on the rock to get a safe place from all those Rupus.
th: 每个游民都需要知道如何爬过障碍。尤其是当你要爬到一个翼行者的顶部或者爬到岩石顶端来躲避露普生物的追击时.

en: Fill a Base Maintenance Chest with enough resources for its daily upkeep
th: 为一个基地维护箱注入足够的资源，以满足其日常维护的需要。

en: Find a Fragment in the nearby walker wreckage.
th: 在翼行者残骸中找到一块碎片
完成你的萤火虫翼行者

en: Follow the wind, Nomad, it is the breath of your ancestors. It will lead you back to the Flotilla.
th: 跟着风走吧，游民，它是你祖先的气息。它将带领你回到弗洛特利亚。

en: Founder Walkers such as Balang are used to transport heavy bases made of stone and other solid materials. They can transform into a strong core that can be built on.
th: 霸浪等基础类型的翼行者是用来运输石块和其他固体材料制成的重型基地的。它们可以转化为一个坚固的核心，可以在此基础上进行建设。

en: Grappling Hook let's you swing through the air and reach previously inaccessible areas. It's easy to use, but difficult to master.
th: 抓钩能够让你从空中荡过，抵达以往去不了的地方。虽说用起来很简单，但是要真正掌握却不是易事。

en: Grappling hook is a tool that allows nomads to reach unbelievable heights and traverse the land quickly.
th: 抓钩可以让游民到达不可思议的高度，方便他们移动。
从仙人掌上采集仙人掌果肉

en: Harvest a Fiber Weave from a Rupu
th: 从露普族上采集纤维织物

en: Harvest a Wooden Shaft from a Rupu
th: 从露普族身上采集木杆

en: Harvest a Wooden Shaft from a Rupu or Rupu Camps
th: 从露普族或者营地里采集木杆

en: If you are looking to buy something, visit the trade stations on the oases. Everything is for sale, even some things that shouldn’t be.
th: 如果你想买东西，可以去绿洲上的交易站。所有的东西都在出售，甚至一些不该出售的东西。

en: If you die, you can choose to respawn at a random location in the desert or at a bed or a walker you've built.
th: 当你死亡时，你可以选择随机重生,还可以在建造好的床上或者翼行者上重生。

en: If you return to the Flotilla, you must ride the walker. It is written in the Scrolls.
th: 如果你要回到弗洛特利亚，你必须骑着翼行者。卷轴上有记载。

en: In the oases, plants spill over the sand where nothing is meant to grow. I’ve seen immense trees shoot up after a single rainfall.
th: 在绿洲里，植物稀稀落落的生长在沙子上。我见过一次降雨后，巨大的树木就拔地而起。

en: In the wastes, water can be more precious than worm silk. A stranded merchant traded me all his possessions for a bottle.
th: 在荒原上，水可以比虫丝更珍贵。一个受困的商人用他所有的财产跟我换了一瓶水。

en: In times of danger, The Flotilla comes apart and sails away in all directions. It gathers again near the frozen strait, before it carries us all across the sea.
th: 在危险的时候，弗洛特利亚分开，向四面八方驶去。在冰封的海峡附近再次聚拢，然后带着我们漂洋过海。

en: Initiate a "Transfer to Lobby" of your Firefly Walker
th: 启动你萤火虫翼行者“转移到大厅”

en: It’s said that when the moon broke, the sun slowed to a crawl in the sky. The metropolises were buried.
th: 据说，当初月亮毁掉的时候，太阳在空中慢吞吞地爬行到正中,大都会便被吞没了。

en: I’ve received visions too. I’ve seen nations settled on the floor of the Earth, and when I looked up, the moon was whole.
th: 我也曾见到过幻象。我看到国家定居在地球的地面上，当我抬头时，月亮是完整的。

en: Learning how to better control the direction of your swing greatly increases your odds of defeating enemies.
th: 掌握如何更好地控制你的千秋荡方向，能够极大地提高你打败敌人地机会

en: Left alone in the desert, you need a weapon to fight off the wildlife and hostile Nomads.
th: 独自一人身处沙漠之时，你需要一把武器用于抵御野兽和敌对游民。

en: Left attack - Drag mouse left and hold
th: 左侧攻击 - 往左拖动鼠标并按住

en: Left attack - Move camera left and press
th: 左侧攻击 - 将镜头向左移动并按下

en: Left block - Drag mouse left and hold
th: 左侧格挡 - 往上拖动鼠标并按住

en: Left block - Move camera left and press
th: 左侧格挡 - 将相机向左移动并按下

en: Loot a Wooden Shaft from Rupu
th: 从露普族身上采集木杆

en: Loot huts in Rupu Camps scattered around

th: 驾驶一台萤火虫翼行者

en: Man a Walker with at least one wing
th: 驾驶一台至少有一张机翼的翼行者

en: Man a fully built Balang Walker
Man a fully built Dinghy Walker

Most walkers are wind-powered, walking bases that allow Nomads to live sedentary lifestyles while circumnavigating the planet. They are used for travelling long distances, transporting large quantities of resources, and as weapons of war.
th: 大部分的翼行者都是风力驱动的行走式基地，能够让游民环航星球的同时过着定栖的生活方式。翼行者大多数用于长途旅行、大量资源的运输，也充当战争武器。

en: Nomad, do you remember what I’ve told you? If you find your trousers full of sand, you’ve landed in the wastes! Now shake it off and begin moving, the sun is near! It will consume this place.
th: 游民，你还记得我跟你说过的话吗？如果你发现你的裤子里装满了沙子，你就落到了荒原上！现在把这些沙子甩掉，然后开始移动，太阳就快到了！它将会吞噬这个地方

en: Nomads can hide their walkers in the deserts surrounding oases to always have a place to regroup. If you decide to bring your hidden walker into an oasis, whatever you have in your gear slots will be used automatically whenever you respawn on that walker.
th: 游民可以将他们的翼行者隐藏在绿洲周围的沙漠之中好方便他们再集合. 如果你决定要把你的翼行者藏进绿洲的话，你当前拥有的装备栏就是你将会在重生后自动使用的装备栏。

en: Nomads consume vitamins to enhance their abilities and expand their minds. Some produce visions that may show a Nomad how to engineer advanced machinery.
th: 游民服用维生素来提高他们的能力增长他们的智慧。一些维生素药物甚至能够让游民获得制造先进机械技艺的能力。

en: Nomads don't stay in the same oasis for long, but they may settle down temporarily. Campfire allows you to produce water and other useful substances, and will keep you warm.
th: 游民并不会在同一片绿洲逗留太长的时间，但他们可能会临时驻扎下来。营火可以让你获取水源以及其他有用的东西。它还可以用来取暖。

en: Nomads must keep moving to outrun the Sun. You can find new resources, ancient ruins, and unique areas to explore.
th: 游民必须不断移动，才不会被太阳追上。你可以在不同的地区发现新的资源、远古的遗迹，也可以探索独特的生态群系。

en: Nomads use theirs walkers to pack bases and move on. Once they find a safe oasis to settle on, they unpack  their base and enjoy a moment of safety until it's time to move again.
th: 游民经常使用他们的翼行者来打包基地并继续前行。当他们找到一块安全的绿洲时，他们会再展开基地，享受一段时光，直到下一次前行。

en: Open Inventory to equip a Beat Stick
th: 打开物品栏来装备木棍

en: Our tribe built the walkers because there can be no rest. Keep only what you need, abandon everything that cannot be carried.
th: 因为不能停下脚步, 我们的部落建造了翼行者。只保留自己需要的东西，放弃一切不能携带的东西。

en: Overhead attack - Drag mouse upwards and hold
th: 上方攻击 - 往上拖动鼠标并按住

en: Overhead attack - Move camera up and press
th: 上方攻击 - 将镜头向上移动并按住

en: Overhead block - Drag mouse upwards and hold
th: 上方格挡 - 往上拖动鼠标并按住

en: Overhead block - Move camera up and press
th: 上方格挡 - 将镜头向上移动并按住

en: Pack a Campfire into your walker
th: 将营火打包到你的翼行者上

en: Pack crafting stations or other structures in your walker to take them wherever your journey leads you. Entire wooden bases can be packed on larger walkers.
th: 将制作台和其他建筑打包到你的翼行者上吧。整个木制基地可以打包到更大型的翼行者上。

en: Pack your walker into Small Base Walker Packer
th: 将您的翼行者打包到小型基地翼行者打包台中

en: Place a Campfire on your walker
th: 放置营火到你的翼行者上

en: Prepare for your journey. You must gather essentials, stock up on water, and plan your route.
th: 准备好你的旅程。你需要收集必需品，储藏好水资源，计划你的路线。

en: Prepare the cactus fruit into a powder, and place it under your tongue. You will see visions of ancient wisdom.
th: 将仙人掌果准备成粉末，放在舌下。你会看到古代智慧的幻象。

en: Prepare water for travel, inside walker water container
th: 准备好旅行用的水，放在翼行者的水容器内

en: Put Cactus Flesh in a Campfire
th: 在营火中放入仙人掌果肉

en: Put Water in your Firefly Walker
th: 放些水在你的萤火虫翼行者上

en: Put Water into your Walker's Water Container
th: 在你的翼行者储水仓里放些水

en: Right attack - Drag mouse right and hold
th: 攻击右边 - 往右拖动鼠标并按住

en: Right attack - Move camera right and press
th: 攻击右边 - 往右拖动镜头并按下

en: Right block - Drag mouse right and hold
th: 格挡右边 - 往上拖动鼠标并按住

en: Right block - Move camera right and press
th: 格挡右边 - 往上拖动镜头并按下

en: Rupu are storing useful resources in urns inside their camps. Raid them to find unique treasures, but be careful, they are protecting it with their lives!
th: 露普生物在它们的营地内的瓮中存放着有用的资源。突袭并夺取它们独特的宝藏吧！但要小心，它们可是在用生命保护这些宝物的!

en: Rupu once surrounded me on the black hills. They danced and ate the flesh of my companions, guzzling their psychedelic brew.
th: 露普曾经在黑山上包围了我。他们跳着舞，吃着我同伴的肉，喝着他们的迷幻酒。

en: Rupus are the primals inhabiting the oases. Like the Nomads, they must travel to new oases when the sun gets too close. They are addicted to a powerful substance, which they ferment in large thatch vats.
th: 露普生物是绿洲的原住民。就如同游民一样，他们也需要躲避着太阳的追赶。他们崇尚一种非常强力的物品，常在他们的大茅草桶里发酵做出来。

en: Search a walker debris for a Fragment
th: 在一个翼行者残骸中寻找到碎片

en: Select your Dinghy Walker as a spawnpoint
th: 选择你的帆制翼行者作为重生点

en: Select your Firefly Walker as a spawnpoint
th: 选择你的萤火虫翼行者作为重生点

en: Sell resources at the Trading Station
Stand next to your Firefly Walker
th: 站在你的萤火虫翼行者旁

en: Stand on sand to use it automatically
th: 站在沙子上就能自动使用

en: Staying hydrated in the desert is essential. Fruits and other plants will keep you alive when water is scarce.
th: 在沙漠中时刻保持体内水分充足十分重要。在水源稀少的状况下，水果和其他植物将会成为重要的水源来源。

en: Store a Fiber Shirt and Trousers in the Gear Slot of your Firefly Walker
th: 在你的萤火虫翼行者的装备栏里储存一件纤维衣和纤维裤

en: Store a Hatchet in the Gear Slot of your Firefly Walker
th: 在你的萤火虫翼行者的装备栏里储存一把斧头

en: Take Flotilla Quest from Trading Station
th: 在交易站接受弗洛特利亚任务

en: The Children did not survive the changing climate, but they kept their secrets. I have searched their abandoned temples and seen strange machines.
th: "孩子们"没能在不断变化的气候中幸存下来，但他们保留了自己的秘密。我搜索了他们废弃的寺庙，看到了奇怪的机器。

en: The Flotilla is our last walking city, the center of the nomadic world. For those who do not ride the walker, it is the only refuge.
th: 弗洛特利亚是我们最后的城市，是游民世界的中心。对于那些没有翼行者的游民来说，这里是唯一的避难所。

en: The Guardians have always protected the Flotilla. They are keepers of our knowledge. They operate the great machine.
th: 守护者们一直在保护着弗洛特利亚。他们是我们知识的守护者 他们操作着这台伟大的机器。

en: The Rupu are envious creatures, and their minds swim with toxins, making them cruel.
th: 露普是嫉妒的生物，它们头脑中的恶意使他们变得残忍。

en: The area is littered with old abandoned Walkers. They contain useful knowldge of technologies and craft.
th: 这个区域到处都是被遗弃的翼行者。它们含有着有用的科技和制作知识。

en: The path around the world is narrow. Our ancestors left stones to guide us, the songs we sing reveal the way.
th: 世间的路是狭窄的。但是祖先留下石子会为我们引路，我们唱的歌谣亦会为我们指路。

en: The sun burns the land behind us. All living things on Earth must run from it. If you do not understand this reality, you will not make it.
th: 太阳烧毁了我们身后的土地, 使得所有的生物都必须逃离。如果你不接受这个现实，你就会死。

en: The truce between the tribes is fragile, because our hearts are swayed by greed. A nomad will forget the oath he swore as quickly as the sun melts the ice.
th: 部落之间的休战是脆弱的，因为我们的心被贪婪所左右。一个游民会像太阳融化冰块一样，很快就会忘记他所发的誓言。

en: The wilds are overrun with savages called Rupu, they watch you from the brush.
th: 荒野中到处都是被称为露普的野蛮生物，它们会在灌木丛中看着你。

en: The wind-powered Dinghy Walker has enough space for placing crafting stations and board weapons directly on its deck. It's much more advanced and versatile than Firefly.
th: 风力发动的帆制翼行者拥有者足够大的空间来摆放制作台,还可以直接将武器放在甲板上。比萤火虫翼行者要更高级更八面玲珑。

en: There are patches of life in the wastes called the oases, a mysterious energy flows through the soil.
th: 荒原上有一片片的生命，叫做绿洲，一种神秘的能量在土壤中流动。

en: There is a cactus overflowing with energy. It grows higher than the tallest walker. Seek the mystical fruit it bears.
th: 那有着一个有着充裕能量的仙人掌。它比最大的翼行者还要高。找到它的神秘果实吧。

en: There was a tribe who refused to leave their homeland, even after the land was decimated. They called themselves the Children.
th: 有一个部落即使在土地被毁灭之后也拒绝离开他们的家园。他们称自己为 "孩子们"。

en: To carry water and other liquids, you must store them in a bottle. Pure water stored inside your bottle is consumed automatically when you're thirsty.
th: 如果你想携带水或者其他液体，你需要一个瓶子。在瓶子里的纯净水会在你口渴的时候自动消耗。

en: To harvest Cactus Flesh, attack it by pressing
th: 要想攻击仙人掌获得仙人掌肉，请按下

en: Tools allow you to gather resources more efficiently. Use axes to cut down trees for wood, pickaxes for mining minerals, and sickles for harvesting plants.
th: 使用工具可以更高效地采集资源。使用斧头砍伐树木收获木材，使用鸭嘴锄挖矿，使用镰刀采集植物。

en: Transfer your Firefly Walker into Lobby
th: 将你的萤火虫翼行者传送到大厅

en: Unlock Firefly Wings in the Walker Tech Tree
th: 在翼行者科技树中解锁萤火虫翼行者机翼

en: Unlock a Campfire in the Crafting Tech Tree
th: 在制作科技树里解锁营火

en: Unlock a Firefly Walker in Walker Tech Tree
th: 在翼行者科技树里解锁萤火虫翼行者

en: Unlock a Makeshift Bottle in the Equipment Tech Tree
th: 在装备科技树里解锁粗制滥造的瓶子

en: Unlock a Primitive Bandage in the Equipment Tech Tree
th: 在装备科技树里解锁粗制绷带

en: Unlock a Repaired Grappling Hook in the Equipment Tech Tree
th: 在装备科技树里解锁修复后抓钩

en: Unlock a Sand Bed in Construction tree
Unman your Firefly Walker and leave the deck
th: 停止操纵你的萤火虫翼行者并离开甲板。
展开你打包好的翼行者

en: Use a Fragment from the inventory to go into the Tech Tree
th: 在背包栏里使用碎片来打开科技树页面。

en: Use a Hatchet to get more flesh from cacti
th: 用斧头从仙人掌上获取更多的果肉

en: Use a Hatchet to get more flesh from cacti. Attack it with
th: 用斧头从仙人掌上获取更多的果肉。攻击用

en: Use a Hatchet to get wood from trees
th: 用斧头伐木获得更多的木材

en: Use a Hatchet to get wood from trees. Attack it with
th: 用斧头伐木获得更多的木材。攻击用

en: Visit a Trading Station to find a list of requests from the Flotilla. It's a good way to learn the ropes in the wastes and earn some Flots in the process.
th: 找到一个交易站并找到弗洛特利亚的任务列单。这是一个很好的学习方式, 还可以在这个过程中赚取一些金币。

en: Walkers are made in a way to allow easy reassembly, allowing Nomads to pack them into compartments, much like their bases. This is essential for their nomadic lifestyle.
th: 翼行者的制造方式是为了便于重新组装，使游民能够将其装入隔间，就像他们的基地一样。这对于他们的游牧生活方式是必不可少的。

en: We are surrounded by wastes. One side of the earth is hot and barren. The other side is dark and covered in ice.
th: 我们周围都是废物。地球的一边是炎热和贫瘠的。而另一边是被冰雪覆盖的无尽黑暗。

en: We had no choice but to live as nomads. Our tribe chased the sparse rainfall, wherever it fell. We clung to life because we never stopped walking.
th: 我们别无选择，只能过着游民的生活。我们的部落追逐着稀少的雨水，无论它落在哪里。我们坚持生活，因为我们从未停止过脚步。

en: When the moon eclipses the Sun, you will see the energy that nourishes life. It is all that is left of Nibiru.
th: 当月蚀的时候，你会看到滋养生命的能量。这就是尼比卢的全部。

en: When you face an adversary you cannot beat, remember the grappling hook bolted to your arm, and take flight. It is a nomad’s greatest weapon.
th: 当你面对一个你无法战胜的对手时，记住你手臂上栓着的抓钩，然后飞起来。它是游民最伟大的武器。

en: When you wear armor, a percentage of physical damage you recieve will be absorbed. Some weapons and projectiles have high armor penetration and can negate this.
th: 角色穿着护甲的时候，可以吸收一部分的物理伤害。不过，有一些武器和抛射物具有更高的护甲穿透能力，会抵消掉护甲的保护作用。

en: While bases made of solid materials like Stone require specialized walkers to transport, they provide much more protection from hostile nomads than wooden structures.
th: 虽然像石头这样的实心材料制成的基地需要专门的翼行者来运输，但比起木质结构，它们能提供更多的保护，防止敌对的游民。

en: With Fiberworking Station you can manufacture fabrics for walker sails and armors.
th: 有了纤维制作台，你可以制造翼行者风帆和盔甲的布料。

en: You are on your own now
You can avoid taking damage while fighting by blocking your enemy's attacks. A block needs be positioned towards the incoming attack to stop it.
th: 在战斗过程中，通过阻挡敌人的攻击，你可以避免受到伤害。必须顺着敌人朝你攻击过来的方向，才能进行一次有效地阻挡。

en: You gain stat points when you level up. These points can be spent to improve your nomadic abilities.
th: 你升级时会获得一些属性点。这些属性点可以用在升级你的游民能力上。

en: You have spent your entire life rowing the Flotilla, and now you have paid your debt. You will be taken to a pit in the wastes. Survive and return to me. I have more to tell you.
th: 你一生都徘徊在弗洛特利亚中, 现在你已经还清了自己的债。你会被带到荒原上的一个坑里。活下来，回到我身边。我还有更多的事情要告诉你

en: You need to prepare some water if you want to travel farther. Otherwise, you will die of dehydration on the way.
th: 你如果想要继续你的旅行，你需要准备更多的水。否则你会在途中死于缺水。

en: You will find old knowledge on your journey. Bring it with you. The sand has swallowed many treasures.
th: 你会在旅途中发现古老的知识。带着它一起走吧, 沙子已经吞噬了太多宝藏了。

en: You've learned to survive on your own outside of safety of the Flotilla. Now take your fate in your own hands and rise to the top as a nomad.
th: 你已经学会如何在弗洛特利亚下生存了。掌握自己的命运,登上顶点吧!

en: Your walker can become faster and more agile by building wings on it.
th: 在你的翼行者上建造机翼可以让它更快更灵活
